Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, **but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible.** He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and **[needs our help to win.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ef0b6f792b834824a6aecd3b52ca6ba0&_e=YcGt0HnjlY6TQE1RefRPdY4hRUDKTrSsJD1cVqz5t48hljn8uqBn6OkHbmtR9__w1Bw_jzVu6humVLY022med6deBcspSufcmPotf2ccQBUcO3vUlXE9aDfXO1kSsmktWcLj7LVFH-e48_2dDorjbNqkAqABtEhOlolWC7iYI7C3ptv5925_StLa5V89IJePMG25ORD3wuQh6GKbDZTu-HRRmmViiiVsGM2sVsOtv0jzDp8ConuGYT-MpCDvlaUONG6Hzvw4M3FAf-IRROWsoKlJ9ZengK_oV0ATjPXDWuiFny2Y3Ts5JlV2RnQItcStADepVu6Uk35rXHYhBYWuiyNdXwjCLc5bcL7xpKgTpXEmBmKnaWGFW4c-Wl-bnWMepj5-aqcgR06ev62eqNwpmg%3D%3D)**

[**SUPPORT A NAVY SEAL FOR U.S. SENATE
DONATE $2
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ef0b6f792b834824a6aecd3b52ca6ba0&_e=YcGt0HnjlY6TQE1RefRPdY4hRUDKTrSsJD1cVqz5t48hljn8uqBn6OkHbmtR9__w1Bw_jzVu6humVLY022med6deBcspSufcmPotf2ccQBUcO3vUlXE9aDfXO1kSsmktWcLj7LVFH-e48_2dDorjbNqkAqABtEhOlolWC7iYI7C3ptv5925_StLa5V89IJePMG25ORD3wuQh6GKbDZTu-HRRmmViiiVsGM2sVsOtv0h6MlcfKRiqfqJ-cBdsiTIM-PYyMwYA5lZdrd8Qbcds_mTtxt4-qot-96gzYeJKYHU0V0rKQk4kg3wObt7TQSR8VJ1wiHvnjXzvHGX-Fe_lX4Ot5oP6623XHcECBUKU4Xd_hCJaGZOSryxP8gEZ5p_6N4Y0SGuVSgV03jA00JXr5Q%3D%3D)
**As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman** , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and **I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate.**
**[Will you let me know that you got this email by chipping in $2, $5, or even $20 right now?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ef0b6f792b834824a6aecd3b52ca6ba0&_e=YcGt0HnjlY6TQE1RefRPdY4hRUDKTrSsJD1cVqz5t48hljn8uqBn6OkHbmtR9__w1Bw_jzVu6humVLY022med6deBcspSufcmPotf2ccQBUcO3vUlXE9aDfXO1kSsmktWcLj7LVFH-e48_2dDorjbNqkAqABtEhOlolWC7iYI7C3ptv5925_StLa5V89IJePMG25ORD3wuQh6GKbDZTu-HRRmmViiiVsGM2sVsOtv0g25FGVyxA6YsNS8_MoFGt3G1yMoAevVMmPDFm70HYU0711TLWQ9_T1JiKxsENIyZX9xP_eQlNnP9gSGaZ64SnKn-Goh8CvqCpQqYua8MAiTTwbKnfgwHQItyh_Uawg-Vlwk6vK30qsTOOaJQDF8-oHDNG6z3LLb5-zCXr05NSyAg%3D%3D)** I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. When I tell you that this request couldn’t be more urgent, I hope you’ll take my word for it. Tim’s opponent has raised $10 MILLION so far this year, _**meaning Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy needs all the support he can muster.**_

[**SUPPORT A NAVY SEAL
CHIP IN $20
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ef0b6f792b834824a6aecd3b52ca6ba0&_e=YcGt0HnjlY6TQE1RefRPdY4hRUDKTrSsJD1cVqz5t48hljn8uqBn6OkHbmtR9__w1Bw_jzVu6humVLY022med6deBcspSufcmPotf2ccQBUcO3vUlXE9aDfXO1kSsmktWcLj7LVFH-e48_2dDorjbNqkAqABtEhOlolWC7iYI7C3ptv5925_StLa5V89IJePMG25ORD3wuQh6GKbDZTu-HRRmmViiiVsGM2sVsOtv0hP2ed8xADgVNxRzGGN0AX3Bt_oM3WfZIFizwrtyIli9MdJgv_JRJOw9EOjc3fxzli4FXZq3pEXIXwGpRLnCMXM8V4Vbu9K3qbNhe0F-hKAMk1MdP5V1lzKKCkpZTPNC4aHg8HXR9-zb-t-9VtJ2F7FDtrKDD8wDG7wuVeGexWwKQ%3D%3D)

Let me tell you, running for elected office is not easy. Tim Sheehy is going to be working 24/7 for the next 18 months to oust Jon Tester and flip this critical Senate seat for Republicans. The least we can do is show him that we have his back. **How can you possibly pass on supporting a former Navy SEAL who has fought and bled for Old Glory?**

**We will never be able solve the serious problems facing our country if we don’t elect serious people to serve. Quite frankly, Tim Sheehy may be our only hope for taking back the Senate.**

If you have friends and family who donate to conservative causes, please forward this email onto them. **[I’m working to make sure that every Republican in the country understands that winning the Montana Senate race this cycle is my top priority.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ef0b6f792b834824a6aecd3b52ca6ba0&_e=YcGt0HnjlY6TQE1RefRPdY4hRUDKTrSsJD1cVqz5t48hljn8uqBn6OkHbmtR9__w1Bw_jzVu6humVLY022med6deBcspSufcmPotf2ccQBUcO3vUlXE9aDfXO1kSsmktWcLj7LVFH-e48_2dDorjbNqkAqABtEhOlolWC7iYI7C3ptv5925_StLa5V89IJePMG25ORD3wuQh6GKbDZTu-HRRmmViiiVsGM2sVsOtv0g03xx-zYLhO7lLAtD8sYHe2FMOgBLu_T9__Gqp-CHy9jOXZiFV-EsrYquSWOw1Ywv2WtyeeIyH8ZDIafKBaUXWOUVETvfalyN11ls_sv_PIespeBR_L4jN-NZeTop0rl5CVZK7oT0r6EcA_t-Y8DTnMc2rnkddsKNLr18AM-b64w%3D%3D)**

Thanks for your consideration,
Sen. Marco Rubio
United States Senator (R., FL)

clean_body: An update on the $370 million plot to try and sabotage us in the primary. | | | Friend, So far, disloyal Republicans (RINOs) have only PLEDGED to spend $370 MILLION on their plot to sabotage us in the primary. But that all changed at the July end-of-month fundraising deadline. Right before the deadline, a nefarious group of RINO globalists officially raised $78 million to begin turning that plot into a reality. They’ve shown that their $370 million plot is not just a threat. They are truly willing to spend more money than even George Soros to defeat us. This news came just as Biden’s weaponized Department of “Justice” issued yet another unlawful INDICTMENT of me as a completely innocent man. Friend, we’re being attacked from every side. RINOs. Democrats. Globalists. They’re all just one big UNIPARTY that’s united behind a common goal of stopping YOU from having power in your own country. That’s why RINOs are willing to spend MORE THAN GEORGE SOROS to try and take me down. Every dollar Republicans spend attacking me is a dollar given straight to the Biden campaign. The truth is: they know that and simply do not care. . . . . . Because, at the end of the day, they’d rather see Crooked Joe in the White House than a political outsider who puts the people of our country FIRST. These special interest globalists have made a fortune off of putting YOU dead last and selling out our nation to foreign countries like China. These RINOs love to call themselves defenders of liberty – and yet, they choose to side with a corrupt president who has once again weaponized the legal system in an attempt to JAIL his single biggest opponent for a lifetime. But fortunately for us, our movement is packed with over 74 MILLION patriots who will peacefully defend our God-given liberty and justice. Even a contribution of just $1 alongside your fellow patriots is enough to OUTRAISE these RINOs and ensure we prevail against the never-ending attacks from ALL sides. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Tom Fitton
subject: CRISIS: Biden Admin ARRESTS Trump!
body:
Election Integrity Update!

[INSIDE JW]

Trump Indictment: A Naked Threat and Act of Intimidation

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29996&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj15Z1p6TlB3c3REMCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b9edc1f18bd52d1bdad351635b04954e77c0753eef1bf345520aa62910db88c1]

The Biden administration has left the rule of law and the U.S.
Constitution behind with its latest indictment of President Trump for
daring to dispute the 2020 presidential election, as is his God-given
right as a president, a citizen, and a candidate under state, federal
and constitutional law.

This sham indictment is perfectly consistent with the partisan and
political abuse I suffered at the hands of Jack Smith’s prosecutors
for hours as they argued with me before their grand jury using
Democratic talking points on the election controversy.

Let’s be blunt: This indictment is a naked threat and act of
intimidation by the Democratic Party against any and all their
political opponents. The message from the Biden regime is: “We will
put you in jail if you dispute elections.” A free and fair 2024
election is officially impossible.

And, of course, Joe Biden and his political appointee Merrick Garland
at the Justice Department want to distract from the conclusive
evidence of Biden’s personal corruption by trying to jail and turn
Trump into a political prisoner.

It is well past time for Congress to do everything possible under the
law to undo this attempt to wreck our republican form of government.

Let’s hope the courts finally step up and shut down this
unprecedented prosecutorial abuse.

In the meantime, Judicial Watch will continue to expose and hold
accountable the criminal elements in the Biden administration seeking
to undo our republican form of government.

JUDICIAL WATCH CHALLENGES MAINE’S POLICY RESTRICTING USE OF
STATEWIDE VOTER LIST

States continue to resist the law requiring transparency (and
reasonable clean-ups) with respect to their voter rolls.

As America’s leading election law watchdog, we just filed
an _amicus curiae_ (friend of the court) brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29957&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BpbGYtdi1iZWxsb3dzLW1haW5lLW52cmEtYW1pY3VzLTEzNjEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4302ed96bdee2727637b66a0f7b030bdf6b41c1406de46ddda073ea76c176150]
against Maine’s illicit secrecy supporting the sensible decision
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29958&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jYXNldGV4dC5jb20vY2FzZS9wdWItaW50ZXJlc3QtbGVnYWwtZm91bmQtdi1iZWxsb3dzLTM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3930c18c376ec71eff7127724e779880657957907370186cebae2f3cef39feed]
of
the U.S. District Court for the District of Maine, which struck down
Maine’s policy restricting the use and distribution of the state’s
voter registration list (_Public Interest Legal Foundation v. Shenna
Bellows_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29959&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NrZXRzLmp1c3RpYS5jb20vZG9ja2V0L2NpcmN1aXQtY291cnRzL2NhMS8yMy0xMzYxP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=c7bc48c30d457a40723a9981bc38571bfe62c8a74e51658f99c7a5d3807a4828]
(No.
23-1361).

The lawsuit, citing the National Voter Registration Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b]
(NVRA),
is now in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the First Circuit. We point
out:

> In the last ten years, no organization public or private has
> obtained more statewide settlement agreements or consent decrees
> against chief state election officials for violations of the NVRA.
> As part of its list maintenance enforcement efforts, Judicial Watch
> also routinely requests public records of voter registration
> activities in various states under Section 8(i) of the NVRA, and has
> sued on its own behalf and on behalf of others to enforce it.
Our legal team explains:

> The public disclosure provision of the NVRA embodies Congress’
> intent that Americans’ right to vote “must not be sacrificed to
> administrative chicanery, oversights, or inefficiencies.” ... The
> NVRA’s public disclosure provisions mandates that “State
> officials labor under a duty of accountability to the public in
> ensuring that voter lists include eligible voters and exclude
> ineligible ones in the most accurate manner possible.” ... The
> NVRA provides an avenue for citizens to check that and to ensure
> that only eligible registrants remain on the rolls by providing the
> full voter registration list open to public inspection. “Without
> such transparency, public confidence in the essential workings of
> democracy will suffer.”
Judicial Watch details how Maine’s defense for their secrecy has
been rejected repeatedly by other courts:

> No court has adopted Appellant’s [State of Maine] argument here.
> Rather, all courts presented with this issue have found that the
> voter registration list is a record subject to disclosure under the
> NVRA. This Court should reject Appellant’s argument.
According to a national study
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29960&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmV3LWp3LXN0dWR5LXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a43d7948c16cf1c66508bc6ec2ed6509b83546b9a935d7f32419f8cbfafca884]
conducted
by Judicial Watch in 2020, Maine’s statewide registration rate was
101% of eligible voters.

Federal law mandates voter roll transparency. Given Maine’s refusal
to release its voter roll information, it’s reasonable to think that
cleaning up voter rolls is not a priority. Dirty voter rolls can mean
dirty elections.

We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As
part of its work, Judicial Watch assembled a team of highly
experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory
elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio,
Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=21208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL252cmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6895639061ab0e9dd273a0f81e79d0c7c0d5d5fea1149f126ef741e00ac8c21d].

Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads its election
law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil
Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting
rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements
in dozens of states.

We recently settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29899&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsaW5vaXMtc2V0dGxlcy12b3Rlci1yb2xsLWxhd3N1aXQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e9fe86b6ffc691611a0ad5b82b2d00d649a46ff71a19a63eec1320d04c5b286c]
a
federal election integrity lawsuit on behalf of the Illinois
Conservative Union against the state of Illinois, the Illinois State
Board of Elections, and its director, which grants access to the
current centralized statewide list of registered voters for the state
for the past 15 elections.

In April 2023, Pennsylvania settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29522&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGVubnN5bHZhbmlhLXNldHRsZXMtdm90ZXItcm9sbC1sYXdzdWl0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b33f9b5e5f1a5e111c3a1560505b53cf54fa81004f211534520c105700c0a578]
with
us and admitted in court filings that it removed 178,258 ineligible
registrations in response to communications from Judicial Watch. The
settlement commits Pennsylvania and five of its counties to extensive
public reporting of statistics regarding their ongoing voter roll
clean-up efforts for the next five years.

In March 2023, Colorado agreed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29191&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29sb3JhZG8tdG8tc2V0dGxlLWxhd3N1aXQtb3Zlci1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f7260ef63b15ec87f6d3c20cddc85a268ea7c93313b47b76439fc1861bc9d82c]
to
settle a Judicial Watch NVRA lawsuit alleging that Colorado failed to
remove ineligible voters from its rolls. The settlement agreement
requires Colorado to provide Judicial Watch with the most recent voter
roll data for each Colorado county each year for six years.

In February 2023, Los Angeles County confirmed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29889&F=T&&hash=bd6e13111c5b5b0194e08b3982ea9c247a57358b5303be99fd981a4cd7cb7196]
the
removal of 1,207,613 ineligible voters from its rolls since last year,
under the terms of a settlement agreement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=28192&F=T&&hash=2fb2f3be3c5dd2f347c4a52ba8f25affac2f48654381bec0cf2c8b2d1f133656]
in
a federal lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=28920&F=T&&hash=fca750e1fa40385a030d9a693ce43596adfa17018004323cf59dc19abfaaea75]
we
filed in 2017.

We settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=28646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f85eb002f4b9dfa8334e25686194139c3301a613cd8d8d197cbaf3272fc1aa08]
a federal
election integrity lawsuit against New York City after the city
removed 441,083 ineligible names from the voter rolls and promised to
take reasonable steps going forward to clean its voter registration
lists.

Kentucky
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=17111&F=T&&hash=2deb84c5ddb4737f5fce328f8ebe60aacee9ea8f78b1ca64e47172b9aebff839]
also
removed hundreds of thousands of old registrations after it entered
into a consent decree to end another Judicial Watch lawsuit.

In February 2022, we settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=26811&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9ydGgtY2Fyb2xpbmEtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a6af463059e34cb9cf1f49fe6b1177525959492193949148e1cd6c3aab20065b]
a
voter roll clean-up lawsuit against North Carolina and two of
its counties after North Carolina removed over 430,000 inactive
registrations from its voter rolls.

In March 2022, a Maryland court ruled in favor
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=27012&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtdmljdG9yeS1jb3VydC1ydWxlcy1hZ2FpbnN0LWdlcnJ5bWFuZGVyLWluLW1hcnlsYW5kLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e0e8b4f9a8733eca65c684d7935978c6c8245938c407e865d000a056917b7bbf]
of
our challenge to the Democratic state legislature’s “extreme”
congressional gerrymander.

As we can see in Maine, the fight for cleaner elections is far from
over and Judicial Watch will not rest in the battle to ensure
Americans have free and fair elections.

JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS SUPREME COURT REVIEW FOR GROUP EXPOSING ABORTION
BUSINESS

The selling fetal parts and organs from human beings killed by
abortion is a practice that many don’t want you to know about.

And those who expose the truth face punishment from the extremists
benefitting from this monstrous activity. Judicial Watch was forced
filed two _amicus curiae_ (friend of the court) briefs in the
U.S. Supreme Court on behalf of The Center for Medical Progress
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=25052&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2VudGVyZm9ybWVkaWNhbHByb2dyZXNzLm9yZy9hYm91dC11cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=226fd62ecb8563ce6dac31645bd8ba9321b02b90219e03ed6369d193f78f944f]
(CMP) and its
founder David Daleiden. CMP and David have been targeted by the
pro-abortion movement for exposing their marketing of the fetal organs
and body parts.

One brief asks for review of the Ninth Circuit Court’s affirmation
of a monetary award against CMP (_Center for Medical Progress et al. v
Planned Parent Hood et al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29961&F=T&&hash=705bb17d8cb790b96acbdf251c1fb27971c956038a3b91e285d67f6c5447a525]
(22-1168)).
The other asks for review of an injunction granted to the National
Abortion Federation that prevents CMP from publishing more
abortion-related videos (_Center for Medical Progress et al. v
National Abortion Federation_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29962&F=T&&hash=fc601c55d6f827a7911a0dccf539899a63790dc60af1e6584248c6c884dce4a3]
(22-1135)).

In 2015, The Center for Medical Progress released videos
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29963&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdXMvc2Vjb25kLXZpZGVvLXNob3dzLXBsYW5uZWQtcGFyZW50aG9vZC1kb2MtaGFnZ2xpbmctb3Zlci1wcmljZS1vZi1mZXRhbC1ib2R5LXBhcnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3e7baaca43ede0da9ce8bed7c55432cfd0b316bd177785afcb8fb5c5ccc47283]
that
exposed employees of Planned Parenthood engaging in negotiations for
the sale of fetal tissue and body parts for use in medical research.

On October 21, 2022, the United States Ninth Circuit affirmed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29964&F=T&&hash=bfe21c97df76de17a19e4b02fc4b5b77d2f6de10332908b5848c3f482e1dc644]
most
of a 2019 lower court jury verdict that declared that a series of
undercover videos produced by The Center for Medical Progress harmed
Planned Parenthood, and that CMP was not protected by the First
Amendment, requiring CMP to pay millions in damages to Planned
Parenthood.

The Judicial Watch brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29961&F=T&&hash=705bb17d8cb790b96acbdf251c1fb27971c956038a3b91e285d67f6c5447a525]
highlights
how the lower court’s awarding of monetary damages for these
accurate videos is a fundamental threat to First Amendment
protections.

Separately, in August 2022, the Ninth Circuit affirmed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29965&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9sYXcuanVzdGlhLmNvbS9jYXNlcy9mZWRlcmFsL2FwcGVsbGF0ZS1jb3VydHMvY2E5LzIxLTE1OTUzLzIxLTE1OTUzLTIwMjItMDgtMTkuaHRtbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6e8c59e4bf32acba6a7326491794f5ea3803a207dd61c1eaf27f75dffa664655]
the
ruling of a judge in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District
of California that granted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29966&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY291cnRob3VzZW5ld3MuY29tL3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDIxLzA0L05BRl9DTVAtSU5KVU5DVElPTi5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b1acf65e6f7d5bbb9983d911d43b9a1b793abcc288f9560be3fd3fe45d845d26]
National
Abortion Federation a permanent injunction barring The Center for
Medical Progress from releasing recordings and materials obtained at
National Abortion Federation’s meetings. The injunction also forbids
CMP from talking about the videos or using them in the defense of
CMP’s Founder and President David Daleiden in his criminal case.

In our brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29967&F=T&&hash=f61a0ed78539453d70b34fe93a66ca6876dbaddcb5d4a480c76428ba8a6040bd]
we
state:

> The ability to inform the public on matters of genuine and profound
> public interest is an essential aspect of free speech rights. The
> Ninth Circuit’s erroneous decision upholding the lower court’s
> permanent injunction amounts to unconstitutional viewpoint
> discrimination that must be corrected. In addition to the
> constitutional injuries Petitioners will continue to suffer, the
> public continues to suffer as well, by being purposefully prevented
> from learning the facts regarding an exceptionally important issue.
> Abortion affects not only personal choices, but national choices
> like elections, federal funding, and agency regulations. It is
> absolutely essential that the public have the full story of what
> transpired on Petitioners’ videos.
Judicial Watch argues that upholding the Ninth Circuit decision would
have a “chilling” effect on the First Amendment:

> The Ninth Circuit’s decision to uphold the district court is a
> blow to First Amendment rights that rises to the level of
> significant public importance. The Ninth Circuit’s decision to
> rubberstamp viewpoint discrimination has caused substantial adverse
> consequences for the Petitioners in this case, including an
> especially unjust and onerous monetary award, the inability to use
> the videotapes as evidence in their criminal trial, and a chilling
> of their First Amendment rights. But the damage of the Ninth
> Circuit’s decision goes far beyond the Petitioners. The decision
> has also caused substantial adverse consequences for the public in
> general. The freedom of speech logically incorporates the right to
> receive the speech as well. The right to speak is rendered
> meaningless without an audience free to listen.
Our attorneys also argue these videos and what they exposed are a
matter of public interest:

> By permanently silencing the Petitioners’ speech, the general
> public is subsequently harmed by not being able to receive the
> information contained on the videotapes. The importance of the
> information on the videotapes being suppressed by the Ninth Circuit
> cannot be overstated. As Amicus will demonstrate, the videotapes
> that were released changed the national and state landscape in
> dramatic ways. The general public was largely unaware of the
> shocking underbelly of the abortion lobby which Petitioners exposed
> through the release of the videotapes. Petitioners videos changed
> federal and state laws, spurred federal and state investigations,
> changed private business changes, and led to severe public backlash.
> By suppressing the further release of information, the Ninth Circuit
> effectively blocked access to information the public had a right to
> know. Absent this Court’s intervention, the Petitioners and public
> are left with no avenue for legal relief for the adverse
> consequences they have suffered and will continue to suffer.
We have repeatedly fought to expose the sale of human fetal tissue
obtained by killing unborn human beings through abortion.

In March 2021, we filed two separate FOIA lawsuits
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29968&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctbGF3dWl0LWhocy1mZXRhbC10aXNzdWUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7c595a8e236627048790b35878c99faffa7a8a9deaa52de5e52a85ae7b170e09]
against
Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for grant applications
related to the use of human fetal tissue.

In August 2021, we and The Center for Medical Progress (CMP)
received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=27154&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGhzLWRvY3VtZW50cy1vcmdhbi1oYXJ2ZXN0aW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=cef3d3153690ef2f062065a25d24ed198f72c3f8fdec00200bbcb672a43c9055]
from
the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services that revealed nearly
$3 million in federal funds were spent on the University of
Pittsburgh’s quest to become a “Tissue Hub” for human fetal
tissue ranging from 6 to 42 weeks gestation.

Through a separate lawsuit, in September 2021, we exposed records and
communications
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=27165&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmV3LWZkYS1yZWNvcmRzLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=bb64fb61dac7a2376ec33347d81d9842398c3554546064a6a224847f0a3be81d]
from
the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) involving “humanized
mice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64482&L=29969&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmV3LWZkYS1yZWNvcmRzLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlL13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b7078773c89d73798168da7a27e2e2e82e368213babf9a3bd1f90c110a2821cf
research with human fetal heads, organs and tissue, including
communications and contracts with human fetal tissue provider Advanced
Bioscience Resources (ABR).

The Center for Medical Progress exposed the horrors of the sales of
fetal body parts, and the courts effectively joined the abortion
industry in trying to destroy the Center for telling the truth about
this nightmarish conduct. The Supreme Court should step in and protect
the First Amendment right of citizens to expose and criticize the dark
secrets of the abortion industrial complex.

Until next week,

clean_body: Election Integrity Update! [INSIDE JW] Trump Indictment: A Naked Threat and Act of Intimidation [] The Biden administration has left the rule of law and the U.S. Constitution behind with its latest indictment of President Trump for daring to dispute the 2020 presidential election, as is his God-given right as a president, a citizen, and a candidate under state, federal and constitutional law. This sham indictment is perfectly consistent with the partisan and political abuse I suffered at the hands of Jack Smith’s prosecutors for hours as they argued with me before their grand jury using Democratic talking points on the election controversy. Let’s be blunt: This indictment is a naked threat and act of intimidation by the Democratic Party against any and all their political opponents. The message from the Biden regime is: “We will put you in jail if you dispute elections.” A free and fair 2024 election is officially impossible. And, of course, Joe Biden and his political appointee Merrick Garland at the Justice Department want to distract from the conclusive evidence of Biden’s personal corruption by trying to jail and turn Trump into a political prisoner. It is well past time for Congress to do everything possible under the law to undo this attempt to wreck our republican form of government. Let’s hope the courts finally step up and shut down this unprecedented prosecutorial abuse. In the meantime, Judicial Watch will continue to expose and hold accountable the criminal elements in the Biden administration seeking to undo our republican form of government. JUDICIAL WATCH CHALLENGES MAINE’S POLICY RESTRICTING USE OF STATEWIDE VOTER LIST States continue to resist the law requiring transparency (and reasonable clean-ups) with respect to their voter rolls. As America’s leading election law watchdog, we just filed an amicus curiae (friend of the court) brief [] against Maine’s illicit secrecy supporting the sensible decision [] of the U.S. District Court for the District of Maine, which struck down Maine’s policy restricting the use and distribution of the state’s voter registration list (Public Interest Legal Foundation v. Shenna Bellows [] (No. 23-1361). The lawsuit, citing the National Voter Registration Act [] (NVRA), is now in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the First Circuit. We point out: In the last ten years, no organization public or private has obtained more statewide settlement agreements or consent decrees against chief state election officials for violations of the NVRA. As part of its list maintenance enforcement efforts, Judicial Watch also routinely requests public records of voter registration activities in various states under Section 8(i) of the NVRA, and has sued on its own behalf and on behalf of others to enforce it. Our legal team explains: The public disclosure provision of the NVRA embodies Congress’ intent that Americans’ right to vote “must not be sacrificed to administrative chicanery, oversights, or inefficiencies.” ... The NVRA’s public disclosure provisions mandates that “State officials labor under a duty of accountability to the public in ensuring that voter lists include eligible voters and exclude ineligible ones in the most accurate manner possible.” ... The NVRA provides an avenue for citizens to check that and to ensure that only eligible registrants remain on the rolls by providing the full voter registration list open to public inspection. “Without such transparency, public confidence in the essential workings of democracy will suffer.” Judicial Watch details how Maine’s defense for their secrecy has been rejected repeatedly by other courts: No court has adopted Appellant’s [State of Maine] argument here. Rather, all courts presented with this issue have found that the voter registration list is a record subject to disclosure under the NVRA. This Court should reject Appellant’s argument. According to a national study [] conducted by Judicial Watch in 2020, Maine’s statewide registration rate was 101% of eligible voters. Federal law mandates voter roll transparency. Given Maine’s refusal to release its voter roll information, it’s reasonable to think that cleaning up voter rolls is not a priority. Dirty voter rolls can mean dirty elections. We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of its work, Judicial Watch assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements []. Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads its election law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements in dozens of states. We recently settled [] a federal election integrity lawsuit on behalf of the Illinois Conservative Union against the state of Illinois, the Illinois State Board of Elections, and its director, which grants access to the current centralized statewide list of registered voters for the state for the past 15 elections. In April 2023, Pennsylvania settled [] with us and admitted in court filings that it removed 178,258 ineligible registrations in response to communications from Judicial Watch. The settlement commits Pennsylvania and five of its counties to extensive public reporting of statistics regarding their ongoing voter roll clean-up efforts for the next five years. In March 2023, Colorado agreed [] to settle a Judicial Watch NVRA lawsuit alleging that Colorado failed to remove ineligible voters from its rolls. The settlement agreement requires Colorado to provide Judicial Watch with the most recent voter roll data for each Colorado county each year for six years. In February 2023, Los Angeles County confirmed [] the removal of 1,207,613 ineligible voters from its rolls since last year, under the terms of a settlement agreement [] in a federal lawsuit [] we filed in 2017. We settled [] a federal election integrity lawsuit against New York City after the city removed 441,083 ineligible names from the voter rolls and promised to take reasonable steps going forward to clean its voter registration lists. Kentucky [] also removed hundreds of thousands of old registrations after it entered into a consent decree to end another Judicial Watch lawsuit. In February 2022, we settled [] a voter roll clean-up lawsuit against North Carolina and two of its counties after North Carolina removed over 430,000 inactive registrations from its voter rolls. In March 2022, a Maryland court ruled in favor [] of our challenge to the Democratic state legislature’s “extreme” congressional gerrymander. As we can see in Maine, the fight for cleaner elections is far from over and Judicial Watch will not rest in the battle to ensure Americans have free and fair elections. JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS SUPREME COURT REVIEW FOR GROUP EXPOSING ABORTION BUSINESS The selling fetal parts and organs from human beings killed by abortion is a practice that many don’t want you to know about. And those who expose the truth face punishment from the extremists benefitting from this monstrous activity. Judicial Watch was forced filed two amicus curiae (friend of the court) briefs in the U.S. Supreme Court on behalf of The Center for Medical Progress [] (CMP) and its founder David Daleiden. CMP and David have been targeted by the pro-abortion movement for exposing their marketing of the fetal organs and body parts. One brief asks for review of the Ninth Circuit Court’s affirmation of a monetary award against CMP (Center for Medical Progress et al. v Planned Parent Hood et al. [] (22-1168)). The other asks for review of an injunction granted to the National Abortion Federation that prevents CMP from publishing more abortion-related videos (Center for Medical Progress et al. v National Abortion Federation [] (22-1135)). In 2015, The Center for Medical Progress released videos [] that exposed employees of Planned Parenthood engaging in negotiations for the sale of fetal tissue and body parts for use in medical research. On October 21, 2022, the United States Ninth Circuit affirmed [] most of a 2019 lower court jury verdict that declared that a series of undercover videos produced by The Center for Medical Progress harmed Planned Parenthood, and that CMP was not protected by the First Amendment, requiring CMP to pay millions in damages to Planned Parenthood. The Judicial Watch brief [] highlights how the lower court’s awarding of monetary damages for these accurate videos is a fundamental threat to First Amendment protections. Separately, in August 2022, the Ninth Circuit affirmed [] the ruling of a judge in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California that granted [] National Abortion Federation a permanent injunction barring The Center for Medical Progress from releasing recordings and materials obtained at National Abortion Federation’s meetings. The injunction also forbids CMP from talking about the videos or using them in the defense of CMP’s Founder and President David Daleiden in his criminal case. In our brief [] we state: The ability to inform the public on matters of genuine and profound public interest is an essential aspect of free speech rights. The Ninth Circuit’s erroneous decision upholding the lower court’s permanent injunction amounts to unconstitutional viewpoint discrimination that must be corrected. In addition to the constitutional injuries Petitioners will continue to suffer, the public continues to suffer as well, by being purposefully prevented from learning the facts regarding an exceptionally important issue. Abortion affects not only personal choices, but national choices like elections, federal funding, and agency regulations. It is absolutely essential that the public have the full story of what transpired on Petitioners’ videos. Judicial Watch argues that upholding the Ninth Circuit decision would have a “chilling” effect on the First Amendment: The Ninth Circuit’s decision to uphold the district court is a blow to First Amendment rights that rises to the level of significant public importance. The Ninth Circuit’s decision to rubberstamp viewpoint discrimination has caused substantial adverse consequences for the Petitioners in this case, including an especially unjust and onerous monetary award, the inability to use the videotapes as evidence in their criminal trial, and a chilling of their First Amendment rights. But the damage of the Ninth Circuit’s decision goes far beyond the Petitioners. The decision has also caused substantial adverse consequences for the public in general. The freedom of speech logically incorporates the right to receive the speech as well. The right to speak is rendered meaningless without an audience free to listen. Our attorneys also argue these videos and what they exposed are a matter of public interest: By permanently silencing the Petitioners’ speech, the general public is subsequently harmed by not being able to receive the information contained on the videotapes. The importance of the information on the videotapes being suppressed by the Ninth Circuit cannot be overstated. As Amicus will demonstrate, the videotapes that were released changed the national and state landscape in dramatic ways. The general public was largely unaware of the shocking underbelly of the abortion lobby which Petitioners exposed through the release of the videotapes. Petitioners videos changed federal and state laws, spurred federal and state investigations, changed private business changes, and led to severe public backlash. By suppressing the further release of information, the Ninth Circuit effectively blocked access to information the public had a right to know. Absent this Court’s intervention, the Petitioners and public are left with no avenue for legal relief for the adverse consequences they have suffered and will continue to suffer. We have repeatedly fought to expose the sale of human fetal tissue obtained by killing unborn human beings through abortion. In March 2021, we filed two separate FOIA lawsuits [] against Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for grant applications related to the use of human fetal tissue. In August 2021, we and The Center for Medical Progress (CMP) received records [] from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services that revealed nearly $3 million in federal funds were spent on the University of Pittsburgh’s quest to become a “Tissue Hub” for human fetal tissue ranging from 6 to 42 weeks gestation. Through a separate lawsuit, in September 2021, we exposed records and communications [] from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) involving “humanized mice [ research with human fetal heads, organs and tissue, including communications and contracts with human fetal tissue provider Advanced Bioscience Resources (ABR). The Center for Medical Progress exposed the horrors of the sales of fetal body parts, and the courts effectively joined the abortion industry in trying to destroy the Center for telling the truth about this nightmarish conduct. The Supreme Court should step in and protect the First Amendment right of citizens to expose and criticize the dark secrets of the abortion industrial complex. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2023, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

---

subject: An American HERO vs. a career politician
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
You genuinely couldn’t find a better candidate to take out a progressive Democrat than this guy | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=aa8c49a8c46a4ef7913db01fb37a11e0&_t=tgHlIm7OH395drFcqVbuunqcxdht2dEkLDb02dMVsimCgTC07Tqfq4AIieXcN_gw9X2XFd42zrmsKn_Ful6uXR6fNXn9tUDJOALuQGsqhHU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=aa8c49a8c46a4ef7913db01fb37a11e0&_t=tgHlIm7OH395drFcqVbuunqcxdht2dEkLDb02dMVsimCgTC07Tqfq4AIieXcN_gw9X2XFd42zrmsKn_Ful6uXR6fNXn9tUDJOALuQGsqhHU%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aa8c49a8c46a4ef7913db01fb37a11e0&_e=lgcmjwU_KD0lFvAhaCdM34YQQgWuzo5R4wLhpgoFg73ic-m8SloFP_CdPh2rSbqBb-PX5BHY-O_Z-U5nje_EvqUtevhPeLasWt7XI2iVJQ7H_W3-WPRpvDnV2tRnCH62n_IwnU-JWgvpFqSR--Sm2JiJLqBfpsODq231FTkDJdo2-WAhzwyYIjFUrVRTWY1qbzCGnMKTF_yaJyyJmW61mIvzgMjV_TE072yyIx5wwWXfUkDELexCGcEdDU55AbNDqn1sAcvLQBrhK-XSRGXY-czLuR_wKUpH3zZ-Rx4qBimamoJ7HV4uc6PdnP-Z_jb8Q1N_GI7rXEqKMd1yVJ0LAigEw39JC03rT9Xmu78PI6FX-ZaSS9eCjxS8D_WbQyJ2Sl6te7nMTbgRNt_gHG0KiQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Peter, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc286cupsrmflghcfol8m6j1ttl0o66i90ao4ffo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvf83iekj69icg6cd73468h2vvnn008lkh1t4j40_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbuej32e8eb6vjlf9e6cjm1djbju8v0tdkn7so5g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgskkojkv8kjutf0r83ahodldnl2cf27o7s5s5d8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgkus8bnoj1koc2shprtfr29av9f3r7ssrclebrg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chgmeoj0cth238h1e8he4933cji64oj4sdj69oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7gob9tvt8j1cuv05aldaafnlgkr5hbav3ntfk58_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs)_

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeo63k8fu5i3v065p3ogjs0mif2o7pcqe8tdvl10_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or1cjh2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqbd7d1f67vp6gse7c8te0ohu2v4jjns9soqau8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or1cjh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7p9ibq6a0p7n482ljoeu8v1d8lf9hu95cdk4eig_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or1cjh2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze7kc4gj9n5l9n2p3u0mugcg3he538p792qboee0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi3d8ckg4h5ghra5jkuvajvkuunj6rlsiur1rqdo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk1d8heg0hilib33gg3aprrcuh6n93hkjpjjbqdg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6ik3vni358ltn3rdqlruoebi6h78v6aser0of6o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update

body:

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z18av1eoh9tev41arb08quh2smtdarii2eccljlg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpjvl9brudi545dr2loht3lcc2p76n85dpu16h8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjepej7am2ghn91cbractqe8jl2db4gfshd09kro_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9h69or6cjh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Religious Liberty Survey
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6t4n2d31m112dneuqei4t5llm9mf9g4gisj3m7g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j68ob0clh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zllh3lng474rlb7n97da86nuqc9ci9kig5bapsig_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j68ob0clh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znjaasfd5f2sv75n26sq1p57sm9mo75ubotpt4j0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j68ob0clh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk45egu7ch9nv2jb32blg634i3uaokku0b8qemp0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j68ob0clh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

subject: Reminder: Tre Schumacher is McDow campaigns new chief spokesperson

Grassroots is at the heart

|
### Tre Schumacher joins as chief spokesperson & advisor

Tre was a high school student when he reached out to Stephen's former employer [NCBA CLUSA](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eMaGUYlix99B_RN2p-XrOuv6FL5-9kNXhzI7VOa6nLLhb60Rng1czUS18ErgslKi6U4DyKkoQbr2xsXxeHHPd2zYcE4OxnrzeYXQDuz3Dw4YpDsXmX8Vzcxc3xEGDBlwAeT7g9pJLOWCgmrUQTtNWQ==&c=RHxwsWWbLspDHF6SCnd_srmob1NuFPnyO19qwV9C8X6B_h1fK-0tgA==&ch=fbOCBJRekJGME1AucLvA1ErFp1WswQEFhbh0S0gC14-s9uw7m64Xmg==). There, he spoke with Stephen and members of the team about the power of co-operative businesses. Tre wanted to learn more about the co-op model and was subsequently invited to attend the 2018 Co-op IMPACT Conference. He was sponsored by DotCo-op.
After engaging the co-op community he went on to run campaigns on the local, state and federal levels, as well as work on issue based campaigns. Tre also brings experience in leading campaign operations, grassroots organizing, and digital media.
When Tre is not overachieving he is a student at Widener University Delaware Law.
Tre will take over and assist the candidate with outreach to the community, media, and build upon the grassroots strategy.
Already making an impact
During Tre's first meeting the team was discussing what the community was lacking - specifically the business community.
Tre Schumacher, Chief Spokesperson:
"All organizations have to perform basic tasks such as hire and promote good employees, fire bad employees, pay taxes, administer employee benefits, and obtain and maintain licenses, permits, insurance, and financing. Let's make Maryland the best place to do business by making these processes as simple, quick, cheap, and easy as possible - and let's impact ALL businesses in America at the same time."
This goal starts with 100% broadband for all residents and businesses throughout the Western part of the district. Tre and team McDow vow to work with Governor Moore to ensure the 6th district gets what it needs.
Tre created the vision for an additional campaign slogan: Let's make Maryland the BEST place to do business!
Visit: [https://www.mcdowforcongress.com/team-4](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eMaGUYlix99B_RN2p-XrOuv6FL5-9kNXhzI7VOa6nLLhb60Rng1czahu4FGyhuKcrW2PSIo73LAqrPXas8doRTzPg6na4bkPvrNFlVDTLSc_yiwsUIAW71xhLU7Vz7jkLgh72wyPA7yf_60Z8K7A2ltedjrWMdy6q4Nj5oxw9gc=&c=RHxwsWWbLspDHF6SCnd_srmob1NuFPnyO19qwV9C8X6B_h1fK-0tgA==&ch=fbOCBJRekJGME1AucLvA1ErFp1WswQEFhbh0S0gC14-s9uw7m64Xmg==)

# A few of Stephen's 22 policy positions
---
|
---
The Cannabis Safe Law \- Does not intend to suggest an additional penalty should be added for those caring for a child who ingests edibles. A parent or caregiver of a child would automatically be reviewed by Child Protective Services or the courts. Stephen wants to protect children in the same way society has the expectation of car seats for infants and fire alarms in homes. Advocacy groups like American Academy of Pediatrics may support new prohibitions if cases of accidental cannabis ingestion keep occurring. It can also be said that Stephen is protecting children, the user and cannabis industry! [Click to read resolution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eMaGUYlix99B_RN2p-XrOuv6FL5-9kNXhzI7VOa6nLLhb60Rng1czaelOh0TaUTNd5yd1qAhD5xAZfJtDKZUuDcxdS6R6KTWl0ARlvmCZGAtjRcE6CmUYGuxAaxzeTovGD9FkaApM3FAJrHcaJ26wZY50bmltpYv2Re5nVwL5q-gUp5wYFfV1Mz3C60X4P2d&c=RHxwsWWbLspDHF6SCnd_srmob1NuFPnyO19qwV9C8X6B_h1fK-0tgA==&ch=fbOCBJRekJGME1AucLvA1ErFp1WswQEFhbh0S0gC14-s9uw7m64Xmg==)
---
|
---
The National ACH/EFT Transfer Error & Mediation Law \- The intent is to bring consistency, safe conclusions, and a formal process for resolving cases where two unsuspecting parties cross paths due to an electronic bank transfer error. [Click to read resolution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eMaGUYlix99B_RN2p-XrOuv6FL5-9kNXhzI7VOa6nLLhb60Rng1czaelOh0TaUTNd5yd1qAhD5xAZfJtDKZUuDcxdS6R6KTWl0ARlvmCZGAtjRcE6CmUYGuxAaxzeTovGD9FkaApM3FAJrHcaJ26wZY50bmltpYv2Re5nVwL5q-gUp5wYFfV1Mz3C60X4P2d&c=RHxwsWWbLspDHF6SCnd_srmob1NuFPnyO19qwV9C8X6B_h1fK-0tgA==&ch=fbOCBJRekJGME1AucLvA1ErFp1WswQEFhbh0S0gC14-s9uw7m64Xmg==)

---
|
---
Character Development Legislation \- The intent is to continue the work Stephen did with Dr. Edwin Powell during his DC City Council run in 2014. Stephen would like to add diversity through shared purpose and ensure young people have basic home economics skills. [Click to read original legislation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eMaGUYlix99B_RN2p-XrOuv6FL5-9kNXhzI7VOa6nLLhb60Rng1czaelOh0TaUTNd5yd1qAhD5xAZfJtDKZUuDcxdS6R6KTWl0ARlvmCZGAtjRcE6CmUYGuxAaxzeTovGD9FkaApM3FAJrHcaJ26wZY50bmltpYv2Re5nVwL5q-gUp5wYFfV1Mz3C60X4P2d&c=RHxwsWWbLspDHF6SCnd_srmob1NuFPnyO19qwV9C8X6B_h1fK-0tgA==&ch=fbOCBJRekJGME1AucLvA1ErFp1WswQEFhbh0S0gC14-s9uw7m64Xmg==)

# COOP News (Global) Stephen Archives

A group of co-operators based in the East Midlands came together on 31 March to explore solutions to food poverty. Organised by [Co-operatives East Midlands](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eMaGUYlix99B_RN2p-XrOuv6FL5-9kNXhzI7VOa6nLLhb60Rng1czUS18ErgslKiRaf_4ObhVvYnikFWyf41GIZZMdOmi21jB7FfafzrmCzVN3rQbeavIy_EoH_IJpX7Gl8-i99TWZjessknEC4LiQ==&c=RHxwsWWbLspDHF6SCnd_srmob1NuFPnyO19qwV9C8X6B_h1fK-0tgA==&ch=fbOCBJRekJGME1AucLvA1ErFp1WswQEFhbh0S0gC14-s9uw7m64Xmg==), the event focused on the role of co-operatives in promoting food justice. Tre wanted to learn more about the co-op model and was subsequently invited to attend the 2018 Co-op IMPACT Conference. He was sponsored by DotCo-op. After engaging the co-op community he went on to run campaigns on the local, state and federal levels, as well as work on issue based campaigns. Tre also brings experience in leading campaign operations, grassroots organizing, and digital media. When Tre is not overachieving he is a student at Widener University Delaware Law. Tre will take over and assist the candidate with outreach to the community, media, and build upon the grassroots strategy. Already making an impact During Tre's first meeting the team was discussing what the community was lacking - specifically the business community. Tre Schumacher, Chief Spokesperson: "All organizations have to perform basic tasks such as hire and promote good employees, fire bad employees, pay taxes, administer employee benefits, and obtain and maintain licenses, permits, insurance, and financing. Let's make Maryland the best place to do business by making these processes as simple, quick, cheap, and easy as possible - and let's impact ALL businesses in America at the same time." This goal starts with 100% broadband for all residents and businesses throughout the Western part of the district. Tre and team McDow vow to work with Governor Moore to ensure the 6th district gets what it needs. Tre created the vision for an additional campaign slogan: Let's make Maryland the BEST place to do business! Visit: == | | | | A few of Stephen's 22 policy positions | The Cannabis Safe Law \- Does not intend to suggest an additional penalty should be added for those caring for a child who ingests edibles. A parent or caregiver of a child would automatically be reviewed by Child Protective Services or the courts. Stephen wants to protect children in the same way society has the expectation of car seats for infants and fire alarms in homes. Advocacy groups like American Academy of Pediatrics may support new prohibitions if cases of accidental cannabis ingestion keep occurring. It can also be said that Stephen is protecting children, the user and cannabis industry! == | The National ACH/EFT Transfer Error & Mediation Law \- The intent is to bring consistency, safe conclusions, and a formal process for resolving cases where two unsuspecting parties cross paths due to an electronic bank transfer error. == | Character Development Legislation \- The intent is to continue the work Stephen did with Dr. Edwin Powell during his DC City Council run in 2014. Stephen would like to add diversity through shared purpose and ensure young people have basic home economics skills. == | | | Taking co-ops to the Capitol: Meet the movement leader standing for US Congress By Rebecca Harvey == | | | What drives someone to be a politician? Stephen Reginald McDow II, running as a Democratic candidate for Congress in Maryland District 6, says for him "it's about service to people ... and a burning desire to help improve my community". Read article at Co-op News (Coming Soon) | | | COOP News (Global) Stephen Archives | | | A group of co-operators based in the East Midlands came together on 31 March to explore solutions to food poverty. Organised by ==, the event focused on the role of co-operatives in promoting food justice. == | | Co-operative development in the USA has a unique set a challenges, largely underpinned by the sheer scale of geographies, politics and histories. On the east coast, the Keystone Development Center (==) has been taking on these challenges for 20 years.. == == | | | From Stephen's Vault | Check out Stephen McDow and his mother, #actress "Ms. Spence" (Wanda Spence) on the show, The RoundTable Talkshow with ==, as they discuss #entrepreneurship, #coops, #COVID19, and community! Ms. Hardie is a former candidate for == and the former president of the ==. | == | | | Implicit Bias Test w Friends! | When you are in a private safe space, and (or) with trusted friends, take the implicit bias test. Thanks to Devin from NAACP in Garrett County for having == give a fabulous talk. | | == | | | Stephen's Legacy of Service == (==) | == | | | | | == == == == == == | | | | | | | | | | | Committee To Elect Stephen McDow | 4009 Tranquility Court, Monrovia, MD 21770 | | Sent by mailto:votestephen@mcdowforcongress.com powered by

These races don’t get as much national coverage or cable news time, but they are just as important. https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=23187ea34045a0bb5132ec27860985b20143d014f994539beba7ea255dfb7c934c95fbf3d830a7868c8e3f32cfe1fd5c4ca846f456e3c002 I hope you’ll pledge today to vote in your local elections and that you vote like America’s future depends on it. name: Kash Patel
subject: This J6 news will make your jaw drop
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1k93hhpman2ggesmguv57jmnchglmi6b9ukhe0g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsfin8bfnttju6m4agog3lidj0be9rk6tms2p2m0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3cuqgekvasgp1bts26ie0h3ik5oocad8rbqinn0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

[ _**Donate $50**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8nitr1vti9jiqg0lmthd9gttde2ouhq6l0nlteo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $100**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk30uer8kr80sj4t716ofksk2s0i8lr6q2qqbc9o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $250**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z78cumd5mh69hg70o599c6uo1dorldrvgsk0p6c8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $500**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvnj8h211oa4f11h16ejqn2ft4k1jusgum5jage0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $1,000**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi9857q719pm803b3vd52orksrc9hu41t04es800_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)**
[ _**Donate $2,500**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt7bapiatl21tgak8qb77je3u4te1enpdqml9a8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)
[** _**Donate Any Amount**_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqc4ck0imgb8r5mjougln4an2dhn922m58i48ad8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1bgvk00ca9oele3shrpkmngca4qhddfbi4upfno_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlp16fl6g1bv5u0gs0nmg60pf49q0epdg28jgn4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

Friend,

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.
