name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkodgkoqpd5bpp4jm28qf8uglp3au1av37739jt8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6b9v1i3u0gorn9u661ggbn4m4ksemp4gu38a64g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1clh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaobomf5aaolf324hcfii4js88ds2n419hsmj4po_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zokqbliksdhbt9nhdlfmidrqi5gga3ogi70ahb30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p31cth64p3246h22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zba03fsunt6a1gb0aibsj0n5m8to9jqnqllssmdo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1clh2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp6qd4rrkabqdpcpufoqgnhcg7frpsp4avj6klm0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---
| | [I'LL CHIP IN, MARCO!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5pbm5iqrdugkkckhpru92b513n30vjbl5kca818_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!")
---
_**[The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdjsuks37116m1hftu7j8gd3jt6pbl8i7l5ln2n0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.")**_
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**

**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**

Marco Rubio

| | |

* * *

You can claim a signed copy of Marco Rubio's new book, _Decades of Decadence_ , today!
| [CLAIM A SIGNED COPY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn6gjv4j57gbsvduaodtd8k6635sn3sej8or4og8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs "CLAIM A SIGNED COPY")
---

These signed versions are only available to top conservatives, and you are one of them. We don't want you to miss out on this awesome opportunity.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z27t5578k0vf691jrooba0jnfn8eq2vh7b8lo478_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcugmb1h7gsrganuvo1hr271unahbrgeadllcaro_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9j6coj1c5h2bs "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**

We don't want you to miss out on this awesome opportunity. "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:" We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country. The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next: 1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other. 2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy. name: Team Gallagher
subject: 2 ways to Drain the Swamp
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
It really is that simple, Peter.
---
| | | | | | | | | | **More than 400.** That's how many former members of Congress are currently registered as lobbyists, Peter. This insanely high number shows how broken Washington is. Members are elected to office to serve the people, but once they leave the doors of the Capitol, they're free to immediately serve the special interests. **_[THIS MUST CHANGE >>](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=29a7c16760897d14864ca5a5ca7907dbe19ae1f1859c582aa44dfa40c0c33e564b8a829e7a37154be66224ad089088db52e5f148bc0d052b "THIS MUST CHANGE >>")_** Mike has made it clear: We need to change _how_ Washington works - and we can do it in a few easy ways: 1️⃣ Extend lobbying bans from 2 to 5 years for former members of Congress and officials appointed by the president. 2️⃣ Eliminate taxpayer-funded pensions for former members of Congress. **Want to see this implemented?[Sign the petition now to stand with Mike.](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=29a7c16760897d14ba1a30c5ac667a9e911b72943b87bf2d13ec08f4f8a1692ee0fad5fc0275c290b9f160cb23b70f6d54c2cc521f4e99e2 "Sign the petition now to stand with Mike.")**

clean_body: It really is that simple, Peter. | | | | | | | | | | More than 400. That's how many former members of Congress are currently registered as lobbyists, Peter. This insanely high number shows how broken Washington is. Members are elected to office to serve the people, but once they leave the doors of the Capitol, they're free to immediately serve the special interests. "THIS MUST CHANGE >>" Mike has made it clear: We need to change how Washington works - and we can do it in a few easy ways: 1️⃣ Extend lobbying bans from 2 to 5 years for former members of Congress and officials appointed by the president. 2️⃣ Eliminate taxpayer-funded pensions for former members of Congress. Want to see this implemented? "Sign the petition now to stand with Mike." | | | | Government officials should serve the people, not themselves, Peter. -Team Gallagher | No one has fought harder to make America safer and more secure than Mike Gallagher. He's taking on the CCP so American principles lead the way in the 21st century. "Chip in now to fuel his fight." | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. |

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663269%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v%2ffP0PTrfI4lbPoEkSU5mQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663269%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v%2ffP0PTrfI4lbPoEkSU5mQ&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663260%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QYrC5CWJ2m6JqAWdGH9WUQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663261%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gazfkugGorRfxUsFFSf%2fwg&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663262%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bximbY9oPR%2brXceIVdtNnw&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663264%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rlVVVp5FpawOIgdCgjCPqQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663275%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N8HJxE7eIO88RANrB5r50A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663276%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8IhOtMzVKZF74l4s%2fNqzpQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663277%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YiBs1Gj5DGFfl4HJOqWqkg&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663279%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XxIY7lGMMM1z8qJ%2foOQxWw&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663270%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QUI9a2FHt0s8gN%2fqNZywKQ&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663271%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hmvw0uDhdsmzfpoUXAZItw&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663272%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n3I7C6uc9%2bUiFg3ZtB3XRw&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: ConservativeFWD
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3v6b6bee5o7hhn8tjcorrjcc9f6klcdfpe34bb0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s33cqp66t3mm6obap9mm9oe2p5nm4r7attkmqp6edln66q68sjn6qo7dcbn6urrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj35d5jc5jr4c366lgb6o37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm9p32c5g62oj0c8iv0)
| | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvd03qfg4052nobo2ofcq24rdd26kcen44lirfg0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9gm0ob2c1h2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zajahn9iuj0cad8ekjlm74j7sr5dkoscn6liujag_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9gm0ob2c1h2bs)
---
| | In this [**25-page commentary**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhmmveublqc1uc0odpq5spda0jfdk1ivrs162vf8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9gm0ob2c1h2bs), "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8a9so0krae0bdpf9419l01rnh4q4d7npueh2koo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9gm0ob2c1h2bs)**
Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

We know it’s a lot to ask for in the midst of record-high inflation and the Biden recession, but just $5 shows that you’re on our side! JOIN TIM’S GROWING TEAM OF SUPPORTERS The choice is yours, Peter. You can either take action now to save our country before we lose it forever or you can ignore our plea for help and roll the dice with another four years of Joe Biden. It’s your decision. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and text messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from Trust in the Mission PAC. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills
%recipient.md5_hash%
| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=348a287f5d224149bc53d2b8eea9acca&_e=tVgIWrFLm_aqAVujLmERf20pbpHwx5BHbEYRx8MY3RQMG8nxGDxwYCzag19DKkqsHCImUmgg3uUa65AjBT_iMSn3Zha2btWTzx9Aiq74TFgWmOqVsPtXzFqHx03zuu5161Q93WHh1qokP0978VTO9eP8RW-Lf1aWL8UhJi4cgsIWmom1osyuRUNemW43HVYkv9AYd5JCtPI1ywC_vfyZUvD7KR2KJTOQIZr97Dl0LAjkuRpI97nmZhWjd_FsI3Vdpb2vt6fxAKaqUzp0aYj_eW8qqS9C-4gG3FtBoh5xyVEPT2x8ciSLcjqq6Qw5JQlHW5_lXRTiAh22QXgcA_rBz-p5YxNgdf5ZD-B20DtyTZzpoCDovT3dQih6WSRgrckToyXzz7SWJcpzIfhkQPvXXdLfeylFqu9aH9RU5hbFP-0%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=348a287f5d224149bc53d2b8eea9acca&_e=tVgIWrFLm_aqAVujLmERf20pbpHwx5BHbEYRx8MY3RQMG8nxGDxwYCzag19DKkqsHCImUmgg3uUa65AjBT_iMSn3Zha2btWTzx9Aiq74TFgWmOqVsPtXzFqHx03zuu5161Q93WHh1qokP0978VTO9eP8RW-Lf1aWL8UhJi4cgsIWmom1osyuRUNemW43HVYkv9AYd5JCtPI1ywC_vfyZUvD7KR2KJTOQIZr97Dl0LAjkuRpI97nmZhWjd_FsI3VdsRNIgKZuctGNw4qV3Pruf9YLfR1jWUOw0VHwASYbdkO8ZGuAWZWOA-NOjs3i2x-QekRlUS1gj3uMECbmyzjq-xRLeozGqTgjs4okYwQu1_ULcBIJag7oAgGBBq2soMnw903qV6Itqj_CrPD0qpmWzhIzJ_OHHqUgr5I9RUz3vCw%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: They’re laughing at us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I don’t have long, so I’ll cut to the chase

| |
---
| | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zao17iq82rsml970te9n5ljr675imrqpe8hnn5f8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9gm2o32c1h2bs)
---
I don't have long, so I'll cut to the chase: Joe Biden has made our national security the laughingstock of the international community.

_**When the Chinese Communist Party invaded our skies, Biden ordered our airmen to stand down.

When the Chinese Communist Party was caught red-handed buying up farmland next to our military bases, Biden couldn't be bothered.

When the Chinese Communist Party threatened our allies, Biden hung them out to dry.**_

The CCP represents the greatest threat to American freedom and democracy since the heyday of the Soviet Union. If we're going to stand a chance, we need Reagan strong Republicans in charge, not weak, woke leftists.

I'm collecting signatures to demand that the White House take the Chinese Communist threat seriously - and I'd like to personally invite you to be among the first 1000 patriots to sign. If you stand for peace through American strength, add your name below:

_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z449c88ni894m89mb8q6cb5fileoa3qqiih6ar7g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9gm2o32c1h2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

name: Full Mag News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=753334d03e174381bd319b69fc4bdde2&_e=5BMshyZX7_75fAp1yO-_6B4lg6zA0Qy9MMnDiJG9GpGF6CwpGrXMHge6QEU2SjV2yqrUEgGVQ-oCS8MMNxOnAnxaVyunLm7ih3sInaKCSTXEwVlFN30oiY9BBMTFZTnU6ISpa_VcbHxTb6JoGj_pNJnmrQyPtH-jnodpp0KYHvAySWglvQ-c8d-JxDVy1xNXoNH17HfN1OJMPzeBwXhFeslpjwgpDyOfn4HHy_loLxLZoxCoVSY2cD8uCx7K6fd_jo4h9HWeEXObWkP35S2u3t_GIQxcKjmoczCRaJDjKdHTWBwwdodVvg0CeVUwWh_8ObJ_WaoPnZU2vloRZ7j49ZdzACzx1j9h0bmSt5bVsK1K7L6vcxEmhGbJOSmUDzywX0wAjCcrWyMUGs1Q53LZno6yYFTceq1_pYUzKQF9Elk%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=753334d03e174381bd319b69fc4bdde2&_e=5BMshyZX7_75fAp1yO-_6B4lg6zA0Qy9MMnDiJG9GpGF6CwpGrXMHge6QEU2SjV2yqrUEgGVQ-oCS8MMNxOnAnxaVyunLm7ih3sInaKCSTXEwVlFN30oiY9BBMTFZTnU6ISpa_VcbHxTb6JoGj_pNJnmrQyPtH-jnodpp0KYHvAySWglvQ-c8d-JxDVy1xNXoNH17HfN1OJMPzeBwXhFeslpjwgpDyOfn4HHy_loLxLZoxCoVSY2cD8uCx7K6fd_jo4h9HWeEXObWkP35S2u3jQy-tScyFSwoUe2bQlTvQcXIb--YWtbRsri2_waXUqo1B9G20FEVa2LFfHLp7WJBriZOJETtzqwsMWD7y3RVqLEi_-PxWv4IE63iCHuWHaMmIWxG4TUR3Xth9h1GOVEEXruWGcgmwGU9KmQn5IdYno%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=753334d03e174381bd319b69fc4bdde2&_e=5BMshyZX7_75fAp1yO-_6B4lg6zA0Qy9MMnDiJG9GpGF6CwpGrXMHge6QEU2SjV2yqrUEgGVQ-oCS8MMNxOnAnxaVyunLm7ih3sInaKCSTXEwVlFN30oiY9BBMTFZTnU6ISpa_VcbHxTb6JoGj_pNJnmrQyPtH-jnodpp0KYHvAySWglvQ-c8d-JxDVy1xNXoNH17HfN1OJMPzeBwXhFeslpjwgpDyOfn4HHy_loLxLZoxCoVSY2cD8uCx7K6fd_jo4h9HWeEXObWkP35S2u3qgQacf2raNMQYwYCAvF7hmz3vhGuX22Jh9Jr9q7ajxR0c3CHYmmp9OfC3OVZpFXSC3wODsqFidvCOB8Kxhn9NvCT23aGp-LdxsKeun8yO1to3IkQ4nFMRSIIpqZHO_Nzhe7ux2PhlnaF3YF62f55yA%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7714ae14ac9c4bffb51edd458e867250&_e=BaJKYMOwG86MZ8QTGfuxDu86_VLA91-SHwNLFo5SwgWl5ZJs8gQR7rrlLEZ2NHkEhnpNCxw_dmlgg9l2cVpvDG4ifyrTVNAwSli4voIH1BAglvEX1hBPshZ4U6tT_-5LCfg2Oxz0LaAKu0hF3e0-hHj6AHhZBLlQM38C9KtPYseQARlBkGf3ux16wooqZ_4DAZ9chvnMpTdMlgSiLFi7PJzWvFLPXG_3X_L7aAPYnJO7Gylqt6ya7Va08VASxSwiHNe3KwGZsOXJZosoG1vvS_KeI5N5sTn74gHLMA-IkXDRmB8NKcPeRmzKSdeHFGcWe4-_DZvQNOUQKuhgnDaSBUr_xvUPfJqAcsC-64fw1xpTBDPF8nzekGBU84YumqsGv94HEWPUQ3dpjuvmSV6hjw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7714ae14ac9c4bffb51edd458e867250&_e=BaJKYMOwG86MZ8QTGfuxDu86_VLA91-SHwNLFo5SwgWl5ZJs8gQR7rrlLEZ2NHkEhnpNCxw_dmlgg9l2cVpvDG4ifyrTVNAwSli4voIH1BAglvEX1hBPshZ4U6tT_-5LCfg2Oxz0LaAKu0hF3e0-hHj6AHhZBLlQM38C9KtPYseQARlBkGf3ux16wooqZ_4DAZ9chvnMpTdMlgSiLFi7PJzWvFLPXG_3X_L7aAPYnJO7Gylqt6ya7Va08VASxSwiNbRHDRIxby9USs8AfixVxhOdrNpZ34vGU4IvoCVuhIzxRZJQq4QbH2XojlalPtyaMBAs2nE7_Rj5lTexoDPL-6z_0K8HyZCDVJtwagPCTbuyDL6YRRjCiP366bZz84xjApvVSHd9sgJ1N77a-ermOw%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7714ae14ac9c4bffb51edd458e867250&_e=BaJKYMOwG86MZ8QTGfuxDu86_VLA91-SHwNLFo5SwgWl5ZJs8gQR7rrlLEZ2NHkEhnpNCxw_dmlgg9l2cVpvDG4ifyrTVNAwSli4voIH1BAglvEX1hBPshZ4U6tT_-5LCfg2Oxz0LaAKu0hF3e0-hHj6AHhZBLlQM38C9KtPYseQARlBkGf3ux16wooqZ_4DAZ9chvnMpTdMlgSiLFi7PJzWvFLPXG_3X_L7aAPYnJO7Gylqt6ya7Va08VASxSwi16XwX-42AXPSQfGwL5ufFqujKK1Bs6B7fS4C1HDcgU_mKCzu4h2S9QOXyGlleuj4o_6dXTgqVPtntFr3Y_nucN0QTjg_iqbycEOCHWbwtAFkFvBOWftEqJdQz9hzDlcFT37lkqj39FEtM7AUDmxjRA%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:

Hi Friend, it's Tim Scott!

I'm sorry, but I'm out of time and I'm out of options.

**First:** I announced my Presidential campaign to restore faith in America and save the American Dream.

**Then:** We launched TV ads in Iowa and New Hampshire and I've been traveling all over the country to earn the support of voters like you.

**Now: I need to hit my Donor Goal before the end of week deadline! This could make or break my campaign.**

name: Tim Scott
subject: Steve Harvey & Whoopi Goldberg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Friend, I've been doing some thinking.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z05i38urf6lj4phos4v9rdls0treunjef3985s28_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9gmeor4cdh2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend, I've been doing some thinking.

First, Whoopi Goldberg said I had "Clarence Thomas syndrome."
Then, Joy Behar said I'm a Republican because I "don't get" the idea of racism."
And now, Steve Harvey said I would be better off as a " liberal candidate or a Democratic candidate... a black person will not represent that Republican Party."

**These comments and attacks don 't hurt me, Friend. I've been called worse.**
__I 've been called a token. I've been called a prop. And I've been called the n word. Nothing will stop me from moving forward and fighting for what I believe!__
I believe that in America, you're defined by the content of your character, NOT the color of your skin. You can go as high and far as your character and work ethic will take you. The truth of my life disproves the racist lies of the radical Left. America is NOT a racist country. It's the greatest country in the world!

**We need to make it our mission to grow the Republican Party without diluting our values. We need to go where we're not invited and share our story with anyone who will listen.**

**_[It's why I'm running for President, and it's why I need your support. If you believe in America and are committed to ensuring our best days are ahead of us, then I ask you to please chip in to my campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm22qlbgcn85g0fdq00pfncrkpshdqj1q2sv2qe0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c9gmeor4cdh2bs "It’s why I’m running for President, and it’s why I need your support. If you believe in America and are committed to ensuring our best days are ahead of us, then I ask you to please chip in to my campaign.")_**

God Bless.

-Tim

| | Picture this: a mama polar bear watches her cubs play. They stumble and roll through the snow. But all mama bear can think about is their next meal. Her **hunting grounds are MELTING AWAY** and if things don’t turn around soon, **she and her cubs will starve.** The Arctic is melting _**twice as fast**_ as anywhere else on Earth. The climate crisis is hurtling the remaining 900 Southern Beaufort polar bears toward extinction – and **time is running out.** Meanwhile, cruise companies like Carnival Corp are sending their massive cruise vessels through these fragile Arctic habitats. The ships **spit climate-warming emission** into the air, **dump wastewater** into our oceans, and **scare away food** for local people and polar bears. [**We need 1,381 more people from your state to hit our goal to convince the EPA to rein in greedy cruise companies and protect the Arctic before it’s too late! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914760?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914761?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, let me give you an idea of just how much destruction these giant ships are capable of generating. Carnival Corp carried **11,000 tons of hazardous heavy fuel** through Arctic waters _**in a single year. **_
Arctic Indigenous communities face the repercussions of these industry as well. Not only is their home melting, but cruise ships scare away fish and other marine wildlife that these communities rely on for food and sustenance. **But the cruise corporations don’t care as long as their profits increase. **
[**Please, Friend – PROTECT THE ARCTIC and send your message to the EPA right now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914762?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: The Times takes a look at Mississippi – update from your favorite conservative think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11570969?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Having moved from London to Mississippi, I feel that I've taken a step up.** But I am often surprised at what many folks back in England – and elsewhere - think about this great state.

**So, I wrote this article in T _he Times_ to set the record straight. **I hope you enjoy it!
---
|
---
| **Everybody can learn from Mississippi**
**Douglas Carswell explains what lessons we can learn from the US**
---
| What comes to mind when you think of Mississippi? Steamboats on the river? Mississippi mud pie, maybe? Does America’s Deep South conjure up images of cotton fields and backwoods poverty, full of folk who subsist on God, guns and grits? You might be surprised to learn that Mississippi, the poorest state in the US, is now wealthier than Britain.

Mississippi’s GDP per capita last year was $47,190, slightly above the UK’s approximately $45,000, though still well below the overall American average of $70,000. While the UK’s per capita GDP has stagnated for the past 15 years, Mississippi’s has been rising rapidly to the point that it has just overtaken the UK.
---
|
---
_Beans on toast or chicken on waffles?_
| For decades Mississippi was in the doldrums and median household income was low. It was the poster child for US deprivation, home to catfish, cotton, a spot of forestry and little else in the way of economic activity.

Three years ago I moved to Jackson to run a free-market think tank, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy. I made the move after 12 years as the MP for Clacton-on-Sea in Essex, first as a Conservative and then as Ukip’s first elected MP, after I left the Tory party and won a by-election. Brexit was why I went into politics, and in 2020, we left the EU.

Why did I then come to Mississippi? I came because I saw a great opportunity to achieve change.

Over the past 40 years, those southern US states that have embraced free-market reforms, such as Texas, Tennessee and Florida, have done remarkably well. Helping Mississippi adopt similar reforms would almost guarantee something similar. Frustrated by the inability of those who run Britain to change much for the better, I was attracted to America.

In the US there is an appetite for improvement, and those you vote for — especially at the state level — have the power to deliver it. That is why Mississippi is now overtaking Britain. In recent years the state has used its freedom to make bold free-market reforms. Last year it introduced the largest tax cut in its history, slashing income tax to a flat 4 per cent from 2026. Only a dozen or so US states have a lower personal tax burden. An average middle-class family with a household salary of $50,000 might pay total federal and state income taxes in the region of 15 per cent, or $7,676. In the UK, the equivalent rate would be 23 per cent.

For years the nepotistic “good ol’ boy” system handed out public sector jobs that were often comfortable sinecures. Now, in Mississippi, politicians compete to reduce the size of the public payroll. Ten years ago there were 649 public employees for every 10,000 people in the state. Today it’s down to 606 per 10,000. Thanks to these and other reforms, Mississippi is starting to prosper, with per capita income up 25 per cent over the past five years. In Britain, real wages and living standards have not grown since 2007.
---
|
---
_Truck or Mini?_
| Life is far from perfect, of course, and there is still plenty of inequality: 31 per cent of black residents live in poverty. Unemployment levels in the state are similar to those in the UK — about 3.5 per cent — but black unemployment is higher at 5.7 per cent. Nonetheless, attitudes have changed beyond recognition — for the better.

What my time in Mississippi has made abundantly clear to me is that the kind of change that has brought about such sharp improvements here in recent years simply isn’t possible in Britain today. Brexit, for heaven’s sake, was nearly nullified by Britain’s administrative state — and that had a direct democratic mandate from millions. What chance is there of any lesser reforms being let through without a revolutionary change in the way Britain is governed?

Until a leader emerges prepared to take on the obstructive mandarinate the way Margaret Thatcher took on and destroyed the National Union of Mineworkers, politics will remain stylized posturing and not much more. Britain could learn a thing or two from Mississippi.
---
|
---
| Mississippi is on the up – but we could be doing so much better if we had even more free market reform.

Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we are spear heading the fight to eliminate the state income tax, combat ‘woke’ ideology in the classroom and embrace education freedom for all.

Thanks for your continued support!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ff00e745ad&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=cd938a32cc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=cd938a32cc).

| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ea1e6bdaae40aca03ffe90ce6e9854&_e=MK0K4e8cVOYIMzQ5FedyD-QAu0Yr4ySTDeRJfqjShyQLQ-YyHqFmierunFzPFLuPjSGXF1d9Q-Ylqeudf-VvMW0vpMV4DrEteC_gRwh7hoJMpE6b-Ae-Irx-c_HTJYr2E3SxQDg3GxIrJXbtnG05fvdfGreRgsRouDAoXJL_YslhRKkvo8eAoOuM6S3RrFGKwzR0iHx2BxdgAw_lOOD3TupQWv_RRoUSsHic49oDCPbIpp2JJHtx_gibOGkcC4hQz_jmEJAMW2H2eSnlpAVvGyxRnZ8GPH6JbmsA3-HutQsCVAOVyXc3YMyNzh8SFRHImZDm0YBNR-7SEWg65ifkOIPuOVp9qIFHz_bTGnMyg6jBgf4KCZoLLZJ-7ju7rQmEclfucysUftTZepnjBwf1lKSN1aP8zz_JgBgLwCmP1Hc%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ea1e6bdaae40aca03ffe90ce6e9854&_e=MK0K4e8cVOYIMzQ5FedyD-QAu0Yr4ySTDeRJfqjShyQLQ-YyHqFmierunFzPFLuPjSGXF1d9Q-Ylqeudf-VvMW0vpMV4DrEteC_gRwh7hoJMpE6b-Ae-Irx-c_HTJYr2E3SxQDg3GxIrJXbtnG05fvdfGreRgsRouDAoXJL_YslhRKkvo8eAoOuM6S3RrFGKwzR0iHx2BxdgAw_lOOD3TupQWv_RRoUSsHic49oDCPbIpp2JJHtx_gibOGkcC4hQz_jmEJAMW2H2eSnlpAVvG-kfx4_Mez22QI1RwlWmD6OfFwjAlS5IFLnFPwriAzbWsDvJgyw47dd6yA2jErxJzgIdRf1Al4b32ZWflIqgY3ZdgixL8f3Z_IrAtPOzh4wo69AKZgeY2EXzdrDZN-s_gBkk_Hl5mosBdnNSlSQB9hw%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ea1e6bdaae40aca03ffe90ce6e9854&_e=MK0K4e8cVOYIMzQ5FedyD-QAu0Yr4ySTDeRJfqjShyQLQ-YyHqFmierunFzPFLuPjSGXF1d9Q-Ylqeudf-VvMW0vpMV4DrEteC_gRwh7hoJMpE6b-Ae-Irx-c_HTJYr2E3SxQDg3GxIrJXbtnG05fvdfGreRgsRouDAoXJL_YslhRKkvo8eAoOuM6S3RrFGKwzR0iHx2BxdgAw_lOOD3TupQWv_RRoUSsHic49oDCPbIpp2JJHtx_gibOGkcC4hQz_jmEJAMW2H2eSnlpAVvG_zcIJLaX03l90pzUq35gIXMHRwBt-ezQOHSWKRe3CYR-O-GUCX9VqUj9pQviT3oboFu8aPcD08xppr-fG8LpF1wXL783gvLspC2evNjE2wIiC0sxzZCIJ44PosFpyoOc9EXLNNOanXH8Pmx3QkQMVM%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ea1e6bdaae40aca03ffe90ce6e9854&_e=MK0K4e8cVOYIMzQ5FedyD-QAu0Yr4ySTDeRJfqjShyQLQ-YyHqFmierunFzPFLuPjSGXF1d9Q-Ylqeudf-VvMW0vpMV4DrEteC_gRwh7hoJMpE6b-Ae-Irx-c_HTJYr2E3SxQDg3GxIrJXbtnG05fvdfGreRgsRouDAoXJL_YslhRKkvo8eAoOuM6S3RrFGKwzR0iHx2BxdgAw_lOOD3TupQWv_RRoUSsHic49oDCPbIpp2JJHtx_gibOGkcC4hQz_jmEJAMW2H2eSnlpAVvG-Fr-NLfRksTpgcWwdfYQ0hY677amS4BKeWwbsdNhTN4498eMd88ObULnewA_7J-GOlKLjxSeulguzrzSt9ZVvpvrkcNH4ByzjbaqhXDgWxpkjJw7yazAG9ebNXwVqoZmVawM7NUJp5negRKdVMOPmc%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

In a shocking disregard for the principles of diversity and inclusion , my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, has shamelessly aligned himself with the Freedom Caucus.
He is co-sponsoring their resolution to eliminate the House Office of Diversity and Inclusion (DEI).
The sponsor, Rep. Alex Mooney, stated the office is " the latest woke liberal method of injecting cultural Marxism into the workplace " and " these offices start with the premise that white people are inherently racist and oppressive ."
Wrong. We cannot let Bergman and the radical GOP's destructive agenda prevail. Our fight for a Congress that genuinely represents and uplifts every American is at stake. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
The DEI staff helps prospective House employees by offering training, mock interviews, and résumé reviews. Hardly threatening.
My opponent's fear of diversity exposes his own fragility and weakness, and it's not reflective of the values of #MI01.
We cannot let Jack Bergman's regressive agenda erase progress. Friend, if you're able, please help me get to Congress to protect the vital programs that promote diversity [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] , inclusion, and equal opportunity.
Your generous contribution will help us launch a powerful counteroffensive against Bergman's assault on diversity and inclusion.
Every dollar donated will fuel our campaign to defend the values we hold dear.
Together, we can send a resounding message that discrimination has no place in Congress. Join me by standing up against Bergman's attack on diversity and inclusion with your donation today [http://actblue.com/donate/about-bob] !
In solidarity,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for Congress
Northern Michigan / UP
Democrat, MI01

name: Team Gallego
subject: AZ Senate: TOSS-UP
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
With 31 Senate seats in play in 2024, just three are rated as pure toss-ups by Inside Elections. And at the top of the list is Arizona’s seat, held by Kyrsten Sinema.
#

It’s shaping up to be a tough cycle for Democrats, Peter.
If you have a minute or two, let us explain why.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230805-1-30&t=1&akid=884%2E734936%2Esm6OFv)
See that? With 31 Senate seats in play in 2024, just three are rated as pure toss-ups by _Inside Elections._
And at the top of the list is Arizona’s seat, held by Kyrsten Sinema.
Now, a lot of people think the Senate is safe, but here’s the truth: **Our majority is hanging by a thread.** Just one seat is all it takes to lose it.
And worse, we could be looking at a three-way race in Arizona.
Ruben Gallego vs. Kyrsten Sinema vs. Kari Lake
It’s going to be an incredibly tough — and expensive — campaign.
But there's only one Democrat in this race. And he is the one we’re asking you to support today. So, if you’ve heard enough:
[**We need you to make your first $5 donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today. Arizona will determine control in the Senate in 2024. But the first step to winning that seat for Ruben is hitting our fundraising goals.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230805-1-30&t=2&akid=884%2E734936%2Esm6OFv)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

clean_body: With 31 Senate seats in play in 2024, just three are rated as pure toss-ups by Inside Elections. And at the top of the list is Arizona’s seat, held by Kyrsten Sinema. It’s shaping up to be a tough cycle for Democrats, Peter. If you have a minute or two, let us explain why. See that? With 31 Senate seats in play in 2024, just three are rated as pure toss-ups by Inside Elections. And at the top of the list is Arizona’s seat, held by Kyrsten Sinema. Now, a lot of people think the Senate is safe, but here’s the truth: Our majority is hanging by a thread. Just one seat is all it takes to lose it. And worse, we could be looking at a three-way race in Arizona. Ruben Gallego vs. Kyrsten Sinema vs. Kari Lake It’s going to be an incredibly tough — and expensive — campaign. But there's only one Democrat in this race. And he is the one we’re asking you to support today. So, if you’ve heard enough: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** On election night in 2024, we’re all going to want to know we did enough to win. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden isn’t wasting any time
body:
His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f039b0153be849348e4a0aa891744e12&_e=LzFlx7OYogJqN11Skwtow16WNqRbn1k7-xu0X2l5jvC-gc6o4vtrVnmIOP4QUcTlCcppUYP0MPiOfFSpCY81vut0i_ybBdj_d2kEO5XuOBFVtrmEvMtzkZiBbfLegReALC01KMCE8ivX2QbH0u_J7EQxtWir6etNpV1V1cumStAkpRranIdCCXceeqnK69912I1507TXm-_5bo3Kx4aNuRkoMafgzQx6rAX75eWJBxjhJBiSDihTyBqaWXtWWtrLZK9t5PlXy1p80VSivdI1IehRcQZe8r229mXNYhCg9N2jfvl85gCq7kaOcMh9N1G6vtGztbOJsiKgTCga8ol_16cYarU4Q6NWYYeymyp7qqMxyZ4pHGtqy_30Veafdz6YFI0Lx6KzMIZXyqOQ0IXaoLep-aGQcvK2FwAgBD4sfxI%3D)
---
Friend,

Five seconds.

That's how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth.

His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to:
* Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars.
* Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals.
* Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers.

Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there.

Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package!

On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals.

This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous.

But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives--with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

**[But in order to do this critical work, we need your help.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f039b0153be849348e4a0aa891744e12&_e=LzFlx7OYogJqN11Skwtow16WNqRbn1k7-xu0X2l5jvC-gc6o4vtrVnmIOP4QUcTlCcppUYP0MPiOfFSpCY81vut0i_ybBdj_d2kEO5XuOBFVtrmEvMtzkZiBbfLegReALC01KMCE8ivX2QbH0u_J7EQxtWir6etNpV1V1cumStAkpRranIdCCXceeqnK69912I1507TXm-_5bo3Kx4aNuRkoMafgzQx6rAX75eWJBxjhJBiSDihTyBqaWXtWWtrLZK9t5PlXy1p80VSivdI1ITchHViVeXxNRC0X409EfAZZnQU40dvlDxs3uSvFeI5Q6r38yZsSbWOY4XHaDtQVEcL2FD5kaqRaggMgbziL6z8xCR0Dcx7KAsCMG1sm6fa53xNh1dDsduLKEt-IGiafCgIax4YbXWf-rmWFXyex2qQ%3D)**

Your gift today will allow us to expand our policy research efforts to further educate lawmakers across the country. And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion.

You can make your gift right now using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f039b0153be849348e4a0aa891744e12&_e=LzFlx7OYogJqN11Skwtow16WNqRbn1k7-xu0X2l5jvC-gc6o4vtrVnmIOP4QUcTlCcppUYP0MPiOfFSpCY81vut0i_ybBdj_d2kEO5XuOBFVtrmEvMtzkZiBbfLegReALC01KMCE8ivX2QbH0u_J7EQxtWir6etNpV1V1cumStAkpRranIdCCXceeqnK69912I1507TXm-_5bo3Kx4aNuRkoMafgzQx6rAX75eWJBxjhJBiSDihTyBqaWXtWWtrLZK9t5PlXy1p80VSivdI1IVehk2-uN8WE88JsqquVUrr-FmUbxI1boFHR8qU6-MO3mx7Ix5RSPkN1ukXTfVrACQ8FBI2lxiP48IrraKjO5a4a06OL7pih3hAdzF28pe8Sf3oaDf5c-vdm01jQYEr79u7adPUiUqj3SvXZbSOOUSc%3D)**

But please remember that time is of the essence. As President Biden ramps up his campaign efforts, we must be prepared to counter him every step of the way.

That's why your gift is urgently needed now.

Make your gift today to fight back against the Biden administration using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f039b0153be849348e4a0aa891744e12&_e=LzFlx7OYogJqN11Skwtow16WNqRbn1k7-xu0X2l5jvC-gc6o4vtrVnmIOP4QUcTlCcppUYP0MPiOfFSpCY81vut0i_ybBdj_d2kEO5XuOBFVtrmEvMtzkZiBbfLegReALC01KMCE8ivX2QbH0u_J7EQxtWir6etNpV1V1cumStAkpRranIdCCXceeqnK69912I1507TXm-_5bo3Kx4aNuRkoMafgzQx6rAX75eWJBxjhJBiSDihTyBqaWXtWWtrLZK9t5PlXy1p80VSivdI1IaNcDWg0uaWJwzAqls-qKvmsqYGCUXQf3ynyH3an-OEVY4U-hEiJkCd8LzsB2AA6mJjUjZOZuihkPc7HjkUp-ptKnoAyCEpLotOU3iiHFChW-xbvKcHrcSTkA3RhjPbScBIH6Hh_shuBiq7Xk8J1BPA%3D)**

By doing so, you will help advance a culture of life that protects unborn children and their mothers from abortion.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Conservatives Give

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried
%recipient.md5_hash%
|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6855aaa6bf744f2c9cedec9742086663&_e=MLfL4IdtrYx2bQRf_b3mHfTWxvQrPN9LoZFQPXBoI8L35bZf-9T-uJ1NqlNk7uMruVNM24Ipd9TF42GZR8niO5zaPo5fL4VYilBVd5fsitgVAnO7gbv5wzb6lmpN5r0pw4IoUvC0OmutrSwXcOmjmzpQw8R2TLjcP9mCLQh762AfjbVeg8fiHf0Ul4lkwjAVwmscP192z6ZJajijK2JPtvok2FQqFzNme8FiaCc20E8zttELeu3BpurDhlqAayGWhenbUjPruH8aCOlCz_7P1RIY0nXzY7xTvSd3FJB8msIu4KBAa91QiWx7tXyXbTQ-UDDZ8v1bQUN3G5b6UiZwsmXwJb4dv38Co1OFbtE00wpv69UZwlFCzCrOb13Ww-FZLANlb-OVI8Y1BDWQ9xcejUGSzcvGNULwRpB3idB9pOE%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6855aaa6bf744f2c9cedec9742086663&_e=MLfL4IdtrYx2bQRf_b3mHfTWxvQrPN9LoZFQPXBoI8L35bZf-9T-uJ1NqlNk7uMruVNM24Ipd9TF42GZR8niO5zaPo5fL4VYilBVd5fsitgVAnO7gbv5wzb6lmpN5r0pw4IoUvC0OmutrSwXcOmjmzpQw8R2TLjcP9mCLQh762AfjbVeg8fiHf0Ul4lkwjAVwmscP192z6ZJajijK2JPtvok2FQqFzNme8FiaCc20E8zttELeu3BpurDhlqAayGWhenbUjPruH8aCOlCz_7P1WPabDlS_Mhdexg-UflGUFu0YsNQKC8s7ezzZ64f7QVKkFkg80OevmfTpYobVLcNQ-CLAWQ22lbQUuNP_ntK9UK2pQdnLq3I7Y4M9GGfaxRI0Hs0FQMKiej0VmfPIcGlbVHFVbruR5mVmyhidZGWIGw%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6855aaa6bf744f2c9cedec9742086663&_e=MLfL4IdtrYx2bQRf_b3mHfTWxvQrPN9LoZFQPXBoI8L35bZf-9T-uJ1NqlNk7uMruVNM24Ipd9TF42GZR8niO5zaPo5fL4VYilBVd5fsitgVAnO7gbv5wzb6lmpN5r0pw4IoUvC0OmutrSwXcOmjmzpQw8R2TLjcP9mCLQh762AfjbVeg8fiHf0Ul4lkwjAVwmscP192z6ZJajijK2JPtvok2FQqFzNme8FiaCc20E8zttELeu3BpurDhlqAayGWhenbUjPruH8aCOlCz_7P1UNHlaZRIeNTvjn7fY-IOPoGHuVkfXOd9PcSEz00-gInHqRqw_tsigZtnc7OvMp_Ixqa_JVOBoUhGx4GurvrIOmlMiRJvLgOBtp0wX9jUmNR46XLZpEoMzKvk8HYMvgENziF357CKVOzEann-tEoxaU%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6855aaa6bf744f2c9cedec9742086663&_e=MLfL4IdtrYx2bQRf_b3mHfTWxvQrPN9LoZFQPXBoI8L35bZf-9T-uJ1NqlNk7uMruVNM24Ipd9TF42GZR8niO5zaPo5fL4VYilBVd5fsitgVAnO7gbv5wzb6lmpN5r0pw4IoUvC0OmutrSwXcOmjmzpQw8R2TLjcP9mCLQh762AfjbVeg8fiHf0Ul4lkwjAVwmscP192z6ZJajijK2JPtvok2FQqFzNme8FiaCc20E8zttELeu3BpurDhlqAayGWhenbUjPruH8aCOlCz_7P1S6CzrJJWXk8RJdPtiNMmK7LzZOVqDC4ePuUbjfs_XHi8S7xrDekuukE_7b-xmS-MqYF02Uc2fFCkMdm9OXjBP0iCFNzo709KqbnRTOTdqz3PZ8buEr18B3ftKwQ4jyIG1cYuNdy08c3fvt-BG7-3HM%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Kadida named in the top 100 women making a difference in PA →

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67617299/420306229/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230805power_N_NP_90DO_7_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmZGIzOTQzLTk2MzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MWTP_gaIXN_9RyTBSm6tvq1k00mqB94tcTsVS6DIXoE=)
| You need to see this, team. 👀

_City & State Pennsylvania_ just released The 2023 Power of Diversity: Women 100, a list that recognizes female difference-makers from across the Commonwealth. And our very own CEO Kadida Kenner made the list! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67617300/420306230/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230805power_N_NP_90DO_7_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmZGIzOTQzLTk2MzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MWTP_gaIXN_9RyTBSm6tvq1k00mqB94tcTsVS6DIXoE=) Here is the recap of the incredible things Kadida has accomplished:

_“Last year, Kadida Kenner’s New Pennsylvania Project registered more than 20,000 voters. Kenner, who founded the voting rights nonprofit, maintains that momentum as she looks to upcoming elections – advocating for a higher state minimum wage, rallying with the League of Women Voters and reaching out to the many Pennsylvanians of color who remain underserved and underrepresented. On Twitter, she regularly reminds voters of the importance of the judiciary as co-chair of Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania.”_

We are so proud of Kadida. She is a tireless advocate for social and economic justice and deserves to be recognized for her work to expand access to the ballot box in the Commonwealth. But her work is far from over.

[**Kadida founded the New Pennsylvania Project to consistently engage Pennsylvanians year-round to expand the electorate centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth. Chip in $25 right now to help support her work as we prepare for critical upcoming elections in September and November clean_body: Kadida named in the top 100 women making a difference in PA → = | You need to see this, team. 👀 City & State Pennsylvania just released The 2023 Power of Diversity: Women 100, a list that recognizes female difference-makers from across the Commonwealth. And our very own CEO Kadida Kenner made the list! = Here is the recap of the incredible things Kadida has accomplished: “Last year, Kadida Kenner’s New Pennsylvania Project registered more than 20,000 voters. Kenner, who founded the voting rights nonprofit, maintains that momentum as she looks to upcoming elections – advocating for a higher state minimum wage, rallying with the League of Women Voters and reaching out to the many Pennsylvanians of color who remain underserved and underrepresented. On Twitter, she regularly reminds voters of the importance of the judiciary as co-chair of Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania.” We are so proud of Kadida. She is a tireless advocate for social and economic justice and deserves to be recognized for her work to expand access to the ballot box in the Commonwealth. But her work is far from over. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thank you for joining us in congratulating Kadida on this award! You can read about the other powerful women Cheers, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

subject: Let’s ditch Bidenomics

body:
it’s failing US | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a333edd4d101/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-6142893?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=3fc15f6d94&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Biden and his radical liberal friends like Emilia Sykes are ruining our economy!

Just recently, the credit rating agency Fitch downgraded the United States' rating from **AAA** to **AA+**. **This downgrade directly stems from the incompetence of the Biden Administration, with their out-of-control spending and lack of fiscal planning. **

Because of this, borrowing interest rates will rise, making it harder for our country to maintain its competitiveness on the global stage.
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=7f31ff5ab6&e=d6699466fe)
---
| **We must address the issue of ever-growing deficits and the dangerous consequences of inflation head-on.** Even Joe Biden's Treasury Secretary, Janet Yellen, admitted her previous misjudgment _about the path inflation would take. _

_But the truth is clear_ : reckless spending and borrowing lead to inflation, and it's the hard working Americans who bear the burden!

**As your representative** , I will tirelessly work to rein in government spending, decrease our national debt, and put an end to the harmful inflation that is hurting every American. Our economy is at risk, and it's time to elect leaders who understand the ABC’s of Economics and will make responsible fiscal decisions!

[**I need your support now more than ever to take on this battle**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=a6c16a8c79&e=d6699466fe). Our campaign relies on grassroots funding to stand strong against the influence of big spenders and special interests. [**Your support, no matter the amount, will contribute significantly to our efforts of protecting our economy and securing a brighter future for our nation.**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=98c8518c60&e=d6699466fe)
---
| [LET’S DITCH BIDENOMICS »](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=bf1316b6ef&e=d6699466fe "LET’S DITCH BIDENOMICS »")
---
| Let’s create a future where fiscal responsibility and economic prosperity go hand in hand!
---
| For Ohio, and for America,
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=772e7206cd&e=d6699466fe)
---
| **Greg Wheeler**
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress, OH-13
[GregWheeler.com](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=3d33fcac3b&e=d6699466fe)
---
| [**P.S. The future of our economy is at stake, and I cannot do this without your support. Join the fight today by making a contribution to our campaign. United, we can ensure that the status quo does NOT continue!**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=34d694ce99&e=d6699466fe)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT »](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=844f3165e3&e=d6699466fe "CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT »")

Friend,
---
Democrats in Washington named me a top target and have launched a massive campaign against me.
---
They have already spent over $700,000 on TV ads attacking me this year! The election is still 15 months away.
---
Far-left donors are funding these misleading television ads and distorting the truth about my conservative voting record.
---
I can promise you this -- I won't back down.
---
I will keep working to get our economy back on track, secure the border, and hold the Biden Administration accountable.
---
But I need your help.
---

The election is still 15 months away. Far-left donors are funding these misleading television ads and distorting the truth about my conservative voting record. I can promise you this -- I won't back down. I will keep working to get our economy back on track, secure the border, and hold the Biden Administration accountable. But I need your help. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

body:

| | Did you see this message from Josh?

Antisemitism is running rampant across the country, and unfortunately, Paul Gosar is just one example as of late. Just earlier this week, former President Donald Trump’s campaign said that the recent federal indictments are “reminiscent of Nazi Germany in the 1930s”

Here at Team Gottheimer, we’re disgusted and enraged by Trump’s ignorant and offensive comparison. But, it just makes it even more clear how important it is to keep Josh in Congress to push back on extreme antisemitic behavior, just like this. [Will you chip in $10 or more to support Josh’s campaign and keep a strong voice against antisemitism in the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67620255/420318730/-2058784289?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230805_FR_antisemitism_0_1MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_GosarBump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTVhNTA3My05YTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BntRJN2gmEJ86NGISrqdCOySTJlRlqq3RAVbj6AwlD4=)

* * *
_Forwarded Message from Josh Gottheimer:_
Representative Paul Gosar has shown a clear pattern of engaging in antisemitic extremism – from sharing links to antisemitic sites to supporting individuals like Nick Fuentes and Kanye West.

I have been at the forefront of combating antisemitism for years now, both in and out of Congress, which is why I’m now standing with others to censure Gosar’s extremist actions. If we want to fight for a future without hate, we need to stand up and speak up.

**Antisemitic incidents are at an all-time high across the country.** This national crisis calls for action across the aisle to actively combat antisemitism whenever and wherever we see it – but all Gosar’s actions do is amplify hate. There is zero place for this kind of harmful, extremist rhetoric anywhere in our government or nation.

[Will you stand with me and add your name to denounce Gosar, and other extremist individuals like him, to fight for a future without hate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67620262/420318742/-317581511?source=EM_NBI_JG_20230805_FR_antisemitism_0_1MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_GosarBump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTVhNTA3My05YTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BntRJN2gmEJ86NGISrqdCOySTJlRlqq3RAVbj6AwlD4=&emci=e0382d1e-0c32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=8e5a5073-9a33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)
