clean_body: | | Did you see this message from Josh? Antisemitism is running rampant across the country, and unfortunately, Paul Gosar is just one example as of late. Just earlier this week, former President Donald Trump’s campaign said that the recent federal indictments are “reminiscent of Nazi Germany in the 1930s” Here at Team Gottheimer, we’re disgusted and enraged by Trump’s ignorant and offensive comparison. But, it just makes it even more clear how important it is to keep Josh in Congress to push back on extreme antisemitic behavior, just like this. = | = Thanks, and read on for Josh’s original message. Forwarded Message from Josh Gottheimer: Representative Paul Gosar has shown a clear pattern of engaging in antisemitic extremism – from sharing links to antisemitic sites to supporting individuals like Nick Fuentes and Kanye West. I have been at the forefront of combating antisemitism for years now, both in and out of Congress, which is why I’m now standing with others to censure Gosar’s extremist actions. If we want to fight for a future without hate, we need to stand up and speak up. Antisemitic incidents are at an all-time high across the country. This national crisis calls for action across the aisle to actively combat antisemitism whenever and wherever we see it – but all Gosar’s actions do is amplify hate. There is zero place for this kind of harmful, extremist rhetoric anywhere in our government or nation. Thank you, Josh | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 United States

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: We’re concerned
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team -
We won’t take up too much of your time on a Saturday, but we hope you’ll hear us out on why your [**$3 contribution is so important to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230805-1-15&t=1&akid=6280%2E3935704%2ExgtZSH)
We’re concerned. Last month, we faced one of the slowest months of fundraising we’ve seen in a long time. We understand that summer is a time to relax, but gun violence doesn’t stop, especially during the summer months. That means we can never rest in our work to keep our communities safe.
We know that our movement is stronger than ever. And that’s because you’re a part of it.
Now, we need to show this strength in numbers. Your contribution is the most impactful way to send a message to the gun lobby that we aren’t backing down in the fight to end gun violence.
[**What do you say? Can we count on you to make a contribution of $3—or any amount that makes sense for you—to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230805-1-15&t=2&akid=6280%2E3935704%2ExgtZSH)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for August, and I need to make sure you activate your membership by tonight's fundraising deadline.

If we want to save the Senate and stop Mitch McConnell **_again_** in 2024, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

**Your membership has never been more critical. Please, use this custom link to activate right now:**

**[www.dscc.org/202308members/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/15191?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230805-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230805-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=11431%2E9716520%2ETiZlAC)**

Chuck Schumer

name: VoteVets
subject: Guy’s got some ego
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
After 20 years of war, these holds are a slap in the face to our Military, and Military Families.
#
Derek:
We’ll say this about Tommy Tuberville.
Guy’s got some ego.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230805-1-30&t=1&akid=14264%2E3013755%2Eeqx_f8)
The Marines have no Commandant. By the end of the month, the Army and Navy will also be without their top officers. There are hundreds of positions unfilled across the leadership of our Military.
It’s just not true, Tommy.
After 20 years of war, these holds are a slap in the face to our Military, and Military Families. Each of these officers has served with distinction and honor — and their careers are on hold. Their families have supported their careers only to be rewarded with uncertainty — unable to arrange for moves, new jobs, housing, or schools for their children.
It’s completely unacceptable. And Tuberville thinks it’s all a game.
We’ve got more cards to play. We will keep up the pressure. We will keep up the fight. It is our duty.
But we need your help to do it.
**[So please, we have one simple request: Chip in $3 today and support us as we hold Tommy Tuberville and the rest of the GOP accountable for hamstringing our Military.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230805-1-30&t=2&akid=14264%2E3013755%2Eeqx_f8)**

Thank you,

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Fox News amplified the Big Lie from the start
body:
You just have to look to the indictment itself for the evidence.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1343%2E120351%2EWHutPO)
Peter, since the news broke about Donald Trump’s latest indictment over his attempt to overturn the 2020 election, the right-wing media ecosystem has gone all in on defending Trump’s actions and attacking the Biden administration.
Unfortunately, none of this is new. Media outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, and One America News Network, alongside personalities like Sean Hannity, Jesse Watters, and others, have been working to spread Trump’s Big Lie about the 2020 election from the beginning.
**You just have to look to the indictment itself for the evidence.** Prosecutors say the false claim that more than 200,000 fake ballots were counted in Pennsylvania was “integral” to Trump’s scheme — a claim that was parroted on Newsmax, OANN, Gateway Pundit, and others.
These claims were never anything more than lies. But now that Trump is once again likely to be the Republican nominee for president, the entire right-wing media ecosystem, led by Fox News, is in hyperdrive to spread more misinformation to protect him.
**And that’s exactly why Courier Newsroom exists. Our journalists are committed to correcting the record on right-wing misinformation and providing the full story for our readers.**
[**We serve readers in “news deserts” spanning 8 battleground states that could decide the next election — and none of our work would be possible without the support of donors like you. So Peter, can we count on you to pitch in $5 right now to help us keep up our important work as 2024 approaches?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230805?refcode=em20230805&amount=5&refcode2=1343_120351_WHutPO&akid=1343%2E120351%2EWHutPO)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230805?refcode=em20230805&amount=5&refcode2=1343_120351_WHutPO&akid=1343%2E120351%2EWHutPO)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1343_120351_WHutPO&akid=1343%2E120351%2EWHutPO)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1343%2E120351%2EWHutPO)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

---
| | | When a regular person is arrested, they are typically handcuffed and required to take a mugshot. But Donald Trump has been given special treatment, and allowed to skip these steps. [**Sign your name, and demand handcuffs and mugshots for Trump when he is arrested again. >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e2f75e1-054e-431d-8d0f-8761db59b691/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump is facing serious criminal charges, and there is no reason he should be treated like a king, and spared the indignities that anyone else would have to endure. No one is above the law, and Trump should not be treated as such. [**Sign your name, and demand handcuffs and mugshots for Trump when he is arrested again. >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tedc11a5e-47d6-475e-8626-137f74d41c5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
TEAM WILSON WEEKLY UPDATES
Peter,
The headlines are starting to pick up the groundswell of support this campaign for Governor has been getting.
First, according to a recent radio segment on The Big 870 (WWL), I'm neck-and-neck in a two-man race for Governor, despite the Republican front-runner having the benefit of a massive war chest of cash on hand.
Then, after reading Port Allen resident Catherine's editorial [https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fadvocateneworleans-la.newsmemory.com%2F%3Fpublink%3D17fa6f8b3_134ac6c%26fbclid%3DIwAR3q3J4btLhei_lTyEkLIRugC9ZnPFwkpPxPhqtu_s9UWdB0jjbhlg7hPxw&h=AT3oAJEyYOQafd7kRdhvY6HtHayFGJQwDD-EKKli_ZXmSsruw96m-pw6CtbYizrldOfOFwnIYZHqZ3f5YG9JrTcNBpTZhSWnMYYJoK0eZrUnbgkszbRUDwglivsEk0iGvw&__tn__=%2CmH-R&c[0]=AT0UXQtTD0J8jz9o4XYe2WsUqpEl2gNYL9-Pf_kC-jK49CaN_JMR1aWXj5rGI6Qc53u0863L90DbzVjIt03TXs43jMxs9W0xZNkZF8wzO-lEg2rjcbUWG65b7IsdsCn6vyaTUw8uM2K-Ez3uTmA50qwGAv1uSaRrK3ypJbO8DB1X5B0HvH19qFyw_d3SSmGoXAp3bFBBfbai] , I just had to give her a call. I am exactly the gubernatorial candidate she is looking for, a wise and compassionate leader whose work will benefit ALL Louisianans.
Catherine and I believe there are many more like-minded people in our state.
With the qualifying period open this coming week, I've got my sights set on making our grassroots campaign grow and riding the wave of momentum through the primary election in October.
It's our time, Louisiana.
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL
Buras
During my recent trip to Buras in Plaquemines Parish, I had the opportunity to see the newest land created in Louisiana. Ducks Unlimited invested $1M that allows us to work WITH nature to create a diverse habitat that will benefit hunting and fishing, as well as protect people and property from natural disasters.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-04T083631.446.png]
Dallas, Texas
Last week, I had the chance to join my Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity Brothers from across the country at our National Convention in Dallas, Texas.
On Friday evening I joined past Presidents for a deeply engaging event where I had the opportunity to highlight the challenges that Louisiana faces and share my solutions to them.
Across the board, my vision for Louisiana was well-received by these men that care deeply for our shared future. I am grateful to have their support in my campaign for Governor.
Additionally, I was honored to keynote the College Brothers Luncheon. Like them, it was during my college years that I found my way to our beloved fraternity.
Through the founding mission of our organization, I charted my path in life. To be a public servant for Louisiana has been my calling, and I thank my brothers for helping me actualize that. 🤙🏾
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-04T084319.362.png]
Baton Rouge
The only thing better than lunch at Gino's Restaurant in Baton Rouge is enjoying it with voters who care about the future of our Louisiana, including a supporter who donated to the campaign this morning.
Thank you all for the discussion!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-04T084841.078.png]
At last week's grand opening of our campaign headquarters in Baton Rouge we had almost 200 people come through just to meet, greet, shake hands, and grab some campaign swag like signs, t-shirts, fans, and stickers!
Our campaign also features the best plans in the race to help Louisiana families and spur our great state forward. 💪🏾
https://youtu.be/tyRB6EzEqQc [https://youtu.be/tyRB6EzEqQc]
New Orleans
I had a wonderful evening with my friend and supporter Congressman Troy A. Carter as he welcomed his esteemed colleague Congresswoman Barbara Lee to our great state.
It’s always good to be at the historic Dooky Chase Restaurant .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/IMG_6184.jpg]
Alexandria
I had a wonderful afternoon rubbing shoulders with Mayors and other top-ranking leaders from Louisiana's cities, towns, and villages thanks to the Louisiana Municipal Association . Thank you to LMA president Jennifer Vidrine and Alexandria Mayor Jacques Roy for hosting. It's always a treat to see friends from across the state come together. I was grateful to see leaders from places like Henderson, Monroe, Moreauville, Carencro, Ringgold, Sunset, Patterson, Plaquemines, and Woodworth, just to name a few!
I was grateful to share my commitment to ITEP and empowering local governments. Local leaders should be in the driver's seat when it comes to their resources. The Louisiana Illuminator [https://lailluminator.com/2023/08/04/three-candidates-say-theyll-voluntarily-weaken-the-governors-office-if-elected/] highlighted that, "Only Wilson said he would continue to give local parish councils and school boards – in addition to sheriffs – a say on industrial tax exemption applications." Meanwhile, Woodworth Mayor David Butler said, “You’ve got to work across party lines, whether it be Independents, Democrats or Republicans. Dr. Shawn Wilson has done that. I like what he has to say. It’s not rhetoric. He knows what he wants to do, and he’s been there and done it.”
I can't wait to do it all for you as Governor.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-04T143337.359.png]
Jefferson Parish
The recent spike of opioid-related deaths is staggering in Jefferson Parish and across Louisiana, and the numbers are probably underreported. I am grateful for the work of The Greater New Orleans chapter of The Compassionate Friends , a non-profit that supports families after the death of a child.
We need more support to help solve this epidemic and address the fallout from tragedy.
Learn more at lodss.ldh.la.gov [http://lodss.ldh.la.gov] .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-04T143605.205.png]
GIVING PRAISE
New Orleans
The prayer breakfast hosted by Breakfast Table was a huge success, with the room filled with friends and clergy interested in my vision for Louisiana. I'm glad State Senator Regina Barrow , State Reps. Barbara West Carpenter and Ed Larvadain, III were on hand, as well as some friends from AFL-CIO .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-04T082741.419.png]
Baton Rouge
It was a pleasure worshiping at the Louisiana Home & Foreign Mission Baptist Convention last week, led by Pastor S.C. Dixon and the national President, Rev. Samuel C. Tolbert Jr. , two of Lake Charles' greatest faith leaders.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-04T083247.499.png]
ENDORSEMENTS
Baker Mayor Darnell Waites
"Dr. Shawn Wilson has the vision necessary to move Louisiana in the right direction - forward," said Baker Mayor Darnell Waites . "As our capitol continues to grow, Dr. Wilson had the foresight to expand the merge lanes where LA964 meets US61, making safer and less congested commutes for residents of Baker and beyond. His forward thinking will benefit Louisianans across the state when he is elected Governor."
https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor [https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor]
State Representative Vincent Pierre
"Dr. Wilson's collaborative style of leadership has proven extremely effective in the advancement and improvement of Louisiana's infrastructure over the past decade," said State Representative Vincent Pierre . "As Governor he can have even more of a positive impact on the lives of all Louisianans. His election will be a boon for Louisiana."
https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor [https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor]
Homer Mayor Dr, Xanthe Seals
"Solutions and action are what I will expect during an administration of Dr. Shawn Wilson as Louisiana Governor," said Homer Mayor Dr. Xanthe Seals . "Dr. Wilson's commitment to bolstering the economic development of rural and underserved areas will benefit Louisianans across the state. He is the leader we need to move Louisiana forward."
https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor [https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor]
Jefferson Parish Councilmember Byron Lee
"Dr. Shawn Wilson's commitment to improving every corner of our state, to delivering for all Louisianans, not just those in the big cities, is refreshing," Jefferson Parish Councilmember Byron Lee said. "I know Shawn will deliver for Louisiana because he's done it time and time again, for the last 25 years, particularly with the airport flyover at the airport and the Kerner bridge in Lafitte. After every disaster he has been an excellent leader as Secretary of DOTD. I anxiously anticipate the progress we will make under a Wilson administration.”
https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor [https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor]
New Orleans City Councilmember Oliver Thomas
"New Orleans East will have an ally in Dr. Shawn Wilson," said New Orleans City Councilmember Oliver Thomas . “He is committed to economic development for our neighborhoods which have long been underserved. Dr. Wilson is a champion of innovative solutions, and using public-private partnerships to revitalize communities. I’m proud to support him as our next Governor.”
https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor [https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor]
To learn more about my candidacy visit wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com] .
With hope,
Shawn Wilson
HOST SHAWN AT AN EVENT [events@wilsonforla.com?subject=Host%20Shawn%20At%20An%20Event]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
ENDORSE [https://www.wilsonforla.com/endorse]

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Why your endorsement would mean so much to me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
By adding your name, you will be helping us build this movement into a force that can defeat George Santos and flip NY-03 blue.
#
[**Today I am reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to defeat George Santos and flip NY-03 blue.**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/endorse-zak-for-ny03/?source=em20230805&akid=358%2E8507%2EhrT5Vn) And if you will give me just a minute, I will explain why your endorsement in particular would mean so much to me.
**[Add Your Endorsement ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/endorse-zak-for-ny03/?source=em20230805&akid=358%2E8507%2EhrT5Vn)**
When I am out at events in the district, one of the questions I am asked most often is why I am running for Congress in the first place.
The answer is simple: After Donald Trump was elected, I spent the next few years working to defeat extreme MAGA Republicans all over the country. That effort was a big success as the organization I launched, The Next 50, was responsible for some big wins in a number of battleground districts in the 2020 election.
So after the midterms, when I saw that George Santos — a serial liar and complete fraud, just like Trump himself — would be representing my home district, I knew I had to put my experience to use and jump in the race to defeat him.
**But just like we did all over the country during the Trump presidency, we are going to need to build a huge grassroots movement capable of winning in what will be one of the most contested districts next November.**
[**And**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/endorse-zak-for-ny03/?refcode=em20230805&akid=358%2E8507%2EhrT5Vn)[**that is why your personal endorsement would mean so much to me. By adding your name, you will be helping us build this movement into a force that can defeat George Santos and flip NY-03 blue.**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/endorse-zak-for-ny03/?source=em20230805&akid=358%2E8507%2EhrT5Vn)
**[Add Your Endorsement ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/endorse-zak-for-ny03/?source=em20230805&akid=358%2E8507%2EhrT5Vn)** In partnership,
Zak Malamed
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=358%2E8507%2EhrT5Vn)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=358%2E8507%2EhrT5Vn)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Team Callie Barr
subject: Upper and Northern Michigan families deserve a representative who does more than visit.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
Callie will be here no matter what the temperature it is outside. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67623119/420329265/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230805_fr_Recess_TCB_sm_90DA_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWIwMWFjYmQtYTAzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zINjHTAlWZea-scq7KqcML6SW0kpzIyj_9xNbXd973M=)
---
Happy August, Peter! If you’ve lived in Upper or Northern Michigan very long, you know this is the time of year when our beaches, lakes, and roads are packed... And, just like clockwork, we know that once the nice weather fades so will all the beach bodies. Now don’t get us wrong — we love having people visit our towns and support our businesses. August is also the month that Congressional representatives take recess - and it’s likely that our current Representative Jack Bergman will take advantage of the nice weather and perhaps pay the First District a visit. **The thing is though - Upper and Northern Michigan families deserve a representative who does more than visit. We need a representative that understands what it’s like to actually live in our district -and, yes, even when it snows.** Unlike Rep. Bergman, Callie Barr knows the ups and downs that come with life up here in MI-01. **She was born and raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan.** Her family roots, like Matt’s, go back here for _**generations**_. And when she and Matt decided to settle down after moving around as a military family, **there was no question they'd move back home.** [If you want a Representative who’s not afraid to shovel snow and actually understands the needs of our community, chip in your first donation of $5 today to help send Callie to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67623123/420329269/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230805_fr_Recess_TCB_sm_90DA_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWIwMWFjYmQtYTAzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zINjHTAlWZea-scq7KqcML6SW0kpzIyj_9xNbXd973M=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67623126/420329272/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230805_fr_Recess_TCB_sm_90DA_xx_abt5&amount=5&expresslane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWIwMWFjYmQtYTAzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zINjHTAlWZea-scq7KqcML6SW0kpzIyj_9xNbXd973M=)
---

clean_body: Callie will be here no matter what the temperature it is outside. | = Happy August, Peter! If you’ve lived in Upper or Northern Michigan very long, you know this is the time of year when our beaches, lakes, and roads are packed... And, just like clockwork, we know that once the nice weather fades so will all the beach bodies. Now don’t get us wrong — we love having people visit our towns and support our businesses. August is also the month that Congressional representatives take recess - and it’s likely that our current Representative Jack Bergman will take advantage of the nice weather and perhaps pay the First District a visit. The thing is though - Upper and Northern Michigan families deserve a representative who does more than visit. We need a representative that understands what it’s like to actually live in our district -and, yes, even when it snows. Unlike Rep. Bergman, Callie Barr knows the ups and downs that come with life up here in MI-01. She was born and raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan. Her family roots, like Matt’s, go back here for generations. And when she and Matt decided to settle down after moving around as a military family, there was no question they'd move back home. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Enjoy these summer months while they last — and know that Callie will be here no matter what temperature it is outside. Gratefully, Team Callie Barr | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. clean_body: They'll do anything to silence & erase me | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Last summer, we humiliated Nancy Pelosi and made American history in the critical TX-34 special election & after we declared our historic victory, the liberal scumbag we defeated proclaimed we had stolen that election from them. | Democrat claims Mayra Flores, supporters, 'stole' Texas Special Election FOX NEWS | 9.10.22 The Democrats will do whatever it takes to demean, destroy, and defame me because I 'm a conservative Hispanic woman who isn't a left wing socialist. You see, I'm not afraid to say that I am a Christian who stands strongly on the ideals of God, Family, and Country. I share these values with the rest of the Hispanic community. Hispanic values are conservative values and this is why the Democrats are spending unbelievable amounts of money to ERASE & SILENCE everything we have accomplished. For the first time in 100 years, we had flipped a blue seat red, and with your help, I know we can do it again. So, "I’m humbly asking you to chip in any amount you can today to ensure we deliver another historic upset to Joe Biden & the radical Democrats. The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=18fbf68d4f1444dfaccfc7fb6108e1e7&_e=Z5eblhk06-4xNkWwu1s6g_I-g4sCQg1Fu14oRqLFeMOcxI623PYZQY92KMG83bmE4HlUlfKCkHhAjJj9W8SlZ7-q3EIOYPGdK3yIAoZVYzlbAsHIF4pXEUo-EXYoUN5i-RchkA-h4I74dGax0NYOfrC8tL2woZghLXGo-i33B1X1EE-OC8zIM3Ev0yHAF8f6_nrj-u4EPjfRKhkshzBN4KZf9FASCOWHqNaboRz4kyZSa_qLsFnR9sk9AxNQW4o70yRcfG6hQYlEdMHGjBkqjdbn-gjxTc5egI6hvtJxZDcdSkWRbyjKhPSo1W9WipQWwC2qh0sSrlwtx5w1Bci_4tzY7wjWSeyM2sqfF0bUvhRr2tv92DPIzvs7lAFR1_t4 "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=18fbf68d4f1444dfaccfc7fb6108e1e7&_e=Z5eblhk06-4xNkWwu1s6g_I-g4sCQg1Fu14oRqLFeMOcxI623PYZQY92KMG83bmE4HlUlfKCkHhAjJj9W8SlZ7-q3EIOYPGdK3yIAoZVYzlbAsHIF4pXEUo-EXYoUN5i-RchkA-h4I74dGax0NYOfrC8tL2woZghLXGo-i33B1X1EE-OC8zIM3Ev0yHAF8f6_nrj-u4EPjfRKhkshzBN4KZf9FASCOWHqNaboRz4kyZRDB9zMiIwT4e5P0Gj1seGtRlB0pCR41am37yeNFhKuQzlZ9dT6yf4mxtqOVKSWuSiS4f2UwHiySg9EdfRjsXjuPvY6QaSdcTqgUdx7jgxZnIN4aalqSe38IHe2oisqC0ZFb2An4hNlMEx1uvFuQ6l "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

name: Letitia James
subject: Need your response before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Take my August Priorities Survey
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67624194/420332948/-1997846888?code=jtk1147-su-nd&refcode=jtk1147-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWE2Mjc2Zi1hMTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUf9rOwJcErmWhbRuve_i9IV1IRR8HG5v-Ve2crwEOg=)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this Priorities Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day.**
**[So please, will you be one of the 5,000 people I need to take my August Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67624195/420332949/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1147-su-nd&refcode=jtk1147-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWE2Mjc2Zi1hMTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUf9rOwJcErmWhbRuve_i9IV1IRR8HG5v-Ve2crwEOg=&emci=d37624ea-7431-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d9a6276f-a133-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | **August PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard.
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67624196/420332950/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1147-su-nd&refcode=jtk1147-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWE2Mjc2Zi1hMTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUf9rOwJcErmWhbRuve_i9IV1IRR8HG5v-Ve2crwEOg=&emci=d37624ea-7431-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d9a6276f-a133-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, thanks to the valuable insight I've received from supporters like you, I've been able to prioritize the most urgent fights that have come up this year. I listened to people's top concerns and devoted myself to going toe-to-toe with anti-abortion extremists, taking on the gun lobby, and fighting against a record number of LGBTQ+ hate and discrimination efforts.
**But as the political climate continues to shift and GOP extremists continue to sharpen their attacks, I need your input ASAP to know where to devote my time next.**
**I'm looking for at least 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities with my team before midnight tonight. So _please_ : [Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with me and my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67624197/420332951/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1147-su-nd&refcode=jtk1147-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWE2Mjc2Zi1hMTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUf9rOwJcErmWhbRuve_i9IV1IRR8HG5v-Ve2crwEOg=&emci=d37624ea-7431-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d9a6276f-a133-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67624198/420332952/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1147-su-nd&refcode=jtk1147-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWE2Mjc2Zi1hMTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUf9rOwJcErmWhbRuve_i9IV1IRR8HG5v-Ve2crwEOg=&emci=d37624ea-7431-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d9a6276f-a133-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Letitia

This is the crunch time for the 2023 municipal elections, and that’s why we’ve been focused on going everywhere and leaving no stone unturned. Congress isn’t working because too many politicians get to Washington and never do what they promised they would when they were running. It’s time to change that by electing leaders with proven records of doing what they say. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_s=72a55bdaf42840cd951c6e477c5ddf3f&_t=FMp8cjq6JXyQtISHTzDeFYC-Sz_3LgNKVQRr4wVItCvHAlCKb7RwGOgWLLXw1Op39VRhPqzqm8N3VIZg8GGCSUTNjE3jDWozq9IVlHNP1ts%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_s=72a55bdaf42840cd951c6e477c5ddf3f&_t=FMp8cjq6JXyQtISHTzDeFYC-Sz_3LgNKVQRr4wVItCvHAlCKb7RwGOgWLLXw1Op39VRhPqzqm8N3VIZg8GGCSUTNjE3jDWozq9IVlHNP1ts%3D)

Fellow American,

I am the only candidate in the race for Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District who – on DAY ONE – released a comprehensive plan on what I will do when I get to Washington. It’s called my “Four Principles for America Plan.”

[ **BELIEVE IN AMERICAN PRINCIPLES**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=72a55bdaf42840cd951c6e477c5ddf3f&_e=NSt6DyHN8beM70PKHYTjGw9ObR2BfKrFHDo8vkYRwg-t-J7g-C22Xd8DXLjpzxBJHATJi2wzvLmLcOkN57Nlrkug14GRxBXsgWedWydh0XYYbWPEWNSC-bAZWt4yJRyZolfdiljss89k3OQWh_uHTrCj85eeZwnx1OGjP7uWygUHNxaufFLzTDHyN35bJRhosVyH62DEo5HWerNFrnEVT_qzzShtiQiZIwsiLinzXwo3CnSoxjKcnyhQ1FPxnwJ9-HoQ3Qmif40hEZGzCb19-awxZLmf1V4sfjhH-ixDpkDx3W1nPJaHQJM5XZpBKL2gp0Y-XKDAqkF-H0BBzkLv06wVnkVf5wW-CxkdG1AqZvKL9989gPP0nWjZmQX-BSjRVJNJasa5o_pI6SIeOMnAMoOqwoL_aEgC64KqMBT1vSsAaOf2uMNtAQXUhmP-Z_FY)
**Grow Our Economy**
to protect jobs, cut and eliminate taxes, reduce spending, and stop over-regulation.

**Defend Our Values**
to protect parents’ rights, promote merit and fairness, respect our police, firefighters, and EMS heroes, and build strong communities.

**Secure Our Communities**
by taking on the threat of Communist China, securing our borders, and getting tough on crime and drugs.

**Restore Our Freedoms**
by defending the 2nd Amendment, fighting back against the culture of celebrating abortion, and defending democracy, election integrity, religious freedom, and free speech.
I am also the only candidate in the race for Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District who has a proven and effective record and can hit the ground running in the fight to get America back on the right track. [**When I say I’ll do something, you know I will – because I already have.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=72a55bdaf42840cd951c6e477c5ddf3f&_e=NSt6DyHN8beM70PKHYTjGw9ObR2BfKrFHDo8vkYRwg-t-J7g-C22Xd8DXLjpzxBJHATJi2wzvLmLcOkN57Nlrkug14GRxBXsgWedWydh0XYYbWPEWNSC-bAZWt4yJRyZolfdiljss89k3OQWh_uHTrCj85eeZwnx1OGjP7uWygUHNxaufFLzTDHyN35bJRhosVyH62DEo5HWerNFrnEVT_qzzShtiQiZIwsiLinzXwo3CnSoxjKcnyhQ1FPxnwJ9-HoQ3Qmif40hEZGzCb19-awxZLmf1V4sfjhH-ixDpkDgSAs31vYYa24WhCWyVCMas1NDLuuf24OfbeSleWGqBTz4NM75NQosQueeM9GLasG_QDrxpT4fcZoDLgK1xZBsHhb5x7nSFrJWtEktx7V0oOz4h05BCzhjq8x7R_Gr7xLPhi2y2346ldmqukQcG06n)

[ **PROVEN, CONSERVATIVE RESULTS**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=72a55bdaf42840cd951c6e477c5ddf3f&_e=NSt6DyHN8beM70PKHYTjGw9ObR2BfKrFHDo8vkYRwg-t-J7g-C22Xd8DXLjpzxBJHATJi2wzvLmLcOkN57Nlrkug14GRxBXsgWedWydh0XYYbWPEWNSC-bAZWt4yJRyZolfdiljss89k3OQWh_uHTrCj85eeZwnx1OGjP7uWygUHNxaufFLzTDHyN35bJRhosVyH62DEo5HWerNFrnEVT_qzzShtiQiZIwsiLinzXwo3CnSoxjKcnyhQ1FPxnwJ9-HoQ3Qmif40hEZGzCb19-awxZLmf1V4sfjhH-ixDpkCJPeABlwLfg9p3j3wNBoWIAaIogO_7lP1XGOtrUgzvLxj_9kUqa6pcAhWuGlEIZhstj14jH2Iq8WVLH6a49RQNJBWQ6VZUw-i0Aij9uk-0ivjKEKWlNj_eEWznt6wiI7BUn2qP6zTDhWidtWgb8IQH)
• _**Never**_ voted for a tax increase.

[ **RYAN MACKENZIE – A CONSERVATIVE YOU CAN TRUST**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=72a55bdaf42840cd951c6e477c5ddf3f&_e=NSt6DyHN8beM70PKHYTjGw9ObR2BfKrFHDo8vkYRwg-t-J7g-C22Xd8DXLjpzxBJHATJi2wzvLmLcOkN57Nlrkug14GRxBXsgWedWydh0XYYbWPEWNSC-bAZWt4yJRyZolfdiljss89k3OQWh_uHTrCj85eeZwnx1OGjP7uWygUHNxaufFLzTDHyN35bJRhosVyH62DEo5HWerNFrnEVT_qzzShtiQiZIwsiLinzXwo3CnSoxjKcnyhQ1FPxnwJ9-HoQ3Qmif40hEZGzCb19-awxZLmf1V4sfjhH-ixDpkAEIXPWHSDnciJNfaHqfNDerOYJ8QSUG1iFZFcvtY5G8PWi7wvgXig3lQhkn_Vq95hlszRfs7qPLCYLUQp15aPPzTypIQ-jxNodpdU0aOW5TNeqbKg5p5F8kyrKkv9Du2ZIUdtfuNmatuDIlSvLTpQo)

Ryan Mackenzie

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan’s first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It’s that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: “Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin.”

In Pennsylvania’s state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn’t just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

clean_body: Congress isn’t working because too many politicians get to Washington and never do what they promised they would when they were running. It’s time to change that by electing leaders with proven records of doing what they say. | | Fellow American, I am the only candidate in the race for Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District who – on DAY ONE – released a comprehensive plan on what I will do when I get to Washington. It’s called my “Four Principles for America Plan.” Grow Our Economy to protect jobs, cut and eliminate taxes, reduce spending, and stop over-regulation. Defend Our Values to protect parents’ rights, promote merit and fairness, respect our police, firefighters, and EMS heroes, and build strong communities. Secure Our Communities by taking on the threat of Communist China, securing our borders, and getting tough on crime and drugs. Restore Our Freedoms by defending the 2nd Amendment, fighting back against the culture of celebrating abortion, and defending democracy, election integrity, religious freedom, and free speech. I am also the only candidate in the race for Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District who has a proven and effective record and can hit the ground running in the fight to get America back on the right track. • Never voted for a tax increase. • Consistently voted to combat illegal immigration – through E-Verify, ending sanctuary cities, and more. • Eliminated the inheritance tax on small businesses in PA. • Voted for curriculum transparency, parental rights, school choice, and to protect women’s sports. • Stood up to PA’s liberal governor and his radical agenda. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | BAD NEWS: Angela Alsobrooks is going up against a self-funded, multi-millionaire opponent in Maryland’s U.S. Senate race that has already spent roughly $2 MILLION on expensive TV ads. WORSE NEWS: According to POLITICO , he’s further committed to spending “tens of millions” of his own dollars to continue running TV ads and boosting his statewide campaign. EVEN WORSE NEWS: Our campaign is having one our slowest fundraising weeks when we can least afford it. | We knew it was going to be a major challenge facing off against an opponent who has broken self-funding records by giving tens of millions to his own congressional campaigns, Peter. But we didn’t expect him to launch expensive TV ads this early! I know this isn’t the best timing. But how we respond right now could decide the outcome of Maryland’s U.S. Senate race, Peter. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thanks for hanging in there with us! —Team Alsobrooks The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Team WFP
subject: The WFP August Newsletter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Read on to learn what we’ve been up to since our last roundup, and how you can take action to keep up the fight. | | | Peter, **** **This is your WFP August Newsletter, a roundup of just some of what our multiracial working-class movement achieved last month thanks to the efforts of amazing members like you.** Read on for need-to-know announcements, victories, and information about the fights ahead:
* * *
**_WFP ENDORSES TWO MORE CHAMPIONS FOR HOUSE AND SENATE IN 2024_** **This month, we were proud to roll out our support for California’s Barbara Lee for U.S. Senate and Raquel Terán for Arizona’s 3****rd****Congressional District.** **Rep. Barbara Lee** is a progressive legend with a long history of making history, including:
* Fighting as a high school student to integrate her cheerleading squad, ultimately becoming the first Black cheerleader in her high school,
* Being the first Black woman elected to the State Assembly and Senate from Northern California,
* Serving as the first woman elected to Congress from her district in 1998, then spearheading nearly every single major piece of HIV/AIDS legislation and working with then-President Bush to secure $15 billion in funding to address the epidemic, and
* In 2001, becoming the _only_ member of Congress to vote against the resolution that gave George W. Bush a blank check for war.

She has never been afraid to take on big fights, and we’re standing with her as she runs for a historic seat in the U.S. Senate. [**The San Francisco Chronicle wrote about our endorsement:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPpqZjfSnt5MvskoXy7KjglWJwSKvcifNMZlxWhf0ePu77QMN2rkVRhpHQwyhVTdNRIYVkILZNfoCG3TNk-CpWsDNfnIGFOWrSOgHGu_iOkGH4tEH9MJXEtFztsOaEZfL7U4TxKAoe3Ed0DhxWTekmMrYDN10UCPUEOqdtoqub6VfrIw27ZBHJ-Q6adLYzfvybje3--_izg9mcQh1qGkhAd4nZPGqUSOKBziXqi2ED7O6EpNQDTLg9oKihCYMo5kHUEYFmZts6lqgzfIu05PLVHDhVMsCvnMmmcn2VDgqDzOqnPCv3wbay6PkoOBD1jwC21tLdwr6za38mig5YBg2gqTGTcll1NRmvI0nqBeZkzUzUzfRVhsWwbE3GoSp6ionw/3yh/KxYSbMJnTnq5DVOXQpqEWQ/h0/58xyEbksa3BKZlnrtj_tEnFuJmzpDD6T86et2UOBP9Y)**** “Winning the battle for progressive voters will be key in California’s U.S. Senate campaign, and Oakland Rep. Barbara Lee just won an early round.” **Arizona’s Raquel Terán** knows how to beat back far-right extremist bullies — and win. She helped lead the charge to defeat Sheriff Joe Arpaio and oust State Senator Russell Pearce — the author of the “show me your papers” law. As a state legislator, she has worked to expand access to affordable healthcare, protect our access to safe, legal abortions, and promote economic opportunity and higher wages for all. Raquel is exactly the kind of powerful voice for working people that we need in the United States Congress. [**WFP Director of Federal Affairs Natalia Salgado told POLITICO,**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDL0195r-gNaKL0NXw0E6jsaFgMC6Z3ialX1-GE_0juN7mHGe_8iuNfsUHzCOwK110te4i51pUE5Hx6AFkb9cpWjfF5x3cv6PolrmzxpgYs3rk8Ip61hYlxZ7-3hQ9-k_HxtRJJaaKkXT9K3nrOmE1Qc004wsh-UBCJRP-cx6_E-sFgENxUqc3-OR33kLAojQcLLZsTwIIQp2ZCb9mXel-X8jvzOgdQ9JKBDg--dOs9QpYcgr3CJ2GsqcsOIk7zzgMQTrneN0gfGNLCX-vQJkpfllT0FlVypMzwC65JJuO2AHvhsP_uOm02oCg4Ux0OaSKhNYcLAZZ3wLbQZeVgvGcTBkISK9G1W1If4MuTeZMwqi/3yh/KxYSbMJnTnq5DVOXQpqEWQ/h1/ndArjxvj1xfTW6NKGPWaK7CEfZNLOIUgjnw9fFGjsGU) “We want to recapture the House. That is a non-negotiable. But we also want to recapture the House with Working Families candidates... We’re excited to do that and we’re especially proud of starting the 2024 election season with the endorsement of a candidate like Raquel Terán.” With champions like these on our side, we’re more fired up than ever to fight for a Working Families Majority in 2024! [**Get involved by joining us for an upcoming volunteer event.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-eRT82z4YLYqpLO_sDfE8BZC2pIa1Jn3y4Qi11g94r5rjEn7Xdyc4u0wRDoBnDOBXXR-r7qoUX7VMcaEFUHJhGGKC1d_zK6fbwPbkX2l3rSrOf02xdG3JTcJy5bdMKXVnMhaeqa5F5jv80C1gH6FcYT-2eTWB9UkiN169wrr6kjhswHJ8OWc0QiK6YtreNfiywruxWSg3z26X8_r9Ly7rx6ybzkyutf9SiPbKEzydKPKt_IBNXDtFwdykvULFp-YMQ/3yh/KxYSbMJnTnq5DVOXQpqEWQ/h2/pquEClyRyBGTOyz1cxRZObWwd_L83NwJvHj4ZghjfHk)
* * *
**_STOP COP CITY CAMPAIGN WINS KEY LEGAL VICTORY_** **In Atlanta, Working Families Power and our partners in the Cop City Vote Coalition are gathering signatures for a city-wide referendum to stop Cop City —** a $90 million urban warfare training facility that would tear down part of the Weelaunee Forest to build a mock city where police forces can test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities. **And last month, we won a major legal victory!** A federal judge has overturned the restriction requiring canvassers to live within the city of Atlanta, meaning that anyone in Georgia can help gather signatures from Atlanta residents. The judge also reset the 60-day window for collection, giving us an additional month (until September 25) to get the 70,000 signatures required to add the referendum to the ballot and let the voters decide. [**Still, the fight against the city government and billion-dollar corporations supporting Cop City is not going to be easy, and we need your support. Can you pitch in to support the efforts to gather 70,000 signatures and stop Cop City now?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVLi2QJPp8Yzmiyw3iSW3IUNf829Jzy-2goFqF_ainnTY5mgyOIdmLbiUWe17hyF35jSSq5A-0z2qB74T5YHHHv8ACEHsvcckyBVUmnth4dUB26Q23W68oSWevLuZ-jyKkPyMhGwfYaL_UmeRTvrVcgzbGbXPTBqFu9OW1vby0eEnr3BYezrNe4gEJVf5BCg8tjjPlZ6PcpAge8bdwFbikYohzKIRsLDaKfXmOdwCMGBF6vsQEqMVtzGocXABdTo-ckKHoSgG5HE2W4YQeTATpjpaP9giHXfzqI_-ddABkCED15O_Uib9NQx8o1sav3ojzsD2DPX-Kg7Lo88KFoDRO5igBf_4VAMQGMJMJbf_HU8a/3yh/KxYSbMJnTnq5DVOXQpqEWQ/h3/ZKEDZwHcFqHbnfVF2Y2Q1pKEJqBGqcrfWIouDKxJnQM) **[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/gXX4IWOWv8a8LHyxcrU5Cxm5QLanQblFPuJ7EzfF5zhuMeZj05l66cQ9f6WMCDUWkM8rNBTjQgQ5xLKi2d-Jg9NwCvBHPLT3ITL0zLRzw1G8Hm_u3W5GIdJnKLx2X90b4nidBZNBPbkLP5cZPHidDOGMKfqTYmJzvPQAxA-IFL4CSvYiu0zhGWVFjBSwxcpIv_DASK2yuPtzPrmWxck3AcXJ9rFCma1GoRVAaSzDjVU0ntXiLKrj6wgSMx5gvhyFTcfSnrZlCNKjX2T7NMKA1u6_5s5cx27URQ9rRjzhPJM/3yh/KxYSbMJnTnq5DVOXQpqEWQ/h4/GMWluz5yFfaKcHmz7V1pkO79oj56II0AfOUfqkVjo4s)**
* * *
**_WFP CHAMPION REP. GREG CASAR FIGHTS FOR WORKERS’ RIGHTS_** Rep. Greg Casar, a WFP champion from Texas elected to Congress last year, led an all-day “thirst strike” on the steps of the U.S. Capitol last week to protest the lack of water breaks many workers receive — even in extreme heat. We’re excited to share that the Biden administration listened, and two days after the strike, **[President Biden announced new steps to protect workers from dangerous temperatures.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEA0Es8AR8U9h_eL5jzwmAKy8CPWXmMSKb979xq4aFRM4lpQfyzJOHP_MkCQvfdebL4NXyvMjsjw0mvcrLo06yhpe24KrDLb9I2LSfg-nLCee54a_tj5iXFtvqT7w2hDL1H-mRjVMGsoZE6pQMtikWiyPul141mWVjS-_CUsMY2eI5TVSzAJNQ6Jc7db4R5zZV5XcqNu_L6rU5hOZxz2PLXVGwg7T7fbr3VHRZ-iN1OqNPAhMo1QYfeSbagWh1IAFGsenjlz9eAO3wQIS7mlYiJY1qgei9cV0mpXREzOn4lgy0V2q3jobbXUJ2ZGFXQCAcLdvYNMi7vK_j5Z4vsWiZH1oJKqCDIHqsk6_mKPv1IFUZdRxYzrGZEPK17IecliTsZdwbWW8FkbxzkxW3GC0s28m8Cun59FCdupBIyc6QbJYRc2swOPaBiOWlQKsPQRG5Buo884EtD4yvyTYUC-gZo/3yh/KxYSbMJnTnq5DVOXQpqEWQ/h5/EFiJ8-w_kbDKqDXSRmE7qFaCZUSvEdNilE2HxleIjeA)** While we still have work to do to expand these protections and make them permanent, they will save lives, and we’re proud to have Greg Casar as a leader in our movement for workers’ rights. [**Rep. Casar told Democracy Now:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFCfwdmC8_rjCDmRl9A4paTOav_ZlTYxHNZt2qeIcIywv102kXzX-2aXQORdgl7UPagX8-uCCj_oUKDAV9gOqlz-NdwPbfNs3GE7hQ4RQCJXLjmOUgdpXFdB8oGyq_cKIAYI-416TtTEf61dDfFi6swe6qFOsKqp7rfxPPr8qmMARNl-l9vWG5SDg_C8wzQaz1MSz8Y9q05-rN3YUIrnM44-sekhnXYue9gxQyADa5AIAzM4M79Djod--pajsCzvOVU3N3Xsdn2Jv5nIpTSO_7GDdcgqAi_67ylE79i_q7RGd_dUyDHND5oST7js54KfHA/3yh/KxYSbMJnTnq5DVOXQpqEWQ/h6/gnyRC73rLqicWL5CJZ6GBr2jqsRzIUIE6P4PEkZH2vQ) “We have to declare a climate emergency, pass heat protections for all workers, and go beyond that, give everybody the right to a union, get everybody a living wage, transition Texas workers from the fossil fuel industry to the renewable energy industry, and save countless workers’ lives in the future; otherwise, we’re all going to be paying for it.”

**_PHILADELPHIA'S KENDRA BROOKS, NICOLAS O’ROURKE, AND JARRETT SMITH MAKE THE BALLOT_** Voters in Philadelphia have the opportunity to elect three candidates running on the Working Families Party ballot line to the City Council and stop Republicans from being handed power by default. The Philadelphia City Council reserves two seats for members of a minority party, and the City Commissioners office reserves one seat. For years, that meant Republicans had an outsized say in city governance — until 2019, when we elected Kendra Brooks as City Councilor At-Large on the WFP ballot line! Now Kendra and PAWFP Organizing Director Nicolas O’Rourke are coming back for both seats on the City Council, and Jarrett Smith is running to replace the sole Republican City Commissioner. **This week Kendra, Nicolas, and Jarrett submitted**** _three times_****the number of signatures required to make the ballot,** proving we have the momentum to win and ensure that Philadelphia is represented by transformational leaders who will fight for working families. [**Read more from Metro Philadelphia.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jS8CPHprIt1T6XpvMztWG_UrjnKb9sd1taeFTlWFyMb6YVfwm0xvP0OwVXD3TIn0MfZ8s-UbhafhwKMEkiFdP3R99UzxpY6l5hWRa4KimkgWiAxYaFMwV1WppcmAkg8NKz4VYnWiqYX7m6cMuI6ys-yvUw0h6IX5NzRNwauuVgC7Hk8icBUkL-KQ5MnpvO7GnXH9OHTMlgpgN4E8fXMuk39hS0w6udy4zuIEOdjU3ALMToo7mo3orY62jWUm_EROY5UPGHuwVL3H1yOnjOBHBr-lCt3WvSiszcV_nNNwdZ-FTg_pkRQmSwe_F8-DZbSKeYtQ7GYdkG8DQi239Jwctzk/3yh/KxYSbMJnTnq5DVOXQpqEWQ/h7/5bpRYlvPaQ5c9ldT0x51zHks1No7U9dYgSJNcZvRuU0)

**_PRIMARY VICTORIES IN TUCSON AND WASHINGTON_** Tuesday was a big night for the Arizona Working Families Party after Tucson City Council member**Lane Santa Cruz** successfully defeated a primary challenger and is now expected to sail to victory in the November general election. Tucson Mayor **Regina Romero** also will move to the November general where she will face an independent challenger who previously received 40% of the vote against Regina in 2019 — assuring a competitive and well-funded race for Mayor in November. Both Regina and Lane are part of a growing progressive movement in Tucson and we are proud to have their backs. And in the state of Washington, we endorsed a slate of candidates in King County and Spokane. While we are still waiting for the election results to be certified later this month, all of our candidates got in the top two and we are feeling confident that our entire slate will head to the general election in November including incumbents Spokane Council President **Betsy Wilkerson** and Seattle City Council member**Tammy Morales,** as well as**Paul Dillon** who is running for Spokane City Council Seattle City Council member, and **Teresa Mosqueda** who is running for King County Council.

**_SPOTLIGHT ON WFP MEMBER, ACTIVIST, AND CAMPAIGN CAMP COUNSELOR CHUCK TYLER_** Chuck Tyler, a dedicated WFP member, veteran, paralegal, and political advocate, has been volunteering as a WFP Campaign Camp Counselor to help develop new leaders and build a country for the many, not the few. "Being a part of the WFP is being a part of a movement for change. I'm proud to contribute to this cause and to mentor the next generation of leaders," says Chuck. From serving our country, to running a nonprofit providing free legal services to veterans, to helping reach voters by facilitating 45,000 doors knocked and 30,000 calls made, Chuck’s tireless efforts to promote equality and justice are deeply valuable. "Working in politics has allowed me to make a tangible impact on our society. Every door we knock on, every call we make, brings us one step closer to a more equitable world," he reflects. We're proud to have Chuck as part of the WFP family, and we look forward to his continued leadership and contributions!

clean_body: Read on to learn what we’ve been up to since our last roundup, and how you can take action to keep up the fight. | | | Peter, ** This is your WFP August Newsletter, a roundup of just some of what our multiracial working-class movement achieved last month thanks to the efforts of amazing members like you. Read on for need-to-know announcements, victories, and information about the fights ahead: WFP ENDORSES TWO MORE CHAMPIONS FOR HOUSE AND SENATE IN 2024 This month, we were proud to roll out our support for California’s Barbara Lee for U.S. Senate and Raquel Terán for Arizona’s 3rdCongressional District. Rep. Barbara Lee is a progressive legend with a long history of making history, including: Fighting as a high school student to integrate her cheerleading squad, ultimately becoming the first Black cheerleader in her high school, Being the first Black woman elected to the State Assembly and Senate from Northern California, Serving as the first woman elected to Congress from her district in 1998, then spearheading nearly every single major piece of HIV/AIDS legislation and working with then-President Bush to secure $15 billion in funding to address the epidemic, and In 2001, becoming the only member of Congress to vote against the resolution that gave George W. Bush a blank check for war. She has never been afraid to take on big fights, and we’re standing with her as she runs for a historic seat in the U.S. Senate. ** “Winning the battle for progressive voters will be key in California’s U.S. Senate campaign, and Oakland Rep. Barbara Lee just won an early round.” Arizona’s Raquel Terán knows how to beat back far-right extremist bullies — and win. She helped lead the charge to defeat Sheriff Joe Arpaio and oust State Senator Russell Pearce — the author of the “show me your papers” law. As a state legislator, she has worked to expand access to affordable healthcare, protect our access to safe, legal abortions, and promote economic opportunity and higher wages for all. Raquel is exactly the kind of powerful voice for working people that we need in the United States Congress. “We want to recapture the House. That is a non-negotiable. But we also want to recapture the House with Working Families candidates... We’re excited to do that and we’re especially proud of starting the 2024 election season with the endorsement of a candidate like Raquel Terán.” With champions like these on our side, we’re more fired up than ever to fight for a Working Families Majority in 2024! STOP COP CITY CAMPAIGN WINS KEY LEGAL VICTORY In Atlanta, Working Families Power and our partners in the Cop City Vote Coalition are gathering signatures for a city-wide referendum to stop Cop City — a $90 million urban warfare training facility that would tear down part of the Weelaunee Forest to build a mock city where police forces can test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities. And last month, we won a major legal victory! A federal judge has overturned the restriction requiring canvassers to live within the city of Atlanta, meaning that anyone in Georgia can help gather signatures from Atlanta residents. The judge also reset the 60-day window for collection, giving us an additional month (until September 25) to get the 70,000 signatures required to add the referendum to the ballot and let the voters decide. WFP CHAMPION REP. GREG CASAR FIGHTS FOR WORKERS’ RIGHTS Rep. Greg Casar, a WFP champion from Texas elected to Congress last year, led an all-day “thirst strike” on the steps of the U.S. Capitol last week to protest the lack of water breaks many workers receive — even in extreme heat. We’re excited to share that the Biden administration listened, and two days after the strike, While we still have work to do to expand these protections and make them permanent, they will save lives, and we’re proud to have Greg Casar as a leader in our movement for workers’ rights. “We have to declare a climate emergency, pass heat protections for all workers, and go beyond that, give everybody the right to a union, get everybody a living wage, transition Texas workers from the fossil fuel industry to the renewable energy industry, and save countless workers’ lives in the future; otherwise, we’re all going to be paying for it.” PHILADELPHIA'S KENDRA BROOKS, NICOLAS O’ROURKE, AND JARRETT SMITH MAKE THE BALLOT Voters in Philadelphia have the opportunity to elect three candidates running on the Working Families Party ballot line to the City Council and stop Republicans from being handed power by default. The Philadelphia City Council reserves two seats for members of a minority party, and the City Commissioners office reserves one seat. For years, that meant Republicans had an outsized say in city governance — until 2019, when we elected Kendra Brooks as City Councilor At-Large on the WFP ballot line! Now Kendra and PAWFP Organizing Director Nicolas O’Rourke are coming back for both seats on the City Council, and Jarrett Smith is running to replace the sole Republican City Commissioner. This week Kendra, Nicolas, and Jarrett submitted three timesthe number of signatures required to make the ballot, proving we have the momentum to win and ensure that Philadelphia is represented by transformational leaders who will fight for working families. PRIMARY VICTORIES IN TUCSON AND WASHINGTON Tuesday was a big night for the Arizona Working Families Party after Tucson City Council memberLane Santa Cruz successfully defeated a primary challenger and is now expected to sail to victory in the November general election. Tucson Mayor Regina Romero also will move to the November general where she will face an independent challenger who previously received 40% of the vote against Regina in 2019 — assuring a competitive and well-funded race for Mayor in November. Both Regina and Lane are part of a growing progressive movement in Tucson and we are proud to have their backs. And in the state of Washington, we endorsed a slate of candidates in King County and Spokane. While we are still waiting for the election results to be certified later this month, all of our candidates got in the top two and we are feeling confident that our entire slate will head to the general election in November including incumbents Spokane Council President Betsy Wilkerson and Seattle City Council memberTammy Morales, as well asPaul Dillon who is running for Spokane City Council Seattle City Council member, and Teresa Mosqueda who is running for King County Council. WFP NATIONAL DIRECTOR MAURICE MITCHELL GIVES KEYNOTE AT NETROOTS NATION Working Families Party National Director Maurice Mitchell gave the opening keynote at the Netroots Nation conference last month in Chicago. His powerful speech about building our multi-racial, multi-generational political movement touched on some of the victories we’ve won and opposition we face in making this a country that works for the many, not the few. Then, SPOTLIGHT ON WFP MEMBER, ACTIVIST, AND CAMPAIGN CAMP COUNSELOR CHUCK TYLER Chuck Tyler, a dedicated WFP member, veteran, paralegal, and political advocate, has been volunteering as a WFP Campaign Camp Counselor to help develop new leaders and build a country for the many, not the few. "Being a part of the WFP is being a part of a movement for change. I'm proud to contribute to this cause and to mentor the next generation of leaders," says Chuck. From serving our country, to running a nonprofit providing free legal services to veterans, to helping reach voters by facilitating 45,000 doors knocked and 30,000 calls made, Chuck’s tireless efforts to promote equality and justice are deeply valuable. "Working in politics has allowed me to make a tangible impact on our society. Every door we knock on, every call we make, brings us one step closer to a more equitable world," he reflects. We're proud to have Chuck as part of the WFP family, and we look forward to his continued leadership and contributions! UPCOMING EVENTS One month from today, we have a chance to increase our Working Families Majority in Congress this year by electing Aaron Regunberg to Rhode Island’s 1st congressional seat. Aaron has been a consistent voice for working families, from winning paid sick days, to making green energy affordable, to raising wages for working people — and just last week Aaron was endorsed by Senator Bernie Sanders! Help us send this progressive to Congress by joining us at the next phonebank for Aaron next Thursday, August 17 at 5 PM ET! : Don’t miss the WFP Welcome Gathering on Thursday, August 24 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT! Whether you joined the WFP yesterday or have been with us from the start, these monthly welcome gatherings are your opportunity to meet with other members and activists in community and discuss how we can build a world where everyone can thrive — not just survive. Join the WFP Text Party on Tuesday, August 29 at 6 PM ET/3 PM PT to grow our movement and support the candidates and legislation that will help people the most. Whether you’re a first-time texter or an experienced pro, you can make a real difference by sharing our message with voters and let them know about the WFP champions and issues in their communities. On Thursday, August 31 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT, the WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution will be discussing Solito: A Memoir by Javier Zamora — a story about the author’s 3000-mile journey to the United States on his own at 9 years old. As a group, we’ll talk about what the book means for our work and how it can guide our own advocacy. Thanks for joining us for another busy month building this people-powered movement! To keep up the fight, we rely on people like you pitching in $10 or whatever they can to make sure that we have the resources to win these campaigns and pass the legislation that our communities need. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . body:
| | | | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=8ecb51d05d&e=c1403f41d3)

| | |
# Campaign News and Views
The Binkley 2024 Campaign is moving forward now more than ever! Keep reading for an update on where we have been and how YOU can make a difference in this campaign!
---
|
---
|
#### **Campaign Milestones**
---
| Another successful week in the books for the Binkley 2024 Campaign! From joining 12 other GOP presidential candidates at the Lincoln Dinner to reaching national media on a Fox Business interview, Team Binkley is going strong!

---
| |
---
### Lincoln Dinner
Ryan spoke alongside other GOP presidential candidates in Des Moines, Iowa at the 2023 Lincoln Dinner Fundraiser.

_Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=8d6e57edce&e=c1403f41d3) for the full speach._
---
| |
---
### Fox Business Interview
Neil Cavuto interviewed Ryan on Fox Business to discuss his message of Unity and Freedom for the nation. This was an incredible milestone for the Binkley Campaign in reaching national media!

_Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=08b67c28a9&e=c1403f41d3) for full Fox interview._
---
| Ryan will be returning to Fox Business for an interview this Monday, August 7th in the 1:30-3pm time space! Stay tuned for more from Ryan's national media interview.
---
| |
---
### Dartmouth College
Binkley made his first public appearance in New Hampshire this week, and he kicked it off with a visit to the Rockefeller Center for Public Policy and Social Sciences at Dartmouth College.
---
|
---
| _**Coming Up...**_
---
| |
---
### Fair-Side Chats with Gov. Kim Reynolds
Mark you calendars for August 15th at the Iowa State Fair! Ryan will be joining Governor Kim Reynolds for her "Fair-Side Chats" as she interviews presidential candidates. If you're in Iowa, come out with your friends and family to support Ryan!
---
| |
---
### YRNC Dallas
Ryan will be speaking at the 2023 Texas and Young Republicans Convention in Dallas on August 18th. Along with many other political activists, Ryan will be sharing his heart for the United States.

_Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=06eeb6e22f&e=c1403f41d3) to buy tickets._
---
|
---
| **How Can I Help?** • _**LIKE AND COMMENT**_ on all social media posts
• A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way!
• Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow
• Lastly, _**DONATE & SHARE**_ the link with everyone you know! We need 200 donors in 20 states as a part of another requirement of our 40k donors!
---
|
---
| **We need 40,000 unique donors to make it to the first debate stage, and we are currently nearing the 10,000 donor mark! **

**We are asking anyone who sees this message to take one moment to donate just one dollar and send the link to 10 new people to reach our goal. BE THE DIFFERENCE in allowing this message reach the nation!**

Friend, Have you seen this email from JVP Action PAC supporting me and Cori Bush as we advocate for Palestinian rights? I’m honored to work for justice alongside my Jewish neighbors. Jewish Voice for Peace Action activists in my community and across the country are standing up to save lives. In Congress, my sister in service Cori Bush has been a crucial ally helping to grow the momentum to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses. As the government of Israel increases violence against Palestinians, pro-apartheid groups are attacking us for speaking out. We cannot let up in our struggle for liberation and to hold the Israeli apartheid government accountable. **[Can you split a donation today between my campaign and Cori Bush’s campaign so we can withstand attacks as we advocate for Palestinians’ human clean_body: | | | Friend, Have you seen this email from JVP Action PAC supporting me and Cori Bush as we advocate for Palestinian rights? I’m honored to work for justice alongside my Jewish neighbors. Jewish Voice for Peace Action activists in my community and across the country are standing up to save lives. In Congress, my sister in service Cori Bush has been a crucial ally helping to grow the momentum to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses. As the government of Israel increases violence against Palestinians, pro-apartheid groups are attacking us for speaking out. We cannot let up in our struggle for liberation and to hold the Israeli apartheid government accountable. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Together, we’re building a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being. In solidarity, Rashida Tlaib \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Beth Miller at JVP Action PAC for Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Aug 4, 2023 Subject: Now is the time to show up for the members of Congress who are calling for a true end to U.S. complicity in Israeli apartheid. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Dear Friend, Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib are two of the most consistent champions for Palestinian rights on Capitol Hill. Now, they’re being attacked for their bold stances—and we need to have their backs. Time and time again, I have seen Rashida rise on the House floor to defend the basic humanity of her Palestinian community and family. Time and time again, I have seen Cori boldly and unapologetically condemn Israel’s apartheid government. I’ve been brought to tears seeing their bravery and solidarity. It’s time to show up for Cori and Rashida. Recently, Cori and Rashida were part of a small group of progressives who opposed a horrible GOP resolution that denied Israeli apartheid and reaffirmed unconditional support for the government of Israel, despite its rapidly escalating violence against Palestinians. The next day, both congresswomen boycotted the speech of Israeli president Isaac Herzog, in protest of Israel’s racist policies. Predictably, pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC have been coming for Cori and Rashida ever since. Especially as Jewish Americans, it’s crucial that we back our champions up as they face vicious smear campaigns from anti-Palestinian groups. Now is the time to show up for the members of Congress who are calling for a true end to U.S. complicity in Israeli apartheid. In solidarity, Beth Miller Political Director, JVP Action PAC P.S. Defend our champions— * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Abortion is banned or restricted in **20 states**. Abortion bans have been blocked by courts in **five other states**. Abortion is still legal for now in **Virginia** , but the only way to ensure it stays that way is to flip the state legislature _this November_ , which is why we've endorsed 29 women in Virginia state legislative races.

In the remaining 24 states, abortion is legal and **likely to remain protected** — _if_ we're able to hold the Senate and take back the House in 2024. Republicans in Congress have made it clear they intend to pass a **national abortion ban** if they regain power. **The last midterm elections proved that the only way to prevent and reverse abortion bans is to keep anti-choice Republicans out of power at _all_ levels of government. name: Team Pramila
subject: Pramila always fights for what is right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Republicans are launching attack after attack against Pramila. It won't work.
#
Peter,
Republicans and the far right are launching attack after attack against Pramila for her tireless work and relentless fight for racial justice, gender justice, economic justice, and environmental justice.
But you can't bully Pramila Jayapal. She is not afraid to stand up for trans rights. She'll always be outspoken on human rights everywhere in the world. She will never back down in the fight for abortion access, gun safety, and taking on big corporate special interests who work against poor and working people.
Republicans will do anything to stop Pramila's fight for justice. But she'll never stop building a more powerful, diverse, and progressive movement. **Let's show her we have her back.**
>From her years as an organizer for immigrants' rights to her leadership in Congress to pass bold, visionary policy, Pramila has never let the cynics bring her down or stop her from doing what's right.
That's why we need to have her back, Peter. **[If you support Pramila's work to empower marginalized voices, please chip in today to power our movement.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42995?refcode=em20230805-2776&t=1&akid=2776%2E420207%2EuJRzos)**
**[Chip in ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42995?refcode=em20230805-2776&t=20&akid=2776%2E420207%2EuJRzos)**
Powerful special interests and extreme right-wing MAGA Republicans want Washington D.C. to keep working for them, while poor and working people in the United States and across the world continue to face an accelerating climate crisis, diminished fundamental rights, and an economy that doesn't work for them.
**Pramila knows we can't let that stand.**
Every day in Congress, Pramila fights for people who are too often taken advantage of, overlooked, or forgotten. It's not the easy way, but it's the only way that Pramila knows how to shake up the status quo and deliver for the people who most desperately need change. _She will always speak truth to power._
**Peter, now more than ever, we need to come together and use our collective voice to show our support for Pramila.****[If you stand with her, please chip in $3 or any amount you can spare to boost our momentum and power this fight.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42995?refcode=em20230805-2776&t=21&akid=2776%2E420207%2EuJRzos)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230805-2776-footer&t=22&refcode2=2776_420207_uJRzos&akid=2776%2E420207%2EuJRzos)**

Let me explain.

But I know this election will be a close one – and the leading Republican in this race has reported a massive fundraising haul. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks, Shawn = = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Our email program is an important way to reach our valued supporters, and this email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:

**Issue 1 Special Election
This Tuesday, August 8th
Please vote "YES"!**

---
| If you haven't already voted, please make sure to do so between now and August 8th! For more information on Issue 1, click the image below or click [HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0aaa010e4c&e=5c740fa3e2).
