**CANDIDATES NEEDED!
In Every Ohio County
For County GOP Central Committees**

---
|
[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=20c84e1415&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| For months, a growing team of people has been building a statewide, structured organization to help grassroots, tax-paying, God-fearing, hard-working Ohioans take back control of the Ohio Republican Party using "The Precinct Strategy". This a call for leaders, team members, and most importantly CANDIDATES (to run for all 88 Ohio County GOP Central Committees).

If you're considering running as a candidate, the Precinct Strategy team will help you, educate you, and guide you every step of the way, from registering with your Board of Election to gain "ballot access", to campaigning, to suggestions & brain-storming on what to do once you're elected. _**YOU WILL NOT BE ON YOUR OWN!**_

_**This is TIME SENSITIVE. You must register to run by the middle of December!**_

If you are interested in learning more, or participating in your county, please go to the [Ohio Precinct Strategy and be sure to register](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1185582012&e=5c740fa3e2 "Ohio Precinct Strategy"), or send an email to **[GFIOhio@proton.me](mailto:GFIOhio@proton.me?subject=Ohio%20Liberator%20Caucus).**

---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8483f0e134&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| **How Can You Help GFI?**
You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our **network**. You can forward them this email and ask them to:

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=daf2d40c64&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| If you want to text an invite to someone, just cut and paste this into a text (or email):

I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me.

Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started!

Thanks!

[http://eepurl.com/h1wIZ5](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5f74457989&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
GFIOhio@proton.me
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=97d29ddc38) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=97d29ddc38).

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

When you talk to her, you find out that she is a real person who is obsessed with her Clemson Tigers, loves music, and lights up when someone hands her a baby to hold. As governor, she took on the establishment in South Carolina and made government more accountable, transparent, and conservative. She faced natural disasters and a mass shooting with decisiveness and compassion that saved lives. Her number one focus as governor was turning South Carolina’s double-digit unemployment into a thriving jobs state because she knows that families can’t survive without good jobs.” CONTINUE READING >> Michigan's Governor Gretchen Whitmer is stealing a page from Joe Biden’s soft-on-China playbook. subject: Exactly seven months from Election Day

body:
Our opponent is already running misleading ads attacking Katie.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27695%2E3422442%2Eyh_Th8)
We are exactly seven months out from California’s Primary Election, which will determine which two candidates advance to the General Election in November.
**Seven months out, here’s where things stand:**
1. Our opponent is already running misleading ads attacking Katie.
2. Public and internal polling consistently show Katie with a narrow lead.
3. Another candidate in this race raised more than double what we did in the last fundraising quarter.

We know we have what it takes to win and send Katie to fight for families in the U.S. Senate. But our fundraising has lagged behind. **[Can you help us close the gap and make a donation of $7, or whatever makes sense for your budget today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230805?refcode=EMAK05_LOB_20230805_V1_F&refcode2=27695_3422442_yh_Th8&akid=27695%2E3422442%2Eyh_Th8)

Thank you!
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK05_LOB_20230805_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27695_3422442_yh_Th8&akid=27695%2E3422442%2Eyh_Th8)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Trump, DeSantis, TEAM VIVEK 📈
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsZ9e5FDNg

Vivek 2024

The latest Fox News poll has us in third place, ahead of
Mike Pence, Tim Scott, and Nikki Haley!

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osZ9e5FDNg

Fellow American - did you see
this polling from Fox News?

🚨 We're polling in third
place, ahead of Mike Pence, Tim Scott, and Nikki Haley! 🚨

Fellow American, are you feeling
the Ramaswamy TSUNAMI?

Polling numbers like this are KEY
to securing a prime spot on the debate stage.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY
DAY meeting with voters, but I could really use your help in
securing new donors before the day is over.

Chip in $1 ➔

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $15 ➔

Chip in $25 ➔

Chip in $50 ➔

Chip in More ➔

We cannot afford to let the
recent polling momentum we've built peter out. Please help before
midnight!

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. name: Wiley Nickel
subject: The inevitable summer slump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Dear Peter –
I hope you’ve been able to embrace the sunshine and enjoy the summer months surrounded by friends and family! I’m reaching out to express my appreciation for your unwavering support and commitment to our campaign in July.
Summer is notorious for its slower fundraising - It can be quite a stressful time for political campaigns and finance directors. But at a time when all campaigns seem to be faltering, ours stands out, and it’s because of folks like you.
As we move closer to the 2024 election, I’m extremely grateful for your continued support. Whether it's by spreading the word among friends and family, volunteering your time, or making a donation, every contribution matters. Your incredible efforts have already made a significant impact, and together, we’ll go even further.
I couldn’t be more proud. Team Wiley is writing a chapter in our nation's history that reflects the power of the people and the values we hold dear. Once again, thank you from the bottom of my heart for being a part of this journey with me. I’m honored to have you on my team.
With gratitude,
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Wiley Nickel

Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e02976a632ad488db72e078369c77435&_e=HkVlLH60H8_wfqiQ33ofXXpjzcFkiM5FOB4lSc1EoS5ktWzla-cL0fmN5b1WIuFtoY3JjnZW756wHaA2JfqxRa2I1ZBpE2IpMOYdzl7EHhrq19wBuasdQBRRw2LTZz3sWG6GpreHDaJX4PW3Qna4vS870TB7AyF-atd3VcbGpFM8ApP5z3SNvOPgaQHpM57GT3_8if4MWAjPtToaRjuWrhCJXDEThNi_i8HZHj-vEb0151a898KDDUP7fZlSDUyI1ZIZnO-s6FRsfRoLypfZavPfOjI-SMpAbPJcjZKao-3iyIZ0bKvGvWgWGw-Jxhgf7XknujwR1LIGoisYcUWVwz160aPPOn09QhbGKN2_Jw5AtpfKZOyPxiHawEUUvktQ "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e02976a632ad488db72e078369c77435&_e=HkVlLH60H8_wfqiQ33ofXXpjzcFkiM5FOB4lSc1EoS5ktWzla-cL0fmN5b1WIuFtoY3JjnZW756wHaA2JfqxRa2I1ZBpE2IpMOYdzl7EHhrq19wBuasdQBRRw2LTZz3sWG6GpreHDaJX4PW3Qna4vS870TB7AyF-atd3VcbGpFM8ApP5z3SNvOPgaQHpM57GT3_8if4MWAjPtToaRjuWrhCJXDEThNi_i8HZHj-vEb1SYu5cyHHgxluHuZ352acgWpmVLBvJmD5U3jiCF6_i5jspUWvBRYlcQ3Bhu9DJ2UeFy9_D5bhSMenZmO4RnS8u9RXM9bMY3TZIAiUcZi0VmF0WU-lU7Ji5SHaLC0xuOqSbIJiWMEe0RljZPM5TUn08 "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e02976a632ad488db72e078369c77435&_e=HkVlLH60H8_wfqiQ33ofXXpjzcFkiM5FOB4lSc1EoS5ktWzla-cL0fmN5b1WIuFtoY3JjnZW756wHaA2JfqxRa2I1ZBpE2IpMOYdzl7EHhrq19wBuasdQBRRw2LTZz3sWG6GpreHDaJX4PW3Qna4vS870TB7AyF-atd3VcbGpFM8ApP5z3SNvOPgaQHpM57GT3_8if4MWAjPtToaRjuWrhCJXDEThNi_i8HZHj-vEb1VsSelRCMKCBhKlMuYrgo3DbG18aVwd7KXcRyW4fAC109HcA-sXjjqlBdk7dVeQW5uZMHe5-0pj1nJOa75SV0yGnrPpljiMZmSdhm-G3zwoN11sH_dDQMTzGj3vDErcgpdFG8skvoV-_8Ug3vN6cdI "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e02976a632ad488db72e078369c77435&_e=HkVlLH60H8_wfqiQ33ofXXpjzcFkiM5FOB4lSc1EoS5ktWzla-cL0fmN5b1WIuFtoY3JjnZW756wHaA2JfqxRa2I1ZBpE2IpMOYdzl7EHhrq19wBuasdQBRRw2LTZz3sWG6GpreHDaJX4PW3Qna4vS870TB7AyF-atd3VcbGpFM8ApP5z3SNvOPgaQHpM57GT3_8if4MWAjPtToaRjuWrhCJXDEThNi_i8HZHj-vEb0vVvTYzbzglHLVN5xuPGtbefI0lUsc1WLLWUke_6ItrFiI0Lyjso30DhDLD5Bt_e5tlkW5izkoxwq1X2uDl7skg1a2R-3kK4sddU-es_9cYI1vcUq3ClwoLB-QQNPQTU0LdxDFepsXj0EtsdlFlm2s "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e02976a632ad488db72e078369c77435&_e=HkVlLH60H8_wfqiQ33ofXXpjzcFkiM5FOB4lSc1EoS5ktWzla-cL0fmN5b1WIuFtoY3JjnZW756wHaA2JfqxRa2I1ZBpE2IpMOYdzl7EHhrq19wBuasdQBRRw2LTZz3sWG6GpreHDaJX4PW3Qna4vS870TB7AyF-atd3VcbGpFM8ApP5z3SNvOPgaQHpM57GT3_8if4MWAjPtToaRjuWrhCJXDEThNi_i8HZHj-vEb3GJy9NUxjk9gGsfmwpCuR3FpGPNqspPKcXP1YREg016fr-vDR4MDiH0LqQeEtOZCbuPswzyLnlj1VppCde0u0svo9wa7A-baBzN3saQD2jhRnRnhlxk5ro_JEkheu7hO2leecf4nSoR4ecUOGeIkVO "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e02976a632ad488db72e078369c77435&_e=HkVlLH60H8_wfqiQ33ofXXpjzcFkiM5FOB4lSc1EoS5ktWzla-cL0fmN5b1WIuFtoY3JjnZW756wHaA2JfqxRa2I1ZBpE2IpMOYdzl7EHhrq19wBuasdQBRRw2LTZz3sWG6GpreHDaJX4PW3Qna4vS870TB7AyF-atd3VcbGpFM8ApP5z3SNvOPgaQHpM57GT3_8if4MWAjPtToaRjuWrhCJXDEThNi_i8HZHj-vEb1zWyZ24h-b2hkXjYvzRQ5V__agy57cI73MlRCdAKboD9HrIn9YprP4PWPkTJV5TFWGBGPKTaA7Hs1WZCwjSe9bobAlfyWDzARYEwB2q85JY-X5YKtLzsHhJT4oWrjIejZnfQIUOvN1nYjzPRjvAfup "Renew before it’s too late >>>")_**

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Bob Casey
subject: I’m writing with an important request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important

| Hello Peter,

I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — [_**but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between Fight for Progress and my campaign at this link knowing how grateful I am for your support.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67630120/420355099/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230803-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MmNhZGM2LWIxMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GvxymKKeljtvIb263seZsX3gDt-UjLQzsFZ5OjRbwyQ=)

The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is.

This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too.

It is hard to understate the stakes, Peter: Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year.

We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set.

[_**Can I count on you to split a contribution of $5 or more between Fight for Progress and my re-election campaign today, Peter? I need your help to keep PA blue.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67630121/420355106/-1611259197?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230803-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MmNhZGM2LWIxMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GvxymKKeljtvIb263seZsX3gDt-UjLQzsFZ5OjRbwyQ=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67630122/420355107/-1611259197?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230803-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MmNhZGM2LWIxMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GvxymKKeljtvIb263seZsX3gDt-UjLQzsFZ5OjRbwyQ=)

Bob Casey

clean_body: I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important | Hello Peter, I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — = The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is. This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too. It is hard to understate the stakes, Peter: Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year. We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set. = | = Thank you for your support, Bob Casey * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Deya at United We Dream Action
subject: We want a pathway to citizenship, not to be c*ps 🙄
body:
We need your help to keep up the fight. | | | Peter, Right-wing Congresswoman Lauren Boebert recently attacked DACA recipients on Twitter (or is it “X” now?), blasting Illinois for allowing DACA recipients to apply for policing jobs. But Rep. Boebert fails to understand: **_We don’t want to be cops._** 🙄 We’re fighting for a path to citizenship and to abolish ICE, not to become the law enforcement officers that harass and intimidate our communities daily. Illinois and Lauren Boebert can keep their policing jobs, we’re not interested. Until they can offer real and expansive protections, they can find other people “to protect and to serve.” UWDA is leading the fight for a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and ALL undocumented people, so we can have the freedom to live and work in a way that actually serves us. **Can you pitch in any amount today to help UWDA win that pathway to citizenship for ALL immigrants?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP87cRrEANGDGqJIDRtsWXK2wMOUV7V8xdDf_vlrZ_952fJdjk1Jd-KrFpC1whmNQWpviHZGXNH0RijdAFeax7QykNuvrsm9FF7vkfkqjkBXu-Z8yD-DIT3GriDVy1Rot9RpVh5F4D97OkBdUUYDOYmCRkGfRaarkxq4rRHLpLE9A-iNRViO_dYbHPjrRS2ULmT8ObtO4D1rSg1Xs1lbIkjTN_0Z8EJrmb75jAviK7exmMjuXIDF5uhKuV86sLG4V3VirWazgWiHf7bvsEcU8EM2_0I4ujiMvVYA4Qi6NMVQfLa-RO1_fpt7oy-wVodY7gc6uEI3MwIwh69J4Jv7ScWIXpvKjDgYN8va3sE945b08gvZmPty09DzN17XeymKh_8BUobWYQCg-j5wl0rit8AS4sZfnmH5BDt8t3y0DZLIogZvDyXQvh7TOYnpcL2awENQh5V_ranZQwzAPwYtKZxmYp72R00Ri-JxUQbEMT2b64/3yh/YSDWTTYRRp2YK4sdwy2ocQ/h0/dT5vt16fZQB_-8qRMNDoBK1pOKtUXEDZ_olLuzL2kYg)

clean_body: We need your help to keep up the fight. | | | Peter, Right-wing Congresswoman Lauren Boebert recently attacked DACA recipients on Twitter (or is it “X” now?), blasting Illinois for allowing DACA recipients to apply for policing jobs. But Rep. Boebert fails to understand: We don’t want to be cops. 🙄 We’re fighting for a path to citizenship and to abolish ICE, not to become the law enforcement officers that harass and intimidate our communities daily. Illinois and Lauren Boebert can keep their policing jobs, we’re not interested. Until they can offer real and expansive protections, they can find other people “to protect and to serve.” UWDA is leading the fight for a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and ALL undocumented people, so we can have the freedom to live and work in a way that actually serves us. Can you pitch in any amount today to help UWDA win that pathway to citizenship for ALL immigrants? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We are here to stay. But we’re definitely not here to be cops. 😂 Thank you for your support, Deya, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. name: Jon Tester
subject: We’re running this campaign differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi there.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding
day in 1905. That was seven years before they picked out a flat piece of
grassland just outside Big Sandy to build their homestead.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19007?t=1001&akid=3465%2E346206%2EsHwCNv ][IMG]

That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up;
and where Sharla and I raised our kids and still farm the land.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating
windstorms, bitter cold, shooting fire, poisonous snakes—pretty much
everything but locusts. And in the late teens, the drought hit, wiping out
the farm entirely. My grandparents were forced to leave.

But they were determined to return to their homestead. They saved up
enough to start all over again on the same little piece of land. They had
a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill,
their healthy son and daughters (including newborn Helen, my mom), strong
muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking
Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. Folks like our
teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that
works for them.

But too many Washington politicians are deep in the pockets of right-wing
special interests. They promise one thing when the camera is rolling, then
make secret backroom deals with their wealthy megadonors.

That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign
differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what
you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the
outside groups and Republican attacks.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19008?t=1002&akid=3465%2E346206%2EsHwCNv ]Can I count on you to split a contribution today between my campaign
and Charles Booker? Your donation (no matter the size) *sows the seeds* of
our movement, ensuring we grow and build the resources we need to win.

CHIP IN →

Thanks for your support. Together, we can keep me in Washington fighting
for the little guy.

Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19008?t=1003&akid=3465%2E346206%2EsHwCNv ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230805-3465-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3465_346206_sHwCNv&akid=3465%2E346206%2EsHwCNv

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3465%2E346206%2EsHwCNv

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Derek — We’re
already five days into August, so we're giving you five reasons to chip in
$5 to Adam’s campaign for the U.S. Senate.

1. For his entire career, Adam has delivered results for the hardworking
families in his district — and he will do the same for every
Californian. Whether it’s improving our roads and schools or bringing
good-paying jobs to the area, Adam is laser-focused on improving lives
day after day.
2. This is Adam’s first statewide campaign, so millions of voters need to
be introduced to Adam. We’re traveling across the Golden State in the
coming weeks and need your support to keep Adam on the road.
3. He has a proven record of holding Donald Trump and his cronies
accountable. From serving as an impeachment manager to sitting on the
House Select Committee on the January 6 Attack, Adam has the
experience needed to keep MAGA extremism at bay in the halls of power.

4. Adam has never wavered in his efforts to hold Trump accountable —
which has made Adam the GOP’s number one target. The censures, the
insults, the lies. The Fox News interviews and the speeches on the
House floor smearing his record. Your support helps us cut through the
noise and uplift Adam’s achievements.
5. By chipping in $5 today, you’re showing you believe in the movement
Adam is building and standing strong with his mission to build a
California for All. We know we can count on Adam to fight for more
affordable housing, a greener economy, better schools, and more.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=aug2023_abs_em.dpa5x5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230805_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=3260%2E5257348%2EIVw9W1 ]With all of these reasons in mind, can we count on you to pitch in $5

subject: Our communities thrive when we’re all connected

body:
|
#
---
Hi friends, Delivering resources to communities in Central and Southern Illinois is one of Nikki’s top priorities in Congress. And earlier this week, Nikki joined U.S. Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg and several Illinois elected officials to announce two new major, federally-funded infrastructure projects that she worked hard to secure. The first project is a $22.6 million federal grant to eliminate a dangerous rail crossing in the Village of Savoy — and the second is $28 million in U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT) federal funding toward repairing damages on the MetroLink public transit system, following devistating floods last year. Our communities thrive when we’re all connected, so it’s critical that we invest in our infrastructure and public transportation so that every person — regardless of income level, race, background or zip code — can access every part of our region. Nikki looks forward to improving transportation efficiency _and_ jump-starting economic growth throughout our district as a result of these major investments. **[If you support Nikki’s work to bring federal funding back to our district, so we can build communities where all of us thrive, will you reaffirm your support by signing on now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67633727/420360496/532955265?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjFkNzljYy1iNTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8wska89noDsB6jwFWqPotLwxraqzE3NX-fqbAWMunQQ=&emci=131d79cc-b533-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=1b1d79cc-b533-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67633728/420360497/532955265?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjFkNzljYy1iNTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8wska89noDsB6jwFWqPotLwxraqzE3NX-fqbAWMunQQ=&emci=131d79cc-b533-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=1b1d79cc-b533-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Share your thoughts on how to save America | I look forward to debating my Republican competitors and speaking hard truths. I want to hear from you, Peter. Submit your thoughts before our poll closes in just one (1) hour. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Petitions Team @ HER Time
subject: Tell drug companies: price birth control fairly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67641610/420366909/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmExYTdkZmYtYmEzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8W4mOb8wa_X_3NL3lIMf-AZ56leqDcfuCWSlwO3P9Zk=)
---
Peter, Recently, the FDA approved a birth control pill for over-the-counter sale. That means that anyone, of any age, will soon be able to purchase oral contraception without a prescription from a doctor. That removes a huge hurdle to birth control access for many folks, who might not have the time or resources to go see a doctor for a birth control pill prescription. Now, though, the next question we have to ask is: _How much is this going to cost?_ Currently, insurance companies are not required to cover over-the-counter medicines, meaning this could be an entirely out-of-pocket cost. The pill’s manufacturer hasn’t yet announced the price of the drug. [_**Before they name a price, we want to team up with reproductive rights advocates like you and demand this over-the-counter birth control be priced fairly — to keep it accessible and affordable for the tons of folks who stand to benefit. Will you add your name now to apply pressure?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67641614/420366910/317618776?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmExYTdkZmYtYmEzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8W4mOb8wa_X_3NL3lIMf-AZ56leqDcfuCWSlwO3P9Zk=&emci=641a7dff-ba33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6a1a7dff-ba33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67641616/420366912/317618776?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230805_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmExYTdkZmYtYmEzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8W4mOb8wa_X_3NL3lIMf-AZ56leqDcfuCWSlwO3P9Zk=&emci=641a7dff-ba33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6a1a7dff-ba33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400)

clean_body: | = Peter, Recently, the FDA approved a birth control pill for over-the-counter sale. That means that anyone, of any age, will soon be able to purchase oral contraception without a prescription from a doctor. That removes a huge hurdle to birth control access for many folks, who might not have the time or resources to go see a doctor for a birth control pill prescription. Now, though, the next question we have to ask is: How much is this going to cost? Currently, insurance companies are not required to cover over-the-counter medicines, meaning this could be an entirely out-of-pocket cost. The pill’s manufacturer hasn’t yet announced the price of the drug. | Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| | It’s been a long _Countdown_ to this moment ... Queen Bey is in Maryland! 👑 🐝 Not only are we welcoming a _Flawless_ cultural icon and _Irreplaceable_ musical talent, but a personal inspiration to my daughter, me, and women around the world. When she said _girls run the world_ , she didn’t lie. 👏🏾 Beyoncé’s music gets me through early morning workouts, even on the days when I’d rather hit snooze. She’s on the playlist when I hit the dance floor, and I’ve always got _Renaissance_ blasting before an important event or speech! Her music inspires me to always raise the bar and to raise my voice for the things that matter, unapologetically. And if I’m lucky enough to be elected Maryland’s next senator, I’ll be dancing to Beyoncé all the way to the Senate! **[I need your help to make that dream a reality. So, in the words of Queen Bey, will you chip in $7, $11, or more to help us cover all those campaign _Bills, Bills, Bills_ and get us in _Formation_ for the fight ahead?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4681?t=9&amount=11&akid=325%2E52803%2E3-9GMb)** | | | [Chip in $7](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4681?t=10&amount=7&akid=325%2E52803%2E3-9GMb)

body:
| | | **Friend – Donald Trump attacked me on Truth Social, calling me "one of the worst in the Senate!"** It's never been more clear: The GOP is doing everything it can to replace me with a Trump yes-man and flip the Senate red. To be clear, I'm not scared of their attacks. But I do know that where Trump goes GOP dark money follows – and if I'm being attacked this early in the race, we're in for a long, challenging and expensive road ahead. name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: An update on Bob’s campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=413%2E552475%2Ep7hg7s)
Hi Peter,
Bob and our whole team have been busy lately planning our campaign strategy for the weeks and months ahead, so I wanted to give you an update.
During one of our planning sessions, Bob said something that stuck in my mind: **"This race is about the whole country."**
Senate control and the Presidency could come down to Pennsylvania — and we’re going to need to raise historic resources to take on a potential self-funding GOP opponent, national Republican mega-donors, and right-wing super PACs.
In 2022, nearly $400 million was spent on the U.S. Senate race in Pennsylvania. _This cycle, national Republicans could spend even more._ Grassroots donors like you are going to determine if we have what it takes to fight back.
[**I’m personally asking: Will you rush $5 or whatever you can to support our campaign, keep Pennsylvania’s Senate seat blue, and defend our Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230805-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230805-2&refcode2=413_552475_p7hg7s&akid=413%2E552475%2Ep7hg7s)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230805-2?refcode=em20230805-2&refcode2=413_552475_p7hg7s&akid=413%2E552475%2Ep7hg7s)**
I know folks can’t chip in to every email, and we don’t expect you to. But I also know we can’t afford to lose this race and put Senate control back in the hands of Mitch McConnell and the GOP — so I’m grateful to anyone who can chip in today.
Thank you in advance,
Tiernan
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=413%2E552475%2Ep7hg7s)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=413%2E552475%2Ep7hg7s)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

body:
| | | Team — We know your inbox is filled with emails, but we wanted to make sure you saw Zoe’s message. The fight for the House next year runs through California, so we need to start gearing up now.

Can we count on you to chip in? Here’s the link to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lvf_aug_2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67647275/420372133/1014802799?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_ZL_20230806_FR_NA_0_3MO_TeamLofgren_NA_NA_California2024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmM1N2E1Yy1jMzMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TIQZFjLPYaiYjYZ0I2EuhLOZT77snYR6uMJtHaEbGTY=)

_**— Zoe’s message —**_

The fight for the House will run through California. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67647276/420372134/1014802799?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_ZL_20230806_FR_NA_0_3MO_TeamLofgren_NA_NA_California2024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmM1N2E1Yy1jMzMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TIQZFjLPYaiYjYZ0I2EuhLOZT77snYR6uMJtHaEbGTY=) News outlets are confirming what we already know: California is key to winning back the House Majority next year. California is home to 10 must-win seats — that’s more than any other state.

The GOP will pick up seats here by pouring in millions of dollars and recruiting candidates who will tow the line for Kevin McCarthy — and enable Donald Trump and his apologists.

This is serious. One Democratic-held open seat here in California was already deemed as the best pickup for Republicans in the 2024 fight for the House.

We need to take action today. [Can you donate $10 to make sure we have the resources to protect our California seats from the GOP and flip others to take back the House in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67647277/420372135/1014802799?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_ZL_20230806_FR_NA_0_3MO_TeamLofgren_NA_NA_California2024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmM1N2E1Yy1jMzMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TIQZFjLPYaiYjYZ0I2EuhLOZT77snYR6uMJtHaEbGTY=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=c1bce842620a4362bac4697754d6f3ca&_e=ZByo_egzfaymwV2jPh7XnEveG3d1pHxxZfhP7Y2VtlzowKrrsF33V_Hlc_pP5PA6_yLwNdinXMcfdeDrkwalymdDw9q_iZpPYL6qMn3evWD5A6HUcV6dNILJgqxe_diQ367zsxEDaAJ6237NCyaKOARc2yVHCjCv6lraQptCsSmsQzahyCQ8WqRSaUY35xbi8Td3gE2qK-LJSr-1FV7LVO8ixa3exgM-hgeLIOsqfbZFlG6AFcdnmudD-hBtHhTcZWIvxISavH_52kgc4HNP55daKIcECjshk64wfEEmoT0W6cWoOajwY2WA1Ruf53XkXBZbdpAZHJT7x5S0hDgqXqcplxhfRbxvHXCdolSZbWwAvYLHH0Lb_IXXHnqjw7rM)
---
| | Our allies need us, my friend. Vladimir Putin's war on Ukraine has become a contentious topic among Americans. But Will Hurd believes we need to continue to stay focused on this conflict. _**Why? **_**→** Because they have the potential to impact our economy, our security, and our future.
---
---
Will has made it clear – _**Russia's invasion of Ukraine is wrong and America has to stand strong next to its ally. **_ The consequences of allowing Russia to invade without resistance and failure to support Ukraine are far-reaching. Since the invasion, the US saw a 45% decrease in exports to Ukraine and a 27% decrease in imports. Our sanctions on Russia have helped slow down their war machine, but the Biden administration's energy policies have increased our dependence on foreign dictators for oil and gas and have driven up energy prices. **America must stand by our allies and give them the support they need.** [_**Donate $1 to get common sense on this complicated issue on the national debate stage.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=c1bce842620a4362bac4697754d6f3ca&_e=ZByo_egzfaymwV2jPh7XnEveG3d1pHxxZfhP7Y2VtlzowKrrsF33V_Hlc_pP5PA6_yLwNdinXMcfdeDrkwalymdDw9q_iZpPYL6qMn3evWD5A6HUcV6dNILJgqxe_diQ367zsxEDaAJ6237NCyaKOARc2yVHCjCv6lraQptCsSmsQzahyCQ8WqRSaUY35xbi8Td3gE2qK-LJSr-1FV7LVO8ixa3exgM-hgeLIOsqfbZZsYFsuhe8nRGgevZx8bn936MHCx6r04y9Xx2WkyS4SSHuibkfno8GQYM2efQFT4f_9-00P4sAct3drXzncYPzcLTZ9Z1SMJsQYxVkXaZyy1J8tMU79QeTRGP2VwQyq6M88lLemZG-C6Y9n-3ZOQ3E) Thank you,**Hurd for America**

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663214%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C04Fld8hZbZeZ%2fcdudxcug&sysid=1 "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663225%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=19uZb30%2bGlgQWhs4UAjWNA&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ycHp2ePDzyWyPdq9FDEF2w&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ycHp2ePDzyWyPdq9FDEF2w&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")

name: Coach
subject: My Senate PASS Act >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
My legislation for NIL rules >>>
| | | Peter, You know I’m all about protecting the integrity of sports and the amazingly talented student-athletes performing at the highest levels in college. This is precisely why I’ve introduced my bipartisan PASS Act in the Senate. [You can learn more about it by reading this Fox News article. >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/21f4893adeb4b358/0b15046970f5cb7dc3d6b838967d376c/33013) I’ve been working on this legislation for more than a year, and it’s finally ready to go so we can proactively and fairly address college athletes’ “Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL)” monetization policies. **My goal is to set a level NIL playing field for all NCAA athletics.** Right now, we have several states with governing policies that are just totally different than other states. We can’t have a separate rule book, and my legislation is intended to provide an unobtrusive national standard and general guideline for the NCAA to adopt and implement from school to school going forward. _It’s important for every college and university to be on the same page for the sake of fairness across the country in all 50 states._
---
[**READ THE ARTICLE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/21f4893adeb4b358/25bc87612f00cbbec3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
– Coach
---
id:2023-07-29-01:39:27:987t
---

body:
I don't want to bombard you with too many emails, but this is important...
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67647788/420374894/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTYyZmIxNS1jYTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeOtXarPd1k9Nw1NlSyMhfEYpkAB18T9adW6kB67R1A=) | I know you're probably sick of getting fundraising emails, but we're down to the wire and that's why I'm reaching out, team.

**The possibility of _missing our chance to protect reproductive rights in Ohio this fall is so much worse than reading another email._**

**I'm emailing you, because the August 8 special election is just days away. We need all hands on deck to get out the vote and SAVE citizen-led ballot initiatives from Republicans who want to make it IMPOSSIBLE for voters to amend our state constitution.**

[**Can I count on you to chip in $5 in this FINAL week before the August 8 primary election to help fund our Get Out the Vote campaign? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67647789/420374895/-2013194551?refcode=em23_230805_GOTV4R_fndd_gq_act_FED_EFTODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230805_GOTV4R_fndd_gq_act_FED_EFTODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7a62fb15-ca33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&noskip=true&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTYyZmIxNS1jYTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeOtXarPd1k9Nw1NlSyMhfEYpkAB18T9adW6kB67R1A=) | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67647790/420374896/-2013194551?refcode=em23_230805_GOTV4R_fndd_gq_act_FED_EFTODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230805_GOTV4R_fndd_gq_act_FED_EFTODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7a62fb15-ca33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&noskip=true&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTYyZmIxNS1jYTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeOtXarPd1k9Nw1NlSyMhfEYpkAB18T9adW6kB67R1A=)
---
Look, we send these fundraising emails for a reason, team. The GOP _knows_ the majority of Ohioans REJECT their extremist agenda. We're doing EVERYTHING we can to ensure voters all across our state know what's at stake on August 8.

[**We refuse to let extremists rewrite the rules and take Ohio backward by impeding the will of voters, but Ohio Democrats are counting on your support to fight back. Can you rush a donation of $5 or more today? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67647791/420374897/-2013194551?refcode=em23_230805_GOTV4R_fndd_gq_act_FED_EFTODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230805_GOTV4R_fndd_gq_act_FED_EFTODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7a62fb15-ca33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&noskip=true&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTYyZmIxNS1jYTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeOtXarPd1k9Nw1NlSyMhfEYpkAB18T9adW6kB67R1A=)

Thank you,

Emily

clean_body: I don't want to bombard you with too many emails, but this is important... = | I know you're probably sick of getting fundraising emails, but we're down to the wire and that's why I'm reaching out, team. The possibility of missing our chance to protect reproductive rights in Ohio this fall is so much worse than reading another email. I'm emailing you, because the August 8 special election is just days away. We need all hands on deck to get out the vote and SAVE citizen-led ballot initiatives from Republicans who want to make it IMPOSSIBLE for voters to amend our state constitution. = | = Look, we send these fundraising emails for a reason, team. The GOP knows the majority of Ohioans REJECT their extremist agenda. We're doing EVERYTHING we can to ensure voters all across our state know what's at stake on August 8. = Thank you, Emily Team ODP A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to enshrine reproductive rights into our state constitution? → | = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

July ended as the hottest month on record, Peter.

In Florida, ocean temperatures reached 101.2° – the temperature most hot tubs are set at. In Arizona, many saguaro cacti, known for their ability to weather the arid heat, died as temperatures rose to 110° degrees for over 25 days.

And right here in Central Washington, we will see more wildfires, earlier growing seasons, warmer temperatures in our tributaries, and more species becoming extinct.

**Kim knows climate change is the greatest moral and existential issue of our time, and we only have a few years to make major changes before we see irreversible and profound damage to our environment.**

That's why Kim helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act, which makes the single largest investment in climate solutions ever, and the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, which included provisions she championed to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect our rivers and streams, and more.

But to combat climate change, we have more work ahead of us.

**[If you agree, we need to recommit to combating climate change and protecting our environment, join Kim by signing your name today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67647841/420375819/-340167354?ms=em23_230805_climat_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em23_230805_climat_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em23_230805_climat_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230805_climat_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Y4kvqpB9mySR0gbNH3cPIETMZnI4u/rxjFj4avxNyIIrqQ+1QKFWjqMn0GDifqouQRP+QH6CX3aVWgexrEOPFSadrKam7zhU7KRC/LLh6emwAi63o7xgJrxUlwNtKsSfN1SG6BbAGsb04zGL5O5ryAgGCQgc+pZ176Wu7cdq4W4=&refcode2=e54363a5-ca33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQzNjNhNS1jYTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J57tkfddfo2lmkCjagk3MJktperVsADylWBmgb0PGuQ=&emci=c307e475-1032-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=e54363a5-ca33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: My thoughts on the indictment of Donald Trump for his efforts to subvert democracy:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67648082/420377516/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230805Trump_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWEwYzI1Yi1jYjMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hEC4CLCIS8I8S70cs7kOqjbJ2EkcY0JlZFtjAIivrwo=)
---
Donald Trump was arraigned this week in our nation’s capital on criminal charges over his scheme to subvert the will of the American people and overturn the results of a free and fair election.

**The conscious and corrupt actions by Trump and a group of co-conspirators culminated in the horrific events of January 6, 2021** — the day my colleagues and I sheltered in place as a violent mob broke into the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to shatter the sacred process of the peaceful transfer of power.

I've seen how the trauma of January 6 has impacted Capitol Police, congressional staffers, members of the press, and people throughout the D.C. region (including in my district). I am thinking of all of them as I consider what it means for a former U.S. President to be indicted on charges for the deliberate and criminal lies which led to that day.

Donald Trump and his associates made a concerted effort to convince the public of false “fraud” in the 2020 election – and many of my colleagues were all too happy to parrot these lies. **I'll never forget that on the same day of the insurrection, a majority of House Republicans voted against certifying the election.**

Today, Trump’s grip on the GOP remains as strong as ever. We’ve already seen absurd attempts this week from many elected official to distract from or justify his behavior. And at the state level, the far right continues to try to circumvent democracy through blatant voter suppression.

So it’s clear to me that as we approach 2024, the rule of law and the core tenets of our electoral process will once again be on the ballot. And we must fight for them with all the courage and tenacity that we showed in 2018, 2020, and 2022.

The days ahead will test our country. But am determined to do all in my power to ensure that truth and accountability prevail. The stakes are too high for any of us to give up.

Sincerely,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67648083/420377517/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230805Trump_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWEwYzI1Yi1jYjMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hEC4CLCIS8I8S70cs7kOqjbJ2EkcY0JlZFtjAIivrwo=)****
---

Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States

body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll? [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%
This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will have to fight like hell to make it happen.
Will you step up today and split a contribution between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win.
And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts. Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will come.
Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in to help us build up as much small-dollar support as possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national Republicans throw our way. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team.
— Jon

body:
