INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Trump in Trouble | Bernie vs. Big Oil | Ohio Abortion
Fight | Bernie Endorses Regunberg | Gilliard for SC Senate | Seattle
Victories | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

As Donald Trump is indicted for the third time and more charges pile up,
he continues to poll better than at any point in his previous runs and
polls show him tied with President Biden for 2024.

There’s a serious risk we could face another Trump term in 2024 — unless
Democrats are able to deliver tangible results for working people to earn
trust and votes.

That’s why Our Revolution and our allies are working overtime to unify the
progressive movement and focus our pressure on key demands like student
debt relief, an end to medical debt, and urgent climate action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1012&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Our movement is critical to defeating the far right and advancing
people-centered policies to address the many crises facing our country. If
you’re not already a monthly member of Our Revolution, sign up today!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1013&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/bernie_bigoil_accountable_pt?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1014&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders is leading a charge of Senators calling on the DOJ to
prosecute Big Oil for their decades of lies to deny science and cover up
their climate crimes — all while raking in record profits.

Last year we supported Rep. Ro Khanna as he grilled fossil fuel execs
under oath. Just like Big Tobacco, which has paid $206 billion dollars for
lying to the public about the dangers of smoking, Big Oil is next.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/bernie_bigoil_accountable_pt?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1015&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Stand with Bernie: Tell the Attorney General to prosecute polluters
NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/bernie_bigoil_accountable_pt?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1016&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

Meanwhile, as climate chaos rages across the globe, Joe Manchin and his
Big Oil buddies are pushing the President to greenlight more fossil fuel
projects and eyeing upcoming must-pass legislation like the Farm Bill to
sneak in their dirty deals.

Our Revolution and allies like Greenpeace are working together to demand
the Biden Administration to declare a climate emergency and use its power
to stop Big Oil’s climate denial before it’s too late.

We can’t let carbon cronies gut our bedrock environmental laws, exclude
the public from democratic input on projects, and build their polluting
projects anywhere they want.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9558?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1017&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

It’s going to take organized grassroots activism to overcome the deep
pockets and ruthless tactics of his corporate overlords.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9558?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1018&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Can you chip in to our Climate Action Fund ASAP?? Give now and we’ll
send you our “Stay Cool, Stop Fossil Fuels” drink koozie.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/student_debt_survey/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1019&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

Our Revolution members are taking a stand against student debt. Nine of
our activists spoke courageously at the recent Department of Education
hearing, sharing their stories and demanding action.

“My government is making money off of me,” Our Revolution member Lisa
Rapaszky said at the hearing. Lisa owes more than $30,000 in student loan
debt. “It's just too much.”

Student debt payments are set to restart at the end of next month —
causing economic havoc in the midst of an affordability crisis — and our
movement is ramping up the pressure.

As Ro Khanna explained on our recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9559?t=1020&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Debt Town Hall, President Biden
can still use his executive authority to cancel debt, pause payments, and
crack down on predatory lending practices — and 43 million of us and our
families are counting on it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/student_debt_survey/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

"The President should cancel student debt in the Higher Education Act. He
should zero out the accounts,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8875?t=1022&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Ro told us on Monday. “If the Supreme
Court rules against us then let’s see if they’ll actually enforce the
collection of debt that has already been canceled.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/student_debt_survey/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]You can help! Share your story of how restarting student debt will
affect you and your family.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

Our Rev members in Maryland turned out to show support for One Fair Wage
last week with Montgomery Co. Exec. Marc Elrich and Councilors Will
Jawando and Kristin Mink to uplift the fight for fair wages for restaurant
workers ahead of new legislation to be unveiled next month.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

In Chicago, Mayor Brandon Johnson joined us for a Server for a Day event
to pass an $18 an hour minimum wage for all workers in the city.

Organizers have worked hard to get these bills on the table, and now we’ve
got one month to make the push and get them passed.

In Ohio and Arizona, Our Revolution has teams canvassing for signatures
for petition drives that will put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE directly on the
ballot in 2024.

Not only will this motivate our voters to the polls, but it will mean
millions of people getting a long overdue pay raise so they no longer have
to choose between rent and groceries.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1026&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

Right now in Ohio, anti-abortion politicians and their billionaire buddies
are trying to change the state constitution with a special election on
Tuesday to block a November ballot measure to protect abortion rights.

They have spent millions in taxpayer dollars to call this special election
to change the rules because they know most Ohioans oppose the state’s
extreme abortion ban and would vote to undo it.

The August 8th special election is being held at the last minute in the
dead of summer in hopes that most folks won’t know it’s happening — so we
must mobilize as many Ohio voters to the polls on Tuesday as possible.

If they’re successful here, this will become the template to tear down
democracy and abortion care in other states. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1027&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Pitch in a donation to
fund our critical GOTV work in Ohio!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1028&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

More than 650,000 American workers are threatening to go on strike this
summer — or have already done so — in an avalanche of union activity not
seen in the US in decades.

Actors and writers strikes in Hollywood are already a once-in-a-generation
event. And, Unions for United Parcel Service and Detroit’s Big Three
automakers could join them.

“In terms of workers in America who still have the ability to change their
conditions, these are three of the top 10,” Our Revolution Board Chair
Larry Cohen told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9560?t=1029&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Bloomberg.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1030&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

As the 2024 presidential race heats up, Our Revolution is building our war
chest to make sure progressives pick up more House and Senate seats —
including replacing corporatists like Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona.

Our voter mobilization strategy has been battle-tested against billionaire
SuperPACs — we’ve helped elect 1000 candidates and won 2 out of 3 races
we’ve endorsed in. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1031&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Pitch in today to grow our war chest for 2024 and
beyond!

We’re also not losing focus on important special elections and down-ballot
races from Rhode Island to South Carolina to Ohio.
Read more below!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1032&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

State Rep. Wendell Gilliard is running for State Senate in South Carolina
— and Our Revolution is ramping up our voter turnout operation to win the
September 5th special election!

Gilliard kicked off his campaign this summer with an economic justice bus
tour and led a rally for higher wages with Bernie Sanders in Charleston.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9561?t=1033&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Watch this powerful clip of Rep. Gilliard here.

He was a 2020 campaign co-chair for Bernie and state director in South
Carolina, and like Bernie, he has been a champion of working people for
decades.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1034&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

Gilliard was a union leader for 15 years, a Charleston City Councilor for
11 years, and a member of the SC House for 15 years — where he has worked
to make our neighborhoods safer, bring in good-paying jobs, and reform our
criminal justice system.

On Wednesday, he joined a call with our phone bank team, and talked about
his goals for the State Senate, where he’ll continue the fight for
economic justice and affordable housing, and an end to gun violence.

“We need a voice not afraid to speak truth to power,” Wendell said. “They
want this seat so they can keep power in Columbia and not in your hands.
They want to control the money, jobs, and opportunities.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1035&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders just endorsed progressive climate champion Aaron Regunberg
for the Sept 5 special election in Rhode Island’s 1st Congressional
District.

Aaron is running to succeed David Cicillini and hold RI-1 for progressives
and the working class. Electing Aaron means protecting the largest
progressive caucus in Congressional history.

In Congress, he will be a yes vote for Medicare for All, ending medical
debt, passing universal childcare, and more.

This will come down to voter turnout and we have the numbers to win. We
have one month to mobilize 15,000 Our Revolution supporters in Aaron’s
district — so let’s get to work!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1036&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

VICTORY! All three of Our Revolution-backed candidates in Seattle are
leading the vote counts after Tuesday’s primary!

Teresa Mosqueda and Jorge Baron are in the lead for King County Council
seats, along with Tammy Morales for Seattle City Council, and the trio
appear to be heading to the general election in November.

Each of them have shown they will have our back and fight for progressive
values. Thank you to the support and activism of Our Revolution members in
Washington whose democratic input and activism made these wins possible!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9558?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1037&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

Climate chaos is ravaging the globe, but we must keep our cool and put the
heat on climate criminals and their puppets in government.

That’s why Our Revolution is working with our allies in office and
organizing our massive climate coalition to bring pressure to bear ahead
of 2024.

Make sure our climate team has the resources needed to fight back. Pitch
in a donation of $10 ($5 if you’re already a monthly member), we’ll send
you this iconic new Bernie sticker as our thanks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9558?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1038&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]HELP EXPAND OUR WORK!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1039&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1040&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.oD5WOs&t=1008&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.cDvf_M&t=1009&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230805_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.xXpKgn&t=1010&akid=4522%2E5885482%2EHoKszi ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

subject: I was outed by my Republican opponent.

body:
Will Rollins is now running to unseat him.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67648213/420378649/146446798?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230805_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyODA3NmQ2LWNlMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WyHH0FOb2CpaYXAIISjo4ZAwaBD92jazcOAFoDghJVc=) Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano.

body:
It’s a very sad day for America.

It’s a very sad day for America.
| | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5fef106ac62142cc84e6861265567d27&_e=LkOqRVosWCcxn3UsMAVliTSDtm1SrywYRFhwl5pmwKW_F2Qg7hzQR4mAZGOPy-PT8BDAwFthdwjJuhLC-2KQe4ng9DAtX2PkdFpzXCHNBuKleh0clckVsiltt3TDXnCsnBztXzpAsjSic2ckfVsk1SfbU-wvxMQ7IeXFZKlsSxT9kIlAx8jbdbJmT85ORpLsDcTQjbxlU53ZMwQlfkBba5tvZ59LeZE_nsVKytQsovuUoQwZekQQMdRJ6kExnEoeEBj3PM1COcacqw0f8bTGBIlHpyHOlOBocii9YFCT1ZG3St1BUizek2qyDhIluGqfknwcNg5mcL0usM-1cGBBnwTa4Daor0EJjiBBp9v0VOUD5JRMd3cYzBDbhB-MZ1ivfLDx3qurmDUThhjo4CbYkXXkiHAuOOEVvQo2iR-Ja8vu7Erc7BkvWPNd-6IHKuSo)

Friend,
On my drive back from the federal courthouse - where I was processed, read my rights, and heard that I could spend the rest of my life in prison as an innocent man - I thought that this was truly a sad day for America.
As I drove back in the motorcade through Washington, DC, I saw the filth and the decay and all of the broken buildings and walls of graffiti.
_This is not the place that I left behind._
**But it 's emblematic of the vile corruption that has taken hold of our nation's capital. **
This is a persecution of a political opponent who happens to be leading by very, very substantial numbers in the Republican Primary and leading Biden by a lot.
So, Crooked Joe has decided that if he can't beat me, he's going to prosecute me.
As the rain poured down over us on this dark and gloomy day in the Washington Swamp, my last words to the dishonest press before I boarded Trump Force One were that this should NEVER be allowed to happen in America.
Friend, while a dark cloud hangs over our nation, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.

clean_body: It’s a very sad day for America. It’s a very sad day for America. | | | Friend, On my drive back from the federal courthouse - where I was processed, read my rights, and heard that I could spend the rest of my life in prison as an innocent man - I thought that this was truly a sad day for America. As I drove back in the motorcade through Washington, DC, I saw the filth and the decay and all of the broken buildings and walls of graffiti. This is not the place that I left behind. But it 's emblematic of the vile corruption that has taken hold of our nation's capital. This is a persecution of a political opponent who happens to be leading by very, very substantial numbers in the Republican Primary and leading Biden by a lot. So, Crooked Joe has decided that if he can't beat me, he's going to prosecute me. As the rain poured down over us on this dark and gloomy day in the Washington Swamp, my last words to the dishonest press before I boarded Trump Force One were that this should NEVER be allowed to happen in America. Friend, while a dark cloud hangs over our nation, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again. | If you are doing poorly due to the sinister forces who run Washington, DC right now, don 't even think about donating! | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Team Joe
subject: Settle in with this week’s Team Joe Newsletter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Read on to learn more about what President Biden and Vice President Harris have been up to these past few weeks → | | |
---
Peter -- It’s an exciting time for team Biden-Harris, and we’re here to share some of the latest updates! Read on to learn more about what President Biden and Vice President Harris have been up to these past few weeks →

* * *
**CONTINUING ECONOMIC GROWTH** Bidenomics is working, Peter. The Biden-Harris administration has focused on growing the economy from the bottom up and the middle out, and the results speak for themselves: Over 13 million jobs created. Historically low unemployment rate for the longest period in more than 50 years. And the U.S. has seen the highest economic growth among leading economies since the pandemic. Compare that to President Biden’s predecessor, who inherited the longest economic expansion in our country’s history, but dragged us backward instead of helping hardworking families:
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDChm5hfCDNFGiUESs8FGc5qLQP_TCvU7bR0yaHyF2jaMkB6Zz6IFSuKlj2Z-6lOwoK29GGkrdiVKAOppgTb49oVhBiiHeMKF1hZ3gToaJXib4Z5he8o0pZuRViLcrESBYDHiAxXa_iCWmLOuWOhKuOd8W0UKEKQPkcxEPiWYxBjRj3DSFuKb_7GUgH9vYuB3kYkgWmy6VFrxBed63Uae-eAkYUKaubJAFYusOdCVD9f5KBFKkYNkvdBHFciMflRpGpwA7EdngVGUzson_nnGjGOylNNqLy8tEOmEE7Ea4iPan05SPxNSCpp9oQBwzCQWoXphhpUppGJLVOOvILYkn8nb65SXmba1yBgZXIpK9_u-0vB1rutYW5RgInWMVD9OlDIKJu_I7ACRSG9Y1VPJ6yzoB3Y3vo16_CRkTqFzsCoWV0PCzIdikD6tn9-tgyGcc4fDXWOr-LTnIGNXptsS-dreeKo0D4WKWSDpy4soCAZS4oQFXoRVhIZVYsr0ntjGSQ/3yh/wSZRRdNySSi3LhkDILaw6Q/h0/ezhQ_eB-gYuKuNDs_RdtznuQEemHQSH2MY9Egw61L1I)

---

* * *
**CELEBRATING THE 58TH ANNIVERSARY OF MEDICARE AND MEDICAID**
**Happy Anniversary, Medicare and Medicaid!🎉** Fifty-eight years ago, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed Medicare and Medicaid into law, providing critical lifesaving health care to families nationwide. President Biden and Vice President Harris have fought diligently to expand access to these key services while working to bring down health care costs. In the last few years they have:
* Passed legislation allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices
* Passed the Inflation Reduction Act to lower prescription drug costs
* Cracked down on junk insurance plans and taken steps to protect consumers from unfair medical debt

Meanwhile, the extreme MAGA Republican presidential candidates are threatening to roll back all the progress we’ve made and cut these essential protections for Americans across the country. Take a look:

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPht3Gj7XYTWIWoNpaqMpiaMkHFeHhdXxG5JQCjRAuQt0DQrC7LWMBBk2eXtxNG3nOwUVgvbSRzuAmEG-JlD-CLJB4GsNhLiR1FX0pbvPvYmajdaLUuVG_5shUQYuM-AL-3LOY9eWP9w5C01Vws6a7vW3Whb8J1-AzRP0Mlx1wLKbCogGoU5-zklUqhQbK0oPbe-ofxbNHE_wbVbTXQmZN2yvBiJsl3F8rbW2KNNm_utWzMRURFEiF7kj7ecUOM99Qp20G5Trdne-4CR6pS2MmcvMMvZMy_sOHfMLnqjPq7MXqSejlBxVwqvP97XnZkhnSAy0-IIptaxJDObGkSpZmw6I/3yh/wSZRRdNySSi3LhkDILaw6Q/h2/Ba2bcxbtbCff6uUZy7cdz9XHVXmecGl7pKiQCWMlkBY)

* * *
**REFLECTING ON THE LEGACY OF EMMETT TILL AND MAMIE TILL-MOBLEY**
On what would have been Emmett Till’s 82nd birthday, President Biden signed a proclamation establishing the Emmett Till and Mamie Till-Mobley National Monument in both Mississippi and Illinois.
The monument honors the efforts of Emmett Till’s family, civil rights leaders, and elected officials to ensure that these sites are protected and that Emmett Till’s story isn’t forgotten. This monument’s designation builds on the Biden-Harris administration's work to advance civil rights and racial justice, including President Biden’s signing of the Emmett Till Antilynching Act that designates lynching as a federal hate crime.

clean_body: Read on to learn more about what President Biden and Vice President Harris have been up to these past few weeks → | | | Peter -- It’s an exciting time for team Biden-Harris, and we’re here to share some of the latest updates! Read on to learn more about what President Biden and Vice President Harris have been up to these past few weeks → CONTINUING ECONOMIC GROWTH Bidenomics is working, Peter. The Biden-Harris administration has focused on growing the economy from the bottom up and the middle out, and the results speak for themselves: Over 13 million jobs created. Historically low unemployment rate for the longest period in more than 50 years. And the U.S. has seen the highest economic growth among leading economies since the pandemic. Compare that to President Biden’s predecessor, who inherited the longest economic expansion in our country’s history, but dragged us backward instead of helping hardworking families: | | | CELEBRATING THE 58TH ANNIVERSARY OF MEDICARE AND MEDICAID Happy Anniversary, Medicare and Medicaid!🎉 Fifty-eight years ago, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed Medicare and Medicaid into law, providing critical lifesaving health care to families nationwide. President Biden and Vice President Harris have fought diligently to expand access to these key services while working to bring down health care costs. In the last few years they have: Passed legislation allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices Passed the Inflation Reduction Act to lower prescription drug costs Cracked down on junk insurance plans and taken steps to protect consumers from unfair medical debt Meanwhile, the extreme MAGA Republican presidential candidates are threatening to roll back all the progress we’ve made and cut these essential protections for Americans across the country. Take a look: | | REFLECTING ON THE LEGACY OF EMMETT TILL AND MAMIE TILL-MOBLEY On what would have been Emmett Till’s 82nd birthday, President Biden signed a proclamation establishing the Emmett Till and Mamie Till-Mobley National Monument in both Mississippi and Illinois. The monument honors the efforts of Emmett Till’s family, civil rights leaders, and elected officials to ensure that these sites are protected and that Emmett Till’s story isn’t forgotten. This monument’s designation builds on the Biden-Harris administration's work to advance civil rights and racial justice, including President Biden’s signing of the Emmett Till Antilynching Act that designates lynching as a federal hate crime. | | STICKERS! STICKERS! STICKERS! We’re excited to announce our ! These American-made, union-printed stickers are perfect for any item you think needs a dose of President Biden or Vice President Harris. Water bottles ✅ Computer ✅ Notebook ✅ Shirt ✅ Anywhere is the perfect place to show your support for the Biden-Harris reelection campaign with a . We can’t wait to see all the cool places you stick President Biden and Vice President Harris, Peter! Check them out → | | INVEST IN OUR CAMPAIGN INFRASTRUCTURE Early support is essential, Peter! By chipping in today you’re helping ensure we have the resources to build our team all across the country. Victory in 2024 won’t be possible without the support of grassroots donors like you! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Until next time, Team Joe

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Monarchs vs Pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915265?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | On a sunny spring day, the sky is speckled with bright orange and black creatures fluttering between trees, flowers, gardens, and prairies. You may see these soft beauties roam through playgrounds and picnics, landing to greet us with their grace and charm. _The monarch butterfly has returned north after its migration in the cold winter months._ The monarchs are ready to lay their eggs on the only source of food for their soon-to-hatch offspring--_milkweed_ plants. But there seems to be less milkweed and less milkweed available. **Where has all the milkweed gone, Friend?** The Western monarch butterfly population has **PLUMMETTED by 90%** in recent decades due, in part, to the disappearance of milkweed plants. A major driver of the milkweed decline? **Toxic herbicides** like Bayer-Monsanto’s glyphosate – aka Roundup - which _**KILLS**_ milkweed. Use of Roundup in agriculture has skyrocketed in recent decades thanks to Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup Ready corn and soy. **Less milkweed means less monarch butterfly reproduction. ** [**Our fluttering friends need your help, Friend. Please take less than 60 seconds right now to tell Bayer-Monsanto to stop selling toxic chemicals and help PROTECT monarch butterflies from extinction by 11:59pm TONIGHT >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915266?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915267?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Glyphosate is not only lethal to milkweed but is also harmful to human health. Studies have linked this toxic chemical to serious health risks such as _cancer, reproductive problems, and hormone disruption -- with children being the most vulnerable to exposure!_
That’s not the worst of it, Friend. Bayer-Monsanto has been _**MANIPULATING**_ science and _**EVADING**_ regulations while _**LYING**_ to the public about the dangers of their toxic pesticides. They continue to profit at the expense of the planet and human health.
[**We know environmentalists like you, Friend will not stand for these lies! Sign the petition TONIGHT to demand that Bayer-Monsanto stop harming monarch butterflies, our health, and our planet!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915268?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915267?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action to protect our pollinators,
Friends of the Earth**

name: AOTL
subject: Shape of Things: Issue 1 and Ohio’s Gerrymandered Legislature
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities of interest.
|
---

**The Shape of Things: Ohio’s Gerrymandered Legislature and Issue 1**
[**How We Got Here:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67648396/420379582/-525127504?refcode=20230805_AOTL_F_SoT-OH_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2Y2UxODA4LWQzMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT7ntdbjhN-hXSN3g3JzHjzpHZVoj5gffZPTbGtydvo=)
Ohio's 2020-2021 legislative redistricting process was a troubling extension of decades of gerrymandering regardless of efforts to reform the process, where unaccountable politicians rig the rules to their advantage.
In September 2021, voters supported by the NRAF challenged gerrymandered legislative maps in _Bennett v. Ohio Redistricting Commission_ (ORC), highlighting the critical issue of Ohio Republicans attempting to hold on to unearned power through gerrymandering. Despite the Ohio Supreme Court striking down the gerrymandered legislative maps in January 2022, the ORC's Republican majority continued to pass more gerrymandered maps, leading to more court orders to redraw compliant maps. In their desperate attempts to maintain their grip on power and in open defiance of the Supreme Court, Ohio Republicans succeeded in having the state conduct the 2022 elections on maps that had already been invalidated.
The _Bennett v. Ohio Redistricting Commission_ case showcased how politicians elected from gerrymandered districts benefit from map manipulation, evade accountability, ignore the will of the people, and ultimately undermine democracy.
* * *
[**Ohio Issue 1:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67648397/420379583/-525127504?refcode=20230805_AOTL_F_SoT-OH_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2Y2UxODA4LWQzMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT7ntdbjhN-hXSN3g3JzHjzpHZVoj5gffZPTbGtydvo=)
Ohio Issue 1 is a legislatively referred ballot question proposing an amendment to the Ohio Constitution that would increase the approval threshold of future amendments to the Ohio Constitution to 60% from a simple majority. Ohio’s gerrymandered legislature sent this ballot question to Ohio voters in the spring of 2023 for an August 8, 2023 election, despite having outlawed August special elections in December of 2022 due to low voter turnout.
This ballot question to amend the Ohio Constitution is a prime example of the alarming reality of politicians elected from gerrymandered districts using map manipulation to consolidate power and avoid accountability when it benefits them. They prioritize the interests of lobbyists and special interest groups over their constituents' needs in order to preserve their hold on power, leading to a lack of responsiveness to citizens' concerns.
* * *

Issue 1, if approved, will worsen the problems caused by gerrymandering by requiring a 60% majority to pass ballot issues that amend the state constitution, denying voters a critical avenue to make their voices heard in the democratic process. The August special election aims to exploit lower voter turnout and manipulate voters to push agendas without scrutiny, further insulating legislators from accountability. Furthermore, it poses a significant threat to the future ballot initiatives like the effort to enshrine abortion rights in the state constitution that will be before voters this November. This specific initiative is a direct response to gerrymandered legislature’s decisions to push anti-choice policies.

[**Why Voting "No" on Issue 1 is Crucial for Our Movement?:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67648399/420379586/-525127504?refcode=20230805_AOTL_F_SoT-OH_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2Y2UxODA4LWQzMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT7ntdbjhN-hXSN3g3JzHjzpHZVoj5gffZPTbGtydvo=) **Upholding the Sacred Principle of "One Person, One Vote":** Issue 1 undermines the fundamental democratic principle of "one person, one vote" by shifting power from individual voters to lobbyists, special interests, and corrupt politicians. **Protecting Our Rights:** Voting "No" on Issue 1 is essential to preserve Ohioans’ rights. This amendment would restrict Ohioans' freedom and permanently alter the Ohio Constitution, diminishing their say in crucial decisions affecting their lives. **Countering Power Grabs:** Issue 1 represents a blatant power grab by those seeking to control the political landscape for personal gain. By opposing this amendment, we send a strong message that Ohioans and people nationwide will not tolerate such manipulative tactics.

clean_body: This series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities of interest. | The Shape of Things: Ohio’s Gerrymandered Legislature and Issue 1 = Ohio's 2020-2021 legislative redistricting process was a troubling extension of decades of gerrymandering regardless of efforts to reform the process, where unaccountable politicians rig the rules to their advantage. In September 2021, voters supported by the NRAF challenged gerrymandered legislative maps in Bennett v. Ohio Redistricting Commission (ORC), highlighting the critical issue of Ohio Republicans attempting to hold on to unearned power through gerrymandering. Despite the Ohio Supreme Court striking down the gerrymandered legislative maps in January 2022, the ORC's Republican majority continued to pass more gerrymandered maps, leading to more court orders to redraw compliant maps. In their desperate attempts to maintain their grip on power and in open defiance of the Supreme Court, Ohio Republicans succeeded in having the state conduct the 2022 elections on maps that had already been invalidated. The Bennett v. Ohio Redistricting Commission case showcased how politicians elected from gerrymandered districts benefit from map manipulation, evade accountability, ignore the will of the people, and ultimately undermine democracy. = Ohio Issue 1 is a legislatively referred ballot question proposing an amendment to the Ohio Constitution that would increase the approval threshold of future amendments to the Ohio Constitution to 60% from a simple majority. Ohio’s gerrymandered legislature sent this ballot question to Ohio voters in the spring of 2023 for an August 8, 2023 election, despite having outlawed August special elections in December of 2022 due to low voter turnout. This ballot question to amend the Ohio Constitution is a prime example of the alarming reality of politicians elected from gerrymandered districts using map manipulation to consolidate power and avoid accountability when it benefits them. They prioritize the interests of lobbyists and special interest groups over their constituents' needs in order to preserve their hold on power, leading to a lack of responsiveness to citizens' concerns. = Issue 1, if approved, will worsen the problems caused by gerrymandering by requiring a 60% majority to pass ballot issues that amend the state constitution, denying voters a critical avenue to make their voices heard in the democratic process. The August special election aims to exploit lower voter turnout and manipulate voters to push agendas without scrutiny, further insulating legislators from accountability. Furthermore, it poses a significant threat to the future ballot initiatives like the effort to enshrine abortion rights in the state constitution that will be before voters this November. This specific initiative is a direct response to gerrymandered legislature’s decisions to push anti-choice policies. = Upholding the Sacred Principle of "One Person, One Vote": Issue 1 undermines the fundamental democratic principle of "one person, one vote" by shifting power from individual voters to lobbyists, special interests, and corrupt politicians. Protecting Our Rights: Voting "No" on Issue 1 is essential to preserve Ohioans’ rights. This amendment would restrict Ohioans' freedom and permanently alter the Ohio Constitution, diminishing their say in crucial decisions affecting their lives. Countering Power Grabs: Issue 1 represents a blatant power grab by those seeking to control the political landscape for personal gain. But this very important dinner wouldn’t be complete without representation from the very Americans who are the HEART and POWER of our movement — grassroots patriots like YOU. Now, all that’s left to do is enter for YOUR chance to win this VIP ticket to my Nashville dinner. I hope to see you there, Friend! Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Josh Harder
subject: The pros and cons of Facebook
body:
Here is my decision: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67649330/420383213/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ5Y2ZiN2ItZGMzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfpDQ-4iUKo6nxyx6pSP3KrFWO9AAw82v8wEZnoDykU=) | Peter, I’ve committed to always be transparent about where we’re spending campaign funds and our reasoning why. Today I want to talk about why I’ve decided to make Facebook ads a part of our campaign strategy. If you’d like to chip in to support our digital program, here’s the [link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67649331/420383214/1156059191?&refcode=E3641-20230805-Facebook-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ5Y2ZiN2ItZGMzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfpDQ-4iUKo6nxyx6pSP3KrFWO9AAw82v8wEZnoDykU=). I’ll be the first to tell you there are real issues with Facebook and its profit incentives. I’ve also seen the negative effects of misinformation spreading on the platform, especially when they are in Spanish. It’s incredibly frustrating and Facebook has to do better. But I also want to be very clear - **Democrats cannot cede important platforms like Facebook to Republicans.** Facebook is a vital lifeline for messaging to millions of swing voters. If we do not communicate with them, we will lose. It’s that simple. So, how do we make sure our Facebook ads are effective? We create pithy content that draws a clear distinction between our message (government can be used for good) versus Republicans’ message (be scared of people who are different than you). Here are some examples: **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67649332/420383215/1156059191?&refcode=E3641-20230805-Facebook-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ5Y2ZiN2ItZGMzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfpDQ-4iUKo6nxyx6pSP3KrFWO9AAw82v8wEZnoDykU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67649333/420383216/1156059191?&refcode=E3641-20230805-Facebook-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ5Y2ZiN2ItZGMzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfpDQ-4iUKo6nxyx6pSP3KrFWO9AAw82v8wEZnoDykU=)** As you know, Republicans are already running negative ads against me on Facebook. And in response, we have decided to run our own response ads. We believe it’s a strategic imperative that swing voters hear our rebuttal, even if it’s over a year away from the election. So, here comes the ask... Now that you understand the _why_ I’d love your help with the _how._ The only way we can fund this digital program is with your grassroots support. We don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. If you can, I’d appreciate any support you can give to help us fund this program. Here is a link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Aug2023-FR-August](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67649334/420383217/1156059191?&refcode=E3641-20230805-Facebook-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ5Y2ZiN2ItZGMzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfpDQ-4iUKo6nxyx6pSP3KrFWO9AAw82v8wEZnoDykU=) Thanks for your help!
\- Josh
---
* * *

[**Your early investment and support is critical so we can build the grassroots movement we need to win in 2024. Now that you understand the why I’d love your help with the how. The only way we can fund this digital program is with your grassroots support. We don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. If you can, I’d appreciate any support you can give to help us fund this program. Here is a link: = Thanks for your help! \- Josh *

body:

### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### **Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared.**
* **[Ford is losing money](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-y/)** on their electric vehicles.
* **[Chinese bio lab](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-j/)** discovered in California.
* RNC launching **[Bank Your Vote](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-t/)**!
* 50 Vietnam Vets finally **[receive their bronze star](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-i/)**!
* High school boys are **[trending conservative](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-d/).**
* **[Climate obsession](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-h/) **is a mental disorder.
* Dems discover **[summer is hot](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-k/).**
* **[Lightbulb ban](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-u/) **goes into effect.
* Biden's new rule is **[unlawful](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-o/).**
* Kari Lake says**[weird things](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-x/).**
* Tucker Carlson interviewed**[Devon Archer](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-m/).**
* Biden's**[pants are on fire](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-c/).**
* Get your popcorn ready for**[DeSantis v. Newsom!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-q/)**
* Trump pleads**[not guilty](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-a/).**

### **Farmers Are Not Doing Well**
**[American farmers continue to sound the alarm](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-f/)** on food insecurity and the need for free market principles and less regulation.
### **It's a Revolution!**
Vivek Ramaswamy **[fact-checks Al Sharpton's claim](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-z/)** about Thomas Jefferson. **What is a Mob?** Chicago Mayor **[objects to reporter using the term 'mob](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asaiy-trhiujldw-v/)'** to describe looters. Friend,
At a time when the Deep State is out to get to me in full force, I'm turning to the people I trust more than anyone in the world - my grassroots supporters like YOU.
_**I 'm hosting a lovely dinner in Nashville, Tennessee this month - and I'm leaving two chairs open for a grassroots donor and a guest of your choice to join me.**_
At a time when Biden's weaponized Department of "Justice" is trying to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man, there's no one I'd rather be surrounded by than my loyal supporters like YOU.
All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount - _yes, any amount_ - to peacefully defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts to be automatically entered to win.

Entries must be received between August 2, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on August 7, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to a August 17, 2023 dinner event in Nashville, Tennessee consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the dinner event featuring President Donald J. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: A message from Jon Hamm about Manhood, courage, Josh Hawley, and this U.S. Senate race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — Jon Hamm's got a message for Missouri.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35404?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA)
**_[Click here to watch this special message from Jon Hamm, then chip in $10 or more to help me replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35404?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA)_**
Any born-and-raised Missourian will tell you: This is the Show Me State.
But the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us during his time in the U.S. Senate is how to be a fraud and a coward — from skittering away from the same mob he raised his fist for outside the Capitol on January 6th to using his own power to strip away rights for everyday people in Missouri and all across the country.
**This election is our opportunity to defeat him.** Hawley won his last race with only 51% of the vote. In the years since, his approval has dropped to just 42% — and in Missouri’s last Senate race during a presidential election, the margin was only 2.7%.
That doesn’t mean it’s going to be easy — after all, GOP insiders at the NRSC haven’t stopped attacking me since the day I got into this race — but we really can win this.
**[So Peter, will you help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your first donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign today? Your support right now gives us the resources to keep delivering our message to voters every day between now and Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35404?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35405?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35405?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35405?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35405?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35405?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35405?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35404?refcode=em20230805-3511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3511%2E614464%2Eh15dDA)

It’s about time Missourians had a U.S. Senator who will actually stand up and look out for them — not a fraud who’s obsessed with defining what it means to be a man.

Lucas
